en.name: 傲剑情缘

developers: 上海奇速网络科技有限公司

tc.name: 大廚老陳
tc.short_description: 《大廚老陳》是一款適合1到4名玩家同樂的多人合作狩獵料理遊戲。老陳與他的夥伴們開的餐廳面臨資金嚴重不足的狀態，只有去參加高風險的料理比賽，才有機會快速獲得一大筆收入。作為一個老陳帶領的優秀料理團隊，你和你的夥伴們為了這筆高額的獎金決定奮力一搏，加入這場充滿奇幻色彩的異世界料理比賽。 把隔熱手套當拳套使用的大廚老陳；認為兩把武士刀不嫌多的武士柴犬巴西利；用腳射箭精準無比的弓手喜鵲貝伊，還有無辜萌萌大眼但戰鬥中異常兇殘的法師貓佩帕，為了餐廳的裝潢費用，4人一同前往異世界面對挑戰！

tc.name: Space Empires V
tc.short_description: 《Space Empires V》是《Space Empires》系列最新版。 這全新的一章完全更新使用者介面，並帶領玩家進入即時繪製的 3D 世界。 玩家可欣賞華麗細緻且效果擬真的宇宙戰鬥， 並在龐大而生動的星系中擴張、探索、開發並發動戰爭。 遊戲新內容有多帝國間的政治聯盟，上而下的船艦設計系統，六角形地圖格，還有更多。 因應玩家要求，遊戲也完全模組化可自行修改，甚至還加入了可撰寫指令的人工智慧系統。 《Space Empires V》在宇宙策略遊戲領域，勇敢地跨出了一大步。 24 位元 3D 即時繪製圖形。 詳細戰術戰鬥 (並有戰鬥模擬器供您測試新設計！) 新載具類型及大小：船艦、基地、運輸艦、戰鬥艇、機雷、衛星、部隊、無人機、武器平台等。

en.name: Born of Bread
en.short_description: Get ready to go on a wacky and joyful turn-based RPG adventure! Play as Loaf, a freshly baked flour golem, and explore the different regions of a wonderful world ripe with mysteries with the help of a colorful cast of characters.

tc.name: Born of Bread

en.short_description: "Mojo 2: Mia” is a new version of the famous game “2048”, an original approach to this well-known puzzle. Beautiful Mia will keep you company during the game. The more points you get, the less clothes remain on the girl.

Only by breaking free can she unveil the truth of her existence and challenge the constraints of fate.

en.name: Cube Escape Collection
en.short_description: In this classic point-and-click adventure anthology you follow the path of Dale and Laura and other famous Rusty lake characters such as Mr. Crow and Mr. Owl. The series will be updated, preserved and bundled to survive the end of the Flash Games era.

en.name: Selaco

You take on the role of Miku, a young girl who has brought her wounded brother to the city in their small fishing boat.

tc.name: Submerged
tc.short_description: 淹沒之城是第三人稱無戰鬥遊戲，在其中你可以探索神秘的汪洋城市，在偌大的戶外環境中發現荒涼之美。你成為米古的角色，一個年輕女孩帶著她受傷的弟弟，乘著他們的小漁船來到這個城市。用船到處探索汪洋城市，登上沉沒的建築物，用望遠鏡看清城市，尋找可以拯救弟弟的補給品。用自己的步調探索城市時，你碰上了多采多姿、繁茂生長的棲息地，而發現隱藏的物品慢慢拼湊出破碎世界還有一個破碎家庭的故事。

tc.name: Go-Go Town!
tc.short_description: 計劃、建造……繁榮發展？作為鎮長，你的任務是讓這個破敗的小鎮重新煥發活力。建造商店，僱用員工，透過快遞公司實現自動化配送，並吸引遊客來到小鎮，同時管理基礎設施以避免災難！誰說當鎮長會很輕鬆……

en.name: 彷徨之街 The Street of Adrift
en.short_description: 大小姐与头牌花魁的羁绊、救赎与毁灭故事。

tc.name: 彷徨之街 The Street of Adrift
tc.short_description: 大小姐与头牌花魁的羁绊、救赎与毁灭故事。

en.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
en.short_description: With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new...

tc.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
tc.short_description: Sid Meier 的 Civilization (文明帝國) 系列在全球已售出逾六百萬套，並獲各地支持者與媒體好評，被視為是史上最經典的電腦遊戲系列之一。 現在，Sid Meier 與 Firaxis Games 更把這一款引人入迷的有趣遊戲帶往另一高峰，加入新的遊戲方式，新的勝敗條件，新的工具來管理擴張您的文明，並用全新的方法，讓自訂遊戲更簡單，多人模式更有趣，選項更多。 Civilization IV 有細緻的畫面，彷彿活著的 3D 世界，把遊戲體驗提升至全新的境界。 Civilization IV 已受玩家讚為 2005 年十大遊戲，是全球玩家都一定要擁有的遊戲！

en.name: Defender's Quest: Valley of the Forgotten (DX edition)
en.short_description: Defender's Quest is a Tower-Defense/RPG Hybrid tightly focuses on three things: tactical depth, customization, and story

tc.name: Defender's Quest: Valley of the Forgotten (DX edition)
tc.short_description: 《守護者冒險》是一款塔防遊戲和角色扮演遊戲的混合遊戲，這款遊戲主要專注在三個方面：戰略深度，玩家定制和劇情。

en.name: Bladed fury
en.short_description: An action game set in the Ancient China, bringing players addictive experiences with its unique Chinese traditional art-style and sound design.

tc.name: Bladed fury
tc.short_description: 故事基於中國古代神話傳說，與春秋戰國歷史緊密結合，加入超現實主義的科幻設定，是一款極具古典韻味的傳奇幻想動作遊戲。

en.name: Relic Hunters Legend
en.short_description: A Top-Down Shooter/Looter RPG with a touching story inspired by JRPG classics. Shoot enemies, get loot, and customize your characters. Multiple endgame systems and over 100 hours of play await you solo or up to 4-player co-op!

tc.name: 遺跡獵人：傳說
tc.short_description: 一款**俯視角射擊/掠寶 RPG，擁有感人的故事，靈感來自經典日式 RPG。射擊敵人、獲取戰利品並自訂你的角色。多種終局系統和超過 100 小時的遊戲內容**等你來挑戰，無論是單人遊玩還是與最多 4 名玩家合作！

en.name: DeadPoly
en.short_description: DeadPoly is a polygon arcade zombie survival looter shooter with base building, crafting, scavenging, leveling, questing, and more, but your only goal is survival, everything else is optional.

tc.name: DeadPoly
tc.short_description: DeadPoly is a polygon arcade zombie survival looter shooter with base building, crafting, scavenging, leveling, questing, and more, but your only goal is survival, everything else is optional.

en.name: Pid
en.short_description: You are stranded on a strange and peculiar planet. It’s time to embark on your journey and find your way home! Explore a gravity defying and challenging platformer with striking visuals and a captivating story that transports you to a world beyond ours.

tc.name: Pid
tc.short_description: You are stranded on a strange and peculiar planet. It’s time to embark on your journey and find your way home! Explore a gravity defying and challenging platformer with striking visuals and a captivating story that transports you to a world beyond ours.

en.name: Richman 11
en.short_description: Richman 11 is a casual game in Monopoly genre, it is the 11th episode of the franchise. In the game, players could select maps, characters and group play, creating free play or challenge play. Try to earn money and win the play by investing properties, using cards, etc.

tc.name: 大富翁11
tc.short_description: 《大富翁11》是強手棋類休閒遊戲，是《大富翁》系列遊戲的第十一部作品。在遊戲中，你可以任意選擇比賽地圖、參賽角色和組隊方式，創建自由比賽或者挑戰比賽，通過投資地產、使用卡片等方式賺取金錢，最終取得比賽勝利。

en.name: Cartel Tycoon
en.short_description: Cartel Tycoon is a survival business sim inspired by the ‘80s and '90s narco trade. Expand and conquer, fight off rival thugs and evade the authorities. Earn people's loyalty and strive to overcome the doomed fate of a power-hungry drug lord.

tc.name: Cartel Tycoon
tc.short_description: Cartel Tycoon is a survival business sim inspired by the ‘80s and '90s narco trade. Expand and conquer, fight off rival thugs and evade the authorities. Earn people's loyalty and strive to overcome the doomed fate of a power-hungry drug lord.

en.name: A Perfect Day
en.short_description: Revisit and repeat the final moments of China's turn of the century in this narrative puzzle adventure. Play a 6th-grade student and greet classmates, explore secrets, play mini-4WD, or just wander around town. Make your choices to create a perfect day for everyone!

tc.name: 完美的一天
tc.short_description: 不斷地回到1999年最後一天，重新面對屬於自己和那個時代的遺憾和理想。深厚的背景設定與故事網，不落俗套的敘事解謎，還有復古且有趣的小遊戲，在那《完美的一天》裏，體驗屬於妳，和他們的快樂與悲傷。

en.name: A New Beginning - Final Cut
en.short_description: A New Beginning is a cinematic adventure-thriller done graphic novel-style.

tc.name: A New Beginning - Final Cut
tc.short_description: A New Beginning is a cinematic adventure-thriller done graphic novel-style.

en.name: Shotgun Farmers
en.short_description: Shotgun Farmers is the multplayer shooter where missed shots grow guns. Fire your bullets into the ground to plant your ammo. The longer a gun plant grows the more ammo you will get!

tc.name: Shotgun Farmers
tc.short_description: 《獵槍農夫》是一款多人射擊遊戲，未命中的子彈會長成新的槍支！ 槍支植物生長的時間越長，彈藥就越多！

en.name: Terminus: Zombie Survivors
en.short_description: Terminus: Zombie Survivors is a 2D turn-based survival roguelike set during a zombie apocalypse. Each journey is unique, and every decision can mean the difference between life and death. Can you brave hunger, cold, and the undead in order to reach the Terminus and find salvation?

tc.name: 終點站：僵屍幸存者
tc.short_description: 《終點站：僵屍幸存者》是一款設定在僵屍末日背景下的2D回合制生存類roguelike遊戲。 每一次旅程都是獨一無二的，每一個决定都可能意味著生與死之間的抉擇。 你能否勇敢地面對饑餓、寒冷和僵屍，到達終點並找到救贖呢？

en.name: THE KING OF FIGHTERS XIV STEAM EDITION
en.short_description: THE KING OF FIGHTERS XIV finally hits STEAM! KOF XIV is back with its classic 2D gameplay and "3-on-3 TEAM BATTLE" game system but evolved to 3D! 58 charismatic fighters are about to clash in this new chapter of KOF!

tc.name: THE KING OF FIGHTERS XIV STEAM EDITION
tc.short_description: KOF系列最新作『THE KING OF FIGHTERS XIV』終於登陸STEAM平台！不僅繼承了系列傳統的3 on 3組隊對戰， 3D畫面煥然一新！搭載新手也能愉快體驗的新系統及充實的在線機能。系列人數最多58名角色登場的KOF全新篇章開始！

en.name: Epic Battle Fantasy 5
en.short_description: A turn-based RPG adventure, full of video game references, juvenile dialogue, and anime fanservice... and also strategic combat, monster catching, and tons of treasure hunting! Updated with tons of new content!

tc.name: Epic Battle Fantasy 5
tc.short_description: 史詩戰鬥幻想5是一款回合制RPG冒險遊戲，它內含了大量古今中外的遊戲梗，擁有大量中二對話以及二次元殺必死……還有策略型戰鬥，怪物收服，以及大量的寶物尋找！

en.name: TREE
en.short_description: TREE tells a story of a relationship between a boy and his tree. What starts off as a simple connection, over time it grows into something deeper.

tc.name: TREE
tc.short_description: TREE tells a story of a relationship between a boy and his tree. What starts off as a simple connection, over time it grows into something deeper.

en.name: Deponia Doomsday
en.short_description: Can you change Deponia's fate? Do you have what it takes to change Rufus' past, present and future without accidently destroying the whole planet? Fight time itself in this action-packed, platypus-tastic and insanely hilarious story.

tc.name: Deponia Doomsday
tc.short_description: Can you change Deponia's fate? Do you have what it takes to change Rufus' past, present and future without accidently destroying the whole planet? Fight time itself in this action-packed, platypus-tastic and insanely hilarious story.

en.name: Alan Wake's American Nightmare
en.short_description: A thrilling new storyline, hordes of creepy enemies, serious firepower and beautiful Arizona locations, combined with a fun and challenging new game mode!

tc.name: Alan Wake's American Nightmare
tc.short_description: A thrilling new storyline, hordes of creepy enemies, serious firepower and beautiful Arizona locations, combined with a fun and challenging new game mode!

en.name: Death's Gambit: Afterlife
en.short_description: Death's Gambit: Afterlife is a challenging 2D action platformer with deep RPG elements. As an agent of Death bound to his service, unravel the mystery of Siradon and discover the true price of immortality.

tc.name: Death's Gambit: Afterlife
tc.short_description: 《Death's Gambit: Afterlife》是款極具挑戰性的 2D 動作平台遊戲，融入了濃厚的角色扮演元素。玩家將化身死神的左右手，為死神效力，搞清楚 Siradon 的祕密，揭曉永生的真正代價。

en.name: OVR Advanced Settings
en.short_description: OVR Advanced Settings is a Dashboard Application for VR, that allows you to access many settings. OVRAS also has a myriad of utility features such as: simulated movement, adding smooth/snap turn to any game, video controls for the headset such as brightness, per-app bindings and much more.

tc.name: OVR Advanced Settings
tc.short_description: OVR Advanced Settings is a Dashboard Application for VR, that allows you to access many settings. OVRAS also has a myriad of utility features such as: simulated movement, adding smooth/snap turn to any game, video controls for the headset such as brightness, per-app bindings and much more.

en.name: RollerCoaster Tycoon®: Deluxe
en.short_description: One of the best games from acclaimed Tycoon series, with well designed gameplay mechanics, appealing graphics, and really high re-playability value. There’s no limit to what you can create so design and build the most thrilling roller coaster the world has ever seen!

tc.name: RollerCoaster Tycoon®: Deluxe
tc.short_description: One of the best games from acclaimed Tycoon series, with well designed gameplay mechanics, appealing graphics, and really high re-playability value. There’s no limit to what you can create so design and build the most thrilling roller coaster the world has ever seen!

en.name: Blair Witch
en.short_description: A first-person, story-driven psychological horror game based on the cinematic lore of the Blair Witch. Explore the haunted grounds of the Black Hills Forest in a harrowing investigation that forces you to confront the evil that resides deep in the woods.

tc.name: Blair Witch
tc.short_description: 一款改編自電影《厄夜叢林》的第一人稱視角劇情驅動心理恐怖遊戲。探索布萊克山叢林這片鬧鬼之地，展開令人心悸的調查，直面深藏於林間的邪惡力量。

en.name: Supraball
en.short_description: Play football in first person view and develop your own tactics and tricks. Play with up to 9 of your friends or join alone. No Pay2Win!

tc.name: Supraball
tc.short_description: 結合了足球與第一人稱視角的遊玩方式，各種不同的戰術和技巧等著你來開發！最多可以與另外9個朋友一起同樂，沒有pay2win！

en.name: F1 2014
en.short_description: Feel the power of new turbocharged FORMULA ONE™ cars in the most accessible FORMULA 1™ video game yet. Features all the cars, drivers and circuits from the 2014 FIA FORMULA ONE WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP™!

tc.name: F1 2014
tc.short_description: Feel the power of new turbocharged FORMULA ONE™ cars in the most accessible FORMULA 1™ video game yet. Features all the cars, drivers and circuits from the 2014 FIA FORMULA ONE WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP™!

en.name: Hell Girls
en.short_description: Hell Girls is a unique puzzle RPG that prioritizes match3 strategy over speed. Fight monsters with diverse characters that have unique fighting skills based on their personalities. With anime inspired artwork, each character has loads of cute and sexy outfits. Hell Girls blends addictive gameplay with immersive roleplaying and story.

tc.name: Hell Girls
tc.short_description: 這是一款“美少女＋寶石消除＋RPG”結合的遊戲。

en.name: The Bridge
en.short_description: The Bridge is a logic puzzle game that forces you to reevaluate your preconceptions of physics and perspective. It is Isaac Newton meets M. C. Escher. Manipulate gravity to redefine the ceiling as the floor while venturing through impossible architectures.

tc.name: The Bridge
tc.short_description: 謎橋是一款2D邏輯解謎遊戲，讓玩家能重新思考他們對物理和透視觀的觀念和想法，它是物理學家牛頓與錯覺藝術大師艾雪的結合。探索不合理的各種建築構造時，藉由重力的操縱來重新審視所謂的天花板與地板。探索著越來越困難且各自擁有獨特的細節與設計的世界，能讓玩家獲得發揮智力的成就感。謎橋不單只是一款遊戲，透過優美的手繪藝術和黑白的平版畫所呈現的世界，謎橋也儼然成為一種藝術的表現。主要特點 48種腦力激盪的謎題，每種都獨一無二，需要創新的解決方式 重力操縱、引力漩渦、平行空間，還有更多難以理解的概念，在這世界，物理的法則可能無法通用。 錯覺藝術大師艾雪風格的世界，乃是用美麗的黑白手繪平版畫藝術所描繪而成的不可能的建築場景。

en.name: STRAFE: Gold Edition
en.short_description: STRAFE® is the worlds bloodiest roguelike first-person shooter! Featuring mind melting secrets and persistent gore that allows you to paint levels red with the excessive entrails of your enemies. 30+ weapons, 20+ enemies, & a red hot soundtrack.

tc.name: STRAFE: Gold Edition
tc.short_description: STRAFE®是一款第一人稱射擊的Roguelike遊戲，將電腦生成的照相寫實主義和硬核科幻動作的極限推向無法想象的境界。

en.name: WE ARE FOOTBALL
en.short_description: Lead your football club through national championships and to international stardom. Take over an established men’s or women’s team of your choice as its manager or bring a small team into the big league.

tc.name: WE ARE FOOTBALL
tc.short_description: Lead your football club through national championships and to international stardom. Take over an established men’s or women’s team of your choice as its manager or bring a small team into the big league.

en.name: NiGHTS Into Dreams
en.short_description: Slip off into the dream world and go on an aerial adventure as NiGHTS in this classic Saturn remake. Collect Ideya (colored orbs), rack up points, and battle bosses to help Elliot and Claris save Nightopia from Wizeman the Wicked.

tc.name: NiGHTS Into Dreams
tc.short_description: Slip off into the dream world and go on an aerial adventure as NiGHTS in this classic Saturn remake. Collect Ideya (colored orbs), rack up points, and battle bosses to help Elliot and Claris save Nightopia from Wizeman the Wicked.

en.name: Tokyo Dark
en.short_description: Legend tells of a door deep below Tokyo's sewers. All who enter are lost forever. Detective Ito's partner is missing. Explore Tokyo & uncover the darkness that lays beneath the streets in this Point & Click - meets Visual Novel - narrative adventure that questions the very core of Ito's sanity.

tc.name: Tokyo Dark
tc.short_description: Legend tells of a door deep below Tokyo's sewers. All who enter are lost forever. Detective Ito's partner is missing. Explore Tokyo & uncover the darkness that lays beneath the streets in this Point & Click - meets Visual Novel - narrative adventure that questions the very core of Ito's sanity.

en.name: ANVIL
en.short_description: Take on the role of a Vault Breaker in search of alien artifacts called “Vaults” and fight against monsters and powerful bosses. You can strengthen your Breakers to explore far-away galaxies that no one has ever reached!

tc.name: ANVIL
tc.short_description: 您可以扮演突破者角色去尋找被稱為“金庫”的外星文物，對敵怪物和强大的頭目！也可以使用從金庫獲取的强大的遺物增强能力，與好友一同線上合作冒險，探索從未有人到達過的最遠的星系。挑戰，協同，肉鴿……這一切盡在其中。

en.name: Trover Saves the Universe
en.short_description: From Squanch Games comes Trover Saves the Universe. Your pups are missing. The cosmos is at stake. Only you and Trover can save everything in this bizarre comedy adventure!

tc.name: Trover Saves the Universe
tc.short_description: From Squanch Games comes Trover Saves the Universe. Your pups are missing. The cosmos is at stake. Only you and Trover can save everything in this bizarre comedy adventure!

en.name: Neverwinter Nights: Enhanced Edition
en.short_description: Return to the Forgotten Realms in this bestselling Dungeons & Dragons roleplaying game. Combines all the content of Neverwinter Nights Diamond Edition with all-new enhanced features. Includes 100+ hours of award-winning adventures and the tools to create your own!

tc.name: Neverwinter Nights: Enhanced Edition
tc.short_description: Return to the Forgotten Realms in this bestselling Dungeons & Dragons roleplaying game. Combines all the content of Neverwinter Nights Diamond Edition with all-new enhanced features. Includes 100+ hours of award-winning adventures and the tools to create your own!

en.name: F1® 25
en.short_description: Leave your mark on the world of racing in F1® 25, the official video game of the 2025 FIA Formula One World Championship™, featuring a revamped My Team mode, the thrilling third chapter of Braking Point, and more!

tc.name: F1® 25
tc.short_description: 透過 2025 FIA Formula One World Championship™ 的官方遊戲《F1® 25》，在賽車界留下你的印記，其中包含全面翻新的「我的車隊」模式、驚心動魄的「剎車點」第三章等豐富內容！

en.name: Dungeon Alchemist
en.short_description: Dungeon Alchemist is mapmaking software for tabletop RPG's that enables you to make amazing, high-quality maps in seconds!

tc.name: Dungeon Alchemist
tc.short_description: Dungeon Alchemist is mapmaking software for tabletop RPG's that enables you to make amazing, high-quality maps in seconds!

en.name: STRIDE
en.short_description: STRIDE is a high-octane parkour adventure in virtual reality. Fight for your life as you hurtle through the rooftops of a futuristic metropolis. Step into the shoes of a master freerunner as you vault, swing, and shoot your way through this action-packed adventure. Multiplayer now available!

tc.name: STRIDE
tc.short_description: 《STRIDE》是一款活力四射的虛擬實境跑酷冒險遊戲。在未來都市的屋頂上跨越重重關卡，絕地求生。化身自由跑大師進行跳躍、擺盪、翻滾及射擊，在這場激烈又緊張刺激的冒險旅程中過關斬將。多人游戏现在可用!

en.name: Zombie Driver HD
en.short_description: Insane mix of cars, speed, explosions, blood and zombies! Fight through an epic narrative campaign or test yourself in the Slaughter and Blood Race modes.

tc.name: Zombie Driver HD
tc.short_description: Insane mix of cars, speed, explosions, blood and zombies! Fight through an epic narrative campaign or test yourself in the Slaughter and Blood Race modes.

en.name: Fairy Fencer F
en.short_description: Long ago, the Vile God and the Goddess waged war with each other. Equally matched, they were sealed away in another world… Now a lazy young man named Fang somehow finds himself a key part of this war he’d really rather not deal with, but fate beckons in this uncommon RPG!

tc.name: Fairy Fencer F
tc.short_description: Long ago, the Vile God and the Goddess waged war with each other. Equally matched, they were sealed away in another world… Now a lazy young man named Fang somehow finds himself a key part of this war he’d really rather not deal with, but fate beckons in this uncommon RPG!

en.name: Cubic Odyssey
en.short_description: Embark on a galactic journey in Cubic Odyssey, an open-world adventure where you explore vibrant planets, craft tools, build vehicles, and fight the Red Darkness. Uncover ancient mysteries, and shape a universe full of life, danger, and limitless possibilities!

tc.name: Cubic Odyssey
tc.short_description: 在《Cubic Odyssey》展開一段銀河之旅，踏上一場開放世界冒險，探索生機勃勃的星球、製作工具、打造載具，並對抗猩紅之災。揭開古老的謎團，創造一個充滿各種生命、危險和無窮可能的宇宙！

en.name: Ticy Adventure Club
en.short_description: 本作是2d剧情向角色扮演恐怖游戏。在本作设定中，玩家将扮演灵异探险社的社员，分工调查被委托的事件，探索场景，寻找线索，并最终解决委托中灵异作祟的问题。

tc.name: 提西探險社
tc.short_description: 本作是2D劇情向角色扮演恐怖遊戲。在本作設定中，玩家將扮演靈異探險社的社員，分工調查被委託的事件，探索場景，尋找線索，並最終解決委託中靈異作祟的問題。

en.name: Curious Expedition 2
en.short_description: Curious Expedition 2 is a turn-based narrative roguelike set in a reimagined version of the late 19th century that uses procedural gameplay and story elements to create completely unique and epic adventures every time you play.

tc.name: Curious Expedition 2
tc.short_description: 《奇妙探險隊2》是一款以空想的19世紀晚期為劇情背景的回合制roguelike敘事遊戲，將隨機生成的世界與引人入勝的劇情元素巧妙結合，讓你每次遊玩時都能獲得獨一無二的史詩級冒險體驗。

en.name: Metel - Horror Escape
en.short_description: Metel - Horror Escape is a first-person 3D game in the quest, horror genre. Welcome to the home of an insane maniac hungry for new blood and suffering! You are a victim in his hands. Be careful trying to find a way out. The maniac should not notice your escape attempt.

tc.name: Metel - Horror Escape
tc.short_description: Metel - Horror Escape is a first-person 3D game in the quest, horror genre. Welcome to the home of an insane maniac hungry for new blood and suffering! You are a victim in his hands. Be careful trying to find a way out. The maniac should not notice your escape attempt.

en.name: Steel Division: Normandy 44
en.short_description: Steel Division: Normandy is a tactical real-time strategy (RTS) game that pits players against AI enemies in a single-player campaign -- or against several opponents in massive 10-on-10 multiplayer battles.

tc.name: Steel Division: Normandy 44
tc.short_description: Steel Division: Normandy is a tactical real-time strategy (RTS) game that pits players against AI enemies in a single-player campaign -- or against several opponents in massive 10-on-10 multiplayer battles.

en.name: Legendary Tales
en.short_description: Legendary tales is a VR Action roleplaying game with up to 4 player co-op. Collect items, enhance your abilities and fight your way through an ever changing dungeon to make your own Legendary Tales.

tc.name: Legendary Tales

tc.name: Misao - 2024 HD Remaster
tc.short_description: 本作的故事圍繞失蹤的少女“操”所展開，是一款在怪異肆虐的校園進行探索的恐怖冒險遊戲。相較於2017年發售的《Definitive Edition》，遊戲畫面得到了重製級別的升級，並已支援HD畫質。讓您能夠更加身臨其境地品味這場恐怖體驗。

tc.name: You Have 10 Seconds

en.name: Observation
en.short_description: Observation is a sci-fi thriller uncovering what happened to Dr. Emma Fisher, and the crew of her mission, through the lens of the station’s artificial intelligence S.A.M.

tc.name: Observation
tc.short_description: 《觀測號》是一部科幻驚悚遊戲，透過在空間站內的AI-山姆的視角，帶領玩家發掘艾瑪·費雪博士以及她的船員們在一次任務中到底遭遇了什麼。

en.name: Super Neptunia RPG
en.short_description: Neptune, stricken with amnesia, awakes in a mysterious world where 2D reigns supreme. With a little help from her friends, Neptune embark on a journey to regain her memory, save the world, and 3D games as we know it.

tc.name: 勇者戰機少女
tc.short_description: 自稱勇者與其快樂的夥伴們奔行於世界中！ 2D遊戲——以點陣圖與插圖構建的平面遊戲。 在為數眾多的次元之中，存在著一個以2D遊戲為主體的游汐葉界。 這裡由一個崇拜2D遊戲的組織所主宰，它被稱為舊世蠶黨。 在這個世界中，人們製作2D遊戲，並將遊戲卡匣作為繳納的稅款。 據傳，製作出劣質遊戲或使用最新技術製作遊戲的人將被送往試煉場，在那裡其精神會遭到摧毀。在這個連未來都無從談起的游汐葉界中，一位失去記憶的少女從睡夢中醒來。 一無所知的少女依照舊世蠶黨的命令前往附近的城鎮，卻遇到了怪物攔路。 少女以撿來的檜木棒為武器迎戰，最終大獲全勝。 於是，她確信了一點。自己是一名勇者，且正是這款遊戲的主角「妮普禔努」。

en.name: Blackguards
en.short_description: What happens when the only hope of a threatened world lies not with heroes in shining armor, but in the hands of a band of misfits and criminals? Blackguards, a new turn-based strategy RPG, explores this very question. You will discover over 180 unique hex-based battlegrounds within a dark and mature story of crime, drugs, and murder.

tc.name: Blackguards
tc.short_description: What happens when the only hope of a threatened world lies not with heroes in shining armor, but in the hands of a band of misfits and criminals? tc.name: Heat

tc.name: Vanquish

Play by yourself, meet someone new, or challenge your friends in a private game with up to 8 people. Extremely realistic physics create the perfect experience for hardcore golfers and casual players alike.

tc.name: Walkabout Mini Golf VR
tc.short_description: Escape into a fun and beautiful world filled with the best mini golf courses you’ve ever seen! Play by yourself, meet someone new, or challenge your friends in a private game with up to 8 people. Extremely realistic physics create the perfect experience for hardcore golfers and casual players alike.

en.name: Super Jigsaw Puzzle: Generations
en.short_description: If you like to make puzzles, Super Jigsaw Puzzle is your game. Enjoy its comfortable and intuitive interface and its relaxing music that will allow you to concentrate on the difficult task of solving these beautiful photos that pose a real challenge for lovers of puzzles.

tc.name: Super Jigsaw Puzzle: Generations
tc.short_description: 如果你喜歡玩拼圖， Super Jigsaw Puzzle: Generations 就是為你打造的遊戲。 在享受舒適直觀的介面和輕鬆的音樂的同時進行拼圖，讓你專注於艱巨的任務——解開這些美麗的圖像，它們對拼圖愛好者來說堪稱真正的挑戰。

en.name: NARUTO SHIPPUDEN: Ultimate Ninja STORM Revolution
en.short_description: THE REVOLUTIONARY STORM SERIES RETURNS! Live a new experience in the deep & rich NARUTO environment. Tons of new techniques, enhanced mechanics, over 100 playable characters & Support Ninjas, and a brand new exclusive character (Mecha-Naruto) designed by Masashi Kishimoto.

tc.name: NARUTO SHIPPUDEN: Ultimate Ninja STORM Revolution
tc.short_description: THE REVOLUTIONARY STORM SERIES RETURNS! Live a new experience in the deep & rich NARUTO environment. Tons of new techniques, enhanced mechanics, over 100 playable characters & Support Ninjas, and a brand new exclusive character (Mecha-Naruto) designed by Masashi Kishimoto.

en.name: Drift Streets Japan
en.short_description: Racing Game about Illegal Night Street Racing. Nice Cars and Advanced Engine Tuning. Most Realistic and Best Physics. Most Quality Graphics. Drive the Large Japan Highway with traffic. Feel the Real experience, try to drift with car cockpit camera.

tc.name: Drift Streets Japan
tc.short_description: Racing Game about Illegal Night Street Racing. Nice Cars and Advanced Engine Tuning. Most Realistic and Best Physics. Most Quality Graphics. Drive the Large Japan Highway with traffic. Feel the Real experience, try to drift with car cockpit camera.

en.name: Wonder Boy: The Dragon's Trap
en.short_description: Boasting beautiful, hand-drawn animations and a re-orchestrated soundtrack, the cult classic returns with a unique blend of exploration, action, and adventure!

tc.name: Wonder Boy: The Dragon's Trap
tc.short_description: 驚豔絕倫的手繪動畫，精心重錄的遊戲配樂。這款別出心裁，將探索、動作和冒險要素融為一體的經典老遊戲煥發新生，再次歸來！

en.name: TopSpin 2K25
en.short_description: TopSpin 2K25 returns as a next-level tennis sim, bringing realistic court physics and challenging skill-based gameplay. Play single or multiplayer locally or online. Build your MyPLAYER or play as icons like Roger Federer and Serena Williams with custom animations mirroring their real-life styles.

tc.name: 《職業網球大聯盟2K25》
tc.short_description: 《職業網球大聯盟2K25》是重出江湖、全面進化的網球模擬遊戲，帶來逼真無比的球場物理機制，以及強調技巧且具挑戰性的遊戲玩法，支援本機或連線進行單人或多人遊戲。打造你獨一無二的MyPLAYER，或化身Roger Federer及Serena Williams等知名球星，這些球星皆有特別製作的動畫來反映他們的真實球風。

en.name: Gunsmith Simulator: Prologue
en.short_description: Enter the world of gunsmithing and become a real expert in making, repairing and modifying weapons in Gunsmith Simulator: Prologue. Open your workshop, be creative and excel at gunsmithing!

tc.name: 槍匠模擬器：序章
tc.short_description: 《槍匠模擬器：序章》帶你進入槍械製造的世界，成為製造、修理和改裝武器的地道專家。開啟加工車間，充分發揮創造力，熟練槍械製造！

en.name: Evil Dead: The Game
en.short_description: Step into the shoes of Ash Williams or his friends from the iconic Evil Dead franchise in a game loaded with over-the-top co-op & PVP multiplayer action! Play as a team of 4 survivors in a game inspired by all 3 original Evil Dead films as well as the Ash vs Evil Dead television series.

tc.name: Evil Dead: The Game
tc.short_description: 扮演廣受歡迎的《鬼玩人》系列中的安旭 威廉姆斯或他的朋友，在遊戲中緊密合作，共同體驗精彩紛呈的合作模式和PVP多人行動！

en.name: Tape to Tape
en.short_description: Tape to Tape is a roguelite hockey game where every choice matters on your journey to build the best hockey team. Choose your path, hire unique players, discover synergies between them, pick unique abilities, bribe the referees or visit the Blademaster on your way to restore hockey's former glory.

tc.name: Tape to Tape
tc.short_description: Tape to Tape is a roguelite hockey game where every choice matters on your journey to build the best hockey team. Choose your path, hire unique players, discover synergies between them, pick unique abilities, bribe the referees or visit the Blademaster on your way to restore hockey's former glory.

en.name: Sakura Dungeon
en.short_description: You are Yomi, an ancient fox spirit. Your dungeon has been stolen from you while you have been sealed away in a deep sleep. Capture monster girls, collect loot, explore the dungeon's depths and reclaim what is yours in this first-person RPG dungeon crawler.

tc.name: Sakura Dungeon

en.short_description: Adapted from the bestselling children’s book series Pierre The Maze Detective, play as Pierre in this adventure/puzzle game and recover the stolen Maze Stone. Journey through breathtakingly hand-drawn illustrations, meet eccentric characters, and solve puzzles to save Opera City!

tc.name: 迷宮大偵探

en.name: Rise of Industry
en.short_description: Put your entrepreneurial skills to the test in the first title in the ROI series as you create & optimise intricate production lines. As an early 20th-Century industrialist, grow your empire & adapt to an ever-changing business landscape with unexpected events that could lead to boom…or bust.

As an early 20th-Century industrialist, grow your empire & adapt to an ever-changing business landscape with unexpected events that could lead to boom…or bust.

en.name: Piratopia
en.short_description: Set sail in the open seas and plunder solo, PvE or PvP. Trade goods for ship upgrades or equipments to hunt the Kraken, all in the same Server. Dominate by yourself or with maties. Arrrr for free!

tc.name: Piratopia

en.short_description: Program and optimize a drone to automate a farm and watch it do the work for you. Collect resources to unlock better technology and become the most efficient farmer in the world. Improve your problem solving and coding skills.

tc.name: The Farmer Was Replaced
tc.short_description: 編寫並優化無人機來自動化經營農場，觀看它為你完成所有工作。收集資源以解鎖更先進的技術，成為世界上最高效率的農夫。提升你的問題解決能力與程式設計技巧。

en.name: Recettear: An Item Shop's Tale
en.short_description: Recettear is the story of an item shop, the girl who lives in it, and the fairy who turned her life upside down. Recette Lemongrass finds herself in charge of an item shop built into her house, in order to pay back a loan her father took and then skipped out on - and Tear, her newfound fairy "companion", won't take no for an answer!

After the 2022 crypto-crash caused by NFT's, the majority of nations collapsed and a union of "No-Clowns" was formed. You are one of them, arm up and get ready for war.

en.name: KAMI
en.short_description: KAMI is deceptively simple: fold out coloured paper to fill the screen in as few moves as possible. Relaxing and easy to pick up, you'll soon find yourself deep in contemplation to perfect each puzzle. Created by State of Play, famous for their handcrafted aesthetic, KAMI has been created with real paper in an elegant Japanese theme.

tc.name: 浣幣模擬器
tc.short_description: 清點、去漬、分揀、裝箱——直接跳進鈔票池裡洗澡！在金錢樂園成為掌控一切的鈔票大師，上手就是把一疊疊錢洗乾淨，數字和厚度同步飆升。把桌面、腳邊、四周全部堆滿，機器轉個不停，鈔票越翻越多，最後堆成現金山——一切都由你掌控！這就是世界上最爽的工作！

en.short_description: Two lovers gave up everything and escaped to a lost planet to be together. Glide through a mysterious landscape, explore a fragmented world and fight against what’s trying to tear them apart in this RPG adventure about love, rebellion, and freedom.

tc.short_description: Rock of Ages 3: Make & Break 是劃時代創意大作，結合了對戰型塔防、大型機台動作遊戲元素，以及 ACE Team 的超現實 Monty Python-esque 幽默感。

en.name: Punch Club 2: Fast Forward
en.short_description: Train, fight, and rise to the top in this knockout sequel to the smashing fighter management simulator! Mentor your fighter and guide him to become the ultimate champion: choose from different combat styles, control his routine, and watch him kick some butt like a proud sensei!

tc.name: Punch Club 2: Fast Forward
tc.short_description: Train, fight, and rise to the top in this knockout sequel to the smashing fighter management simulator! Mentor your fighter and guide him to become the ultimate champion: choose from different combat styles, control his routine, and watch him kick some butt like a proud sensei!

en.name: DEAD RISING®
en.short_description: You are Frank West. A hard-edged photojournalist hellbent on investigating the mystery at Willamette Mall. It's swarming with zombies. You have 72 hours. Chop 'till you drop!

tc.name: DEAD RISING®
tc.short_description: 身為一名自由新聞攝影師，Frank West一直在尋找一次爆紅的機會，根據了一次可靠的重大線報他來到了一個小鎮，卻發現全鎮都被殭屍佔領了！

en.name: Your Turn To Die -Death Game By Majority-
en.short_description: Your Turn To Die -Death Game By Majority- is a multi-ending horror adventure game. Sara Chidouin returns home from school late one night to discover that something's gone terribly wrong. When she comes to, she finds herself, her friend Joe, and 9 other people trapped in a mysterious place.

tc.name: Your Turn To Die -Death Game By Majority-

en.name: Homicipher
en.short_description: Homicipher is a language deciphering and exploration ADV based on the concept of "romance with horror men." The protagonist, who has wandered into another world, interacts with non-human beings to decipher their language while striving to escape.

tc.name: 文字化化：Homicipher
tc.short_description: 以「與恐怖男孩的戀愛」為概念製作的語言解讀×探索ADV。迷失在異界的主角與非人類交流，解讀語言，努力尋找逃脫之路。

en.name: X-COM: UFO Defense
en.short_description: You are in control of X-COM: an organization formed by the world's governments to fight the ever-increasing alien menace.

tc.name: X-COM: UFO Defense
tc.short_description: You are in control of X-COM: an organization formed by the world's governments to fight the ever-increasing alien menace.

en.name: Party Panic
en.short_description: Party Panic is an online and local-multiplayer party game. Compete against your friends in the all new board game, play 30+ rapid fire minigames, race through the brutal Gauntlet, or complete the challenges on Trophy Island. There is even a built in drinking game! You'll laugh, you'll cry, it's stupid.

tc.name: Party Panic

Compete against your friends in the all new board game, play 30+ rapid fire minigames, race through the brutal Gauntlet, or complete the challenges on Trophy Island. en.name: The Anacrusis
en.short_description: Battle for survival against endless alien hordes with your friends! The Anacrusis is a first-person shooter that dynamically adjusts difficulty to you. Experience intense 1-4 player co-op action or play as the aliens and stop your friends in 1-8 player Versus mode. Full Steam Workshop support!

tc.name: The Anacrusis
tc.short_description: The Anacrusis 是個四人玩家，合作，和第一人稱的射擊游戲，位於已被探索的宇宙邊境的一座巨大宇宙飛船上。與你的朋友們合作在無限可重玩的戰鬥中對抗一群外星人來解鎖技能，武器，還有更多可以與團隊分享的游戲方法！

en.name: Thank Goodness You're Here!
en.short_description: Thank Goodness You're Here! is an absurd comedy slapformer set in the bizarre Northern English town of Barnsworth. As a traveling salesman, take the time to see the sights and meet the locals, who are very eager to give you a series of increasingly odd jobs…

tc.name: Thank Goodness You're Here!
tc.short_description: 《Thank Goodness You're Here!》的場景設定在北英格蘭小鎮巴恩茲沃，這是個奇怪的荒誕搞笑鬧劇遊戲。玩家將扮演一名四處旅行的推銷員，在遊戲中到處閒晃並與當地居民交流。而這些居民似乎非常喜歡叫你去做一拖拉庫越來越奇怪的雜事…

en.name: BRINK
en.short_description: You decide the combat role you want to assume in the world of Brink as you fight to save yourself and mankind’s last refuge!

tc.name: BRINK
tc.short_description: You decide the combat role you want to assume in the world of Brink as you fight to save yourself and mankind’s last refuge!

en.name: Puzzle Pirates
en.short_description: Every activity in Puzzle Pirates is a uniquely fun puzzle: be it sailing, gunning, or hauling treasure, your own puzzling skill determines your success!

tc.name: Puzzle Pirates
tc.short_description: Every activity in Puzzle Pirates is a uniquely fun puzzle: be it sailing, gunning, or hauling treasure, your own puzzling skill determines your success!

en.name: Our Adventurer Guild
en.short_description: Become the new Guild Master of the Adventurer Guild and lead your adventurers in explorations and turnbased tactical battles. Will the Guild thrive under your leadership? Or will it finally disband under it?

tc.name: Our Adventurer Guild
tc.short_description: Become the new Guild Master of the Adventurer Guild and lead your adventurers in explorations and turnbased tactical battles. Will the Guild thrive under your leadership? Or will it finally disband under it?

en.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
en.short_description: With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new...

tc.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
tc.short_description: Sid Meier 的 Civilization (文明帝國) 系列在全球已售出逾六百萬套，並獲各地支持者與媒體好評，被視為是史上最經典的電腦遊戲系列之一。 現在，Sid Meier 與 Firaxis Games 更把這一款引人入迷的有趣遊戲帶往另一高峰，加入新的遊戲方式，新的勝敗條件，新的工具來管理擴張您的文明，並用全新的方法，讓自訂遊戲更簡單，多人模式更有趣，選項更多。 Civilization IV 有細緻的畫面，彷彿活著的 3D 世界，把遊戲體驗提升至全新的境界。 Civilization IV 已受玩家讚為 2005 年十大遊戲，是全球玩家都一定要擁有的遊戲！

en.name: Hustle Cat
en.short_description: You are Avery Grey, the newest employee at a popular cat cafe called A Cat's Paw. The coffee's good and the staff is friendly (and kinda cute!) but mysterious. One day, you find a strange book in the basement, with letters you can't quite read...

tc.name: Hustle Cat

en.name: Volgarr the Viking
en.short_description: Return to the Golden Age of arcades with a hardcore action platformer that pulls no punches! Possesses all the hallmarks of true classics like Super Ghouls 'N Ghosts (SNES), Rastan Saga (Arcade), Castlevania (NES) and more with precise controls, high challenge, and meticulous design.

en.name: Rise to Ruins
en.short_description: A brutal godlike village sim that melds the god game, management, and tower defense genres! Fight off hoards of monsters at night, and expand your village in the day time. Inspired by games like Black and White, Rimworld, and Dwarf Fortress but not quite like any of them.

tc.name: Rise to Ruins

en.name: Gedonia
en.short_description: Gedonia is a classic open world rpg, featuring a complete freedom of building your character, exploring a huge world and completing quests.

tc.name: Gedonia
tc.short_description: Gedonia is a classic open world rpg, featuring a complete freedom of building your character, exploring a huge world and completing quests.

en.name: Overture
en.short_description: Overture is an action-adventure roguelike which draws heavy inspiration from hits such as Diablo, Realm of The Mad God, Zelda, and The Binding of Isaac. Explore vast randomly generated dungeons and slay hordes of cunning enemies!

tc.name: Overture

en.name: Miasmata
en.short_description: Miasmata is a first-person survival/adventure game, developed from the ground-up by brothers Joe and Bob Johnson. You play as Robert Hughes, a plague-stricken scientist on a journey to discover a cure. Your adventure begins on the shores of a remote and mysterious island.

tc.name: Miasmata
tc.short_description: Miasmata is a first-person survival/adventure game, developed from the ground-up by brothers Joe and Bob Johnson. You play as Robert Hughes, a plague-stricken scientist on a journey to discover a cure. Your adventure begins on the shores of a remote and mysterious island.

en.name: Lacuna – A Sci-Fi Noir Adventure
en.short_description: A murder. A hack. A bombing. All it takes to plunge the solar system into war – unless you do something about it. Help CDI agent Neil Conrad make a string of increasingly difficult decisions in this modern dialog-driven adventure set in a gorgeous 2D sci-fi noir universe.

tc.name: Lacuna – A Sci-Fi Noir Adventure
tc.short_description: 殺人放火。網路入侵。投放炸彈。整個太陽系正在被不擇手段地拖入戰亂——只有你能阻止這場陰謀。向駐國防情報中心的探員尼爾·康納德伸出援手，幫他做出一系列愈加嚴苛的抉擇吧。這是一款由對話驅動的現代化冒險解謎遊戲，以美輪美奐的2D畫面，為你呈現善惡難辨，光怪陸離的科幻宇宙。

en.name: Stars End
en.short_description: Stars End is a sci-fi survival sandbox set on the wild frontier of a distant star system. Play solo or host your own server as you craft, build, and battle to survive in a galaxy shaped by danger, discovery, and your own grit.

tc.name: Stars End
tc.short_description: Stars End is a sci-fi survival sandbox set on the wild frontier of a distant star system. Play solo or host your own server as you craft, build, and battle to survive in a galaxy shaped by danger, discovery, and your own grit.

en.name: GRIME
en.short_description: Destroy... Absorb... Grow... GRIME is a fast and unforgiving Action-Adventure RPG in which you crush your foes with living weapons that mutate form and function, and then consume their remains with a black hole to strengthen your vessel as you break apart a world of anatomical horror and intrigue.

tc.name: GRIME
tc.short_description: 毀滅……吞噬……成長……《GRIME》是一款快速無情的動作冒險RPG，用形狀與功能會突變的活武器大敗敵人，然後用黑洞吞噬遺骸，讓你變得更強大，幫助你在這個充滿肢解駭事與陰謀的世界中殺出重圍。

en.name: Commandos: Behind Enemy Lines
en.short_description: Commandos: Behind Enemy Lines is a real-time tactics game set in World War II that puts you in command of a small squad of elite troopers. Send them behind enemy lines on a series of hazardous missions, and bring them back alive.

tc.name: Commandos: Behind Enemy Lines
tc.short_description: Commandos: Behind Enemy Lines is a real-time tactics game set in World War II that puts you in command of a small squad of elite troopers. Send them behind enemy lines on a series of hazardous missions, and bring them back alive.

en.name: BirdGut
en.short_description: BirdGut is a hand-drawn 2d puzzle-platformer from the perspective of an outcast bee who gets eaten by a bird, and discovers that the bird's internal organs are not organs at all, but facilities in which the consumed insects are brainwashed and enslaved. Experience this bizarre one-man project for yourself.

tc.name: BirdGut

Experience this bizarre one-man project for yourself.

en.name: Toybox Turbos
en.short_description: Codemasters reboots the classic table top racing experience in Toybox Turbos! Collect & customise 35 vehicles, take on 18 crazy tracks & send your rivals into a spin with awesome power-ups, including mines, machine guns & giant car-mounted hammers!

tc.name: Toybox Turbos
tc.short_description: Codemasters 在Toybox Turbos中再次啟動經典的桌面競速體驗。收集并個性化35輛賽車，挑戰18條瘋狂賽道，用超贊的提升包（包括地雷、機槍和巨型車頂錘）把你的對手整得暈頭轉向！在單人遊戲中掌握6種模式，擊敗傳說中的老怪，或者挑戰4人單機或在綫多玩家模式，隨時準備，再來一局！

en.name: Equilinox
en.short_description: Equilinox is a relaxing nature simulation game in which you can create and nurture your own ecosystems. Shape the world to your liking, cultivate and raise hundreds of different species, and evolve your wildlife to unlock more exotic plants and animals.

tc.name: Equilinox
tc.short_description: Equilinox is a relaxing nature simulation game in which you can create and nurture your own ecosystems. Shape the world to your liking, cultivate and raise hundreds of different species, and evolve your wildlife to unlock more exotic plants and animals.

en.name: Golfing Over It with Alva Majo
en.short_description: The higher you climb, the bigger the fall.

tc.name: Golfing Over It with Alva Majo
tc.short_description: The higher you climb, the bigger the fall.

en.name: SONG OF HORROR COMPLETE EDITION
en.short_description: A 3rd person, fixed-camera survival horror adventure. Fear the Presence, a mysterious entity you cannot fight: stay alert, hide, breathe slowly... Explore cursed places where unseen spirits and lost souls linger in a true horror story for the ages.

tc.name: SONG OF HORROR COMPLETE EDITION
tc.short_description: 《Song of Horror》是一款第三人称、固定视角的生存类恐怖冒险游戏。畏惧一个无法抗拒的神秘实体 -“存在”：保持警惕、隐藏、慢慢呼吸…探索和调查这些鬼怪出没的地方，收集线索和物品，帮助你解决具有挑战性的谜题，同时忍受游戏气氛中的惊心动魄。

en.name: Arise: A Simple Story
en.short_description: Embark on an emotional journey of losing the love of one's life. Manipulate time, solve puzzles, reshape surroundings as you push forward into the bittersweet recollections of a past life. This is a story about happiness and hardship, joy and sorrow. A story that all of us will one day experience.

tc.name: Arise: A Simple Story
tc.short_description: 踏上感傷的旅程，體驗失去心中所愛的失落。你將操縱時間，重塑環境，親歷一段段苦樂參半的回憶。這是一個關於快樂與苦難、喜悅與悲哀的故事，終有一天也將在你我身上重演。

en.name: Crusaders of the Lost Idols
en.short_description: Crusaders of the Lost Idols is an idle game of heroic awesomeness! Create a band of fighters to fight monsters, earn gold and create strategies for the perfect formations over multiple campaigns! Upgrade your heroes, collect unique gear, and unlock new Crusaders in regular new events.

tc.name: Crusaders of the Lost Idols
tc.short_description: Crusaders of the Lost Idols is an idle game of heroic awesomeness! Create a band of fighters to fight monsters, earn gold and create strategies for the perfect formations over multiple campaigns! Upgrade your heroes, collect unique gear, and unlock new Crusaders in regular new events.

en.name: PLANET ALPHA
en.short_description: PLANET ALPHA, a beautiful alien world filled with mystery and danger. Pursued by relentless enemies, you must harness the power of night and day as you struggle to survive.

tc.name: PLANET ALPHA
tc.short_description: PLANET ALPHA, a beautiful alien world filled with mystery and danger. Pursued by relentless enemies, you must harness the power of night and day as you struggle to survive.

en.name: FaceRig
en.short_description: FaceRig was a program that aimd to enable anyone with a webcam to digitally embody awesome characters. The output could be recorded as a movie or streamed to Skype, Twitch, Hangouts or any service that traditionally uses a webcam in real time.

tc.name: FaceRig
tc.short_description: FaceRig是一个可以使任何带网络摄像头的人都能数字化表达自己惊人形象的程序。这意味着，他是一个开放的创造平台，可以使任何人都能制作属于自己的形象，背景或道具，并将其导入到FaceRig中。

en.name: DUCKSIDE
en.short_description: Imagine DayZ or Rust but you're a duck. A persistent world survival game with PVP, PVE, crafting, base building and hat wearing ducks, wielding weapons.

tc.name: DUCKSIDE
tc.short_description: 《鴨界生存》是結合《DayZ》和《Rust》元素的遊戲，你將以鴨子身份在持續性世界中求生。遊戲包括PVP、PVE、製作、建造基地，以及裝扮帽子、手持武器的鴨子。

en.name: No Case Should Remain Unsolved
en.short_description: Twelve years after Senior Inspector Jeon Gyeong's retirement, she is visited by a young police officer: a woman who pleads with her to reexamine Seowon's case. But with each uncovered memory, only one thing becomes clear: everyone in Seowon's vicinity was lying.

tc.name: 塵埃終須落定
tc.short_description: 在全璟警官退休12年後的某一天，一位年輕的員警找到她，請求她協助自己結束這件尚未偵破的「犀源失蹤案」。全璟回想著過去，試圖將散落的記憶碎片重新拼湊起來，然而，浮出的真相卻只有一個——那就是犀源身邊的每一個人都在說謊。

en.name: Boomerang X
en.short_description: Harness the power of a mystical boomerang to fling yourself through the air in this acrobatic arena shooter. Slice, fly, and blast through swarms of evil creatures on an abandoned island with a cryptic past. Stay agile or meet your doom.

tc.name: Boomerang X
tc.short_description: 駕馭神奇迴旋鏢的力量穿梭於空中。切割、翻飛、炸射，闖過邪惡生物源源不斷的競技場。隨時保持敏捷，不然就是你的末日！

en.name: SimAirport
en.short_description: Build & Manage Your Airport. An International Hub or a Regional Masterpiece -- it's up to you. Buy more land to scale out, or escalators to scale up with MULTIPLE FLOORS. You're in full control in this modern business management tycoon!

tc.name: SimAirport

en.name: Ancestors Legacy
en.short_description: Ancestors Legacy is a squad-based real time strategy with a strong focus on tactics. Inspired by medieval European history, it brings to life four different nations and their conflicts, usually solved by war.

tc.name: Ancestors Legacy

en.name: GUNS UP!
en.short_description: GUNS UP! is a free-to-play side-scrolling strategy game that pits players against each other in a battle to destroy enemy bases to increase their own army’s strength. GUNS UP! combines the fun of enemy base invasion with tower–defense, for an experience like no other!

tc.name: GUNS UP!
tc.short_description: GUNS UP! 是款基本免費的橫向捲軸戰略遊戲，玩家可在戰場上彼此奮戰，藉由摧毀敵方基地以加強我方軍力。GUNS UP! 結合了入侵敵方基地與防禦塔城的樂趣，請快來體驗前所未有的攻防激戰！

en.name: Crashday Redline Edition

Retooled and remastered, Crashday: Redline Edition brings back the fun and memories of the original with this lovingly crafted tribute edition, featuring all-new and expanded features, including Steam Workshop support. Today is Crashday!

en.name: Cureocity
en.short_description: “People think battles need powerful weapons, but strategy at hand is key."The story follows a rookie adventurer and a new healer in a dungeon quest, with the core gameplay involving hand-picked methods using weapons and items. Fight or purify? Heal or alter? The choice is in your hands.

en.name: Drift86

en.name: UNDYING - "KINGDOM"
en.short_description: As Anling’s zombie infection sets in, her days are numbered. The struggle to survive is made ever more paramount as she must ensure her son Cody stays alive. She must teach him how to survive in this new world at any cost…

tc.name: UNDYING - "KINGDOM"

en.name: Colony Survival
en.short_description: Colony Survival is a unique first-person strategy game developed by a two-man team. Build your own colony in a voxel world. Command guards, farmers, miners and other colonists. Defend your colony against the horde of monsters that attacks every night!

tc.name: Colony Survival
tc.short_description: Colony Survival is a unique first-person strategy game developed by a two-man team. Build your own colony in a voxel world. Command guards, farmers, miners and other colonists. Defend your colony against the horde of monsters that attacks every night!

tc.name: Trombone Champ
tc.short_description: Honk, blow, & toot your way through over 60 songs, collect all 50 unique Tromboner Cards, and uncover the mysteries of the Trombiverse. Do you have what it takes to become the true Trombone Champ?

Play solo or with friends in a brutal post-apocalyptic sandbox where survival is earned through smart decisions. How many Nights will you survive?

tc.short_description: Hardcore open-world survival where preparation is everything. Scavenge, craft, fortify during the day. When night falls, the infected hunt in numbers. Play solo or with friends in a brutal post-apocalyptic sandbox where survival is earned through smart decisions. How many Nights will you survive?

You are a young commander venturing out into enemy territories, to unknown galaxies, never knowing what you will face as you jump out from hyperspace.

en.name: Ballads of Hongye: REBORN
en.short_description: 《东方：平野孤鸿》是一款休闲、轻度的“国风造景”游戏。游戏中包含大量细节精美的国风建筑，还原了许多祖国的大好河山和人文景观，你将沉浸在古建筑的精致美学和壮阔的东方情怀之中，并由此打造出自己心中独一无二的、充满东方韵味的古代盛世。

Galbadia, a Global Superpower, has declared war on Dollet, a country whose training academy is home to two personalities: the hot-headed Seifer and the 'lone wolf', Squall Leonhart. Both are equally at conflict with each other as their country is with Galbadia; to others, Squall appears lacking in team spirit, while...

en.name: The Wandering Village
en.short_description: The Wandering Village is a city-building simulation game on the back of a giant, wandering creature. Build your settlement and form a symbiotic relationship with the colossus. Will you survive together in this hostile, yet beautiful post-apocalyptic world, contaminated by poisonous plants?

tc.name: The Wandering Village

en.name: 私のリアルは充実しすぎている フルボイス版

en.short_description: Set 10 years after the original, Stronghold 3: Gold follows the vengeful story of The Wolf in the third installment of the award-winning castle building series. The Wolf has cheated death become even more bitter and twisted. Build castles, rally your troops and save medieval England!

en.name: Settlement Survival
en.short_description: In this city-building game, you will lead a group of survivors in their search for a new home. Manipulate the landscape, manage limited supplies, plant crops, hunt wildlife, gather resources, and develop trade routes to build a bustling and unique town.

en.short_description: Live as your favourite african animal, choose between being a carnivore, herbivore or omnivore, predator or prey. In this multiplayer ecosystem, with a realistic open world, choose to become a lion, a elephant or even a swift gazelle! But remember, the savannahs law is to survive at any cost!

en.name: 妄想破绽 Broken Delusion

en.short_description: Ready. Set. YO! - Join Penny & Yo-Yo in a kinetic 3D-platformer bursting with innovative gameplay! Showcase your catalog of tricks and chain impressive combos to deliver Penny & Yo-Yo's perfect breakout performance. Take the stage with this vibrant pair in Penny’s Big Breakaway.

tc.name: 佩妮的大逃亡
tc.short_description: 各就各位，預備，溜啦！快來跟佩妮和溜溜一起暢玩這款充滿創新玩法的動感3D平台遊戲！秀出你的看家本領，使出令人目不暇給的連續技，讓佩妮和溜溜以完美表現逃出生天。在《佩妮的大逃亡》中跟這對活力四射的搭檔一起大放異彩吧。

en.name: Beyond The Wire
en.short_description: Set in the muddy trenches of WW1, Beyond The Wire is a 50v50 multiplayer FPS that immerses players in the desperate & brutal circumstances of the Great War. Featuring an arsenal of historic weapons, ten massive maps, ten playable factions, era-specific tanks, & a brutal melee combat system.

en.name: Bit Blaster XL
en.short_description: Bit Blaster XL is a fast-paced, retro arcade shoot 'em up (shmup) inspired by the classic quarter-munchers of the ‘80s. Easy to pick up, hard to put down, boost, dodge, shoot, and chase high scores in this addictive, old-school action game!

en.short_description: Prodeus is a first-person shooter of old, re-imagined using modern rendering techniques and technology. Experience the quality you’d expect from a modern AAA game, designed with retro aesthetics and gameplay that invoke the tech-imposed limits of older hardware.

en.name: Beholder 2
en.short_description: You are an intern at the central ministry of a totalitarian state with your whole career ahead of you. Work your way up the ladder by scheming against employees, spying on your boss, and completing paperwork. Or do you turn against the state and expose corruption. The choice is still yours to make!

Three years in the making, it's handmade entirely out of paper, card, miniature lights and motors.

en.short_description: This is a difficult game about climbing.

tc.short_description: 在這場奇特的島嶼冒險中，您可以捕捉活生生的神秘「零食」，並把它們餵給你的朋友們！

en.name: Fate/EXTELLA
en.short_description: In the digital realm of SE.RA.PH, the Holy Grail War is over, but the land’s new ruler faces challenges and threats from all sides. The servants now find themselves drawing up tense and unlikely alliances, preparing for a conflict that may tear SE.RA.PH apart...or destroy it entirely.

tc.name: Fate/EXTELLA
tc.short_description: 『Fate』系列的第一款動作遊戲終於在Steam隆重登場。於靈子虛構世界SE.RA.PH進行的「聖杯戰爭」雖然已經結束了，但是在取得『聖杯』的御主面前卻出現了新的威脅。英靈們也不得不組成臨時同盟，為賭上SE.RA.PH的危急存亡一戰做準備。

en.name: Werewolf: The Apocalypse — Heart of the Forest
en.short_description: Explore the myths and monsters of Europe’s last primeval wilderness. Play as Maia, who arrives at the ancient Białowieża Forest looking to explore her family history. Discover Rage in an adventure game inspired by the experience of the legendary tabletop roleplaying game Werewolf: The Apocalypse.

tc.name: Werewolf: The Apocalypse — Heart of the Forest
tc.short_description: Explore the myths and monsters of Europe’s last primeval wilderness. Play as Maia, who arrives at the ancient Białowieża Forest looking to explore her family history. Discover Rage in an adventure game inspired by the experience of the legendary tabletop roleplaying game Werewolf: The Apocalypse.

en.name: Tempest: Pirate Action RPG
en.short_description: Tempest is a Pirate Open World Action RPG where you rove the seas across three continents filled with dozens of colonies and forts, hundreds of quests and countless ships to plunder. Customize your ship, trade, challenge fellow pirates and face mythical monsters such as the Kraken and Leviathan!

tc.name: 風暴之海
tc.short_description: 在《風暴之海》中，你將化身為大航海時代的海盜船長，親自踏上刀尖舔血的狂熱冒險之旅，在無主兇險海域中自由航行，海盜船就是你的家，招募更多亡命之徒，親自指揮戰艦迎戰海軍劫掠貿易商船，在黑市和港口轉售戰利品開啟自己的專屬「業務航線」變身富甲一方的海上霸主。

en.name: The Bunker
en.short_description: The Bunker is an award-winning interactive psychological horror movie. You are John, born underground the day the bombs fell, now alone and trying to survive. But when an alarm goes off, a catastrophic chain of events begins. Unlock the dark secrets of your past as you try to escape The Bunker.

tc.name: The Bunker
tc.short_description: 作为核避难所的最后一名幸存者，John在这里的日常生活是让他能够保持理性的唯一事情。但是当警报声不再想起，他的精神便开始崩溃。他必须到遗忘之地去，在哪里他可以找回他那被压抑的记忆，以及关于地堡的黑暗真相。

en.name: Observer: System Redux
en.short_description: A first‑person cyberpunk horror detective story set in a decaying, neon‑scarred future. As an Observer who invades minds to hunt for clues, you will sift through corrupted memories to track down a mysterious killer and confront your own dark past.

tc.name: Observer: System Redux
tc.short_description: 第一人稱賽博龐克恐怖偵探故事，以霓虹燈下千瘡百孔的黯淡未來為背景。身為透過潛入他人意識來追蹤線索的觀察者，你將層層剖析被侵蝕的記憶，並在追捕神祕凶手的過程中，直面自身黑暗的過往。

en.name: Kholat
en.short_description: The most terrifying journey of your life set in the beautiful winter scenery of the Ural Mountains. Uncover the horrific mystery behind the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Narrated by the famous Sean Bean.

tc.name: 死山
tc.short_description: The most terrifying journey of your life set in the beautiful winter scenery of the Ural Mountains. Uncover the horrific mystery behind the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Narrated by the famous Sean Bean.

en.short_description: Experience the rhythmic thrill of BIT.TRIP RUNNER! With its retro charm, simple controls, and award-winning visuals, this classic sets the standard for rhythm gaming. Don't miss the game that started it all in the acclaimed runner series.

Play solo, or team up with friends in 1-4 player online co-op. Choose relaxing Cozy, challenging Adventure, or epic Hero mode to match your mood and playstyle.

en.name: DEEEER Simulator: Your Average Everyday Deer Game
en.short_description: Put simply, DEEEER Simulator is a “Slow-Life Town Destruction Game”. You can spend your days enjoying a nice, relaxed frolic here and there together with the other animals around town, or you can choose to relieve some stress and absolutely destroy the town and everything in it.

tc.name: 非常普通的鹿 DEEEER Simulator
tc.short_description: 《非常普通的鹿》: 本作是由一隻“非常普通”的鹿為主角，帶您闖進遊戲世界。這隻“非常普通”的鹿是能隨意伸縮脖子，又可以利用鹿角做利器，完全是一隻獨特有個性的鹿在街上橫行霸道。

en.name: Panzer Corps 2
en.short_description: Panzer Corps 2 is the ultimate Second World War strategy game! Enjoy the time-proven gameplay formula which has been appreciated by millions of players over the years, brought to a whole new level of refinement up to the latest technical standards.

en.name: Age of Conquest IV
en.short_description: Age of Conquest is a turn-based grand strategy wargame.

en.name: Songs for a Hero - Definitive Edition
en.short_description: A classic platform with a twist: A dynamic soundtrack and funny lyrics that sings the player's actions and responds to what is happening during the adventure.

en.name: Syberia 3
en.short_description: The next generation in adventure games, Syberia 3 takes you inside an enchanting, mysterious universe full of life for you to explore in 3D. Plunged into the heart of a world inhabited by a cast of interesting characters, you'll discover and experience a fabulous tale as imagined by Benoit Sokal.

en.name: Diplomacy is Not an Option
en.short_description: Diplomacy is Not an Option is a strategy game set in a medieval fantasy world. Build your town and defenses, raise huge armies and fight against massive hordes of enemies. How long can you survive?

tc.name: Diplomacy is Not an Option
tc.short_description: 你生來就是一個封建領主，聽上去挺不錯的，是不？別高興太早，在《要戰便戰》這款遊戲中你的處境可一點都不妙。你的城堡無時無刻都在遭遇著圍攻。準備好面對排山倒海般的敵人，然後設法取得一場酣暢大勝！

en.name: Star Realms
en.short_description: Star Realms is a hugely popular space combat deckbuilding game. Download and play today (note: base set is required to play online) to find out why Star Realms is the winner of SXSW 2014 Board Game of the Year, 7 Golden Geek Awards from BoardGameGeek, and 2 Dice Tower awards!

tc.short_description: Star Realms is a hugely popular space combat deckbuilding game. Download and play today (note: base set is required to play online) to find out why Star Realms is the winner of SXSW 2014 Board Game of the Year, 7 Golden Geek Awards from BoardGameGeek, and 2 Dice Tower awards!

en.name: Stray Gods: The Roleplaying Musical
en.short_description: Gods. Romance. Murder. Musical Numbers?! Play as Grace in a world where Greek Gods live in hiding among us. Change your fate as you draw friends, foes & lovers into song using your powers of musical persuasion to unravel the mystery of the Last Muse's death.

tc.name: Stray Gods: The Roleplaying Musical

en.name: Last Train Home
en.short_description: The Great War is over - the fight continues. Command a legion of soldiers, desperately trying to make their way home amidst the chaos of civil war. Lead them through the unforgiving wilderness onboard an armored train. Manage your crew and resources and try to survive.

tc.name: Last Train Home
tc.short_description: 第一次世界大戰已劃下句點，但戰役仍未結束。在俄羅斯陷入混亂內戰時，指揮歸心似箭的軍隊，率領士兵搭乘裝甲列車通過殘酷無情的荒野。管理你的人員和資源並設法生存。

en.name: First Class Trouble
en.short_description: First Class Trouble is a party game where players must work together and against each other to survive a disaster. The goal is to shut down a deadly A.I. Some players are impostors, secretly playing as human-looking killer robots intent on betraying the other players.

tc.name: First Class Trouble
tc.short_description: First Class Trouble是個玩家們爲了生存得互相合作，同時也得對付其他人的團體合作游戲。它的目的是關閉一部殺手人工智能。有些玩家是間諜，利用看起來像人類的殺手機器人準備背叛其他玩家。

en.name: Tukoni: Prologue
en.short_description: Tukoni: Prologue is a point-and-click puzzle adventure, based on a series of award-winning books by the Ukrainian artist Oksana Bula. Play as Tukoni, the forest spirits, as you meet unique characters, solve captivating puzzles, craft new items, and explore a magical world filled with kindness.

tc.name: Tukoni: Prologue
tc.short_description: 圖科尼是一款基於烏克蘭藝術家奧克莎娜·布拉的書籍而製作的點擊解謎冒險遊戲。在遊戲中扮演圖可尼，森林精靈，與獨特的角色相遇，解決有趣的謎題，探索一個充滿善意的神奇世界。

en.name: Ion Fury
en.short_description: 3D Realms, creators of Duke Nukem 3D, Prey, and Max Payne, team up with Voidpoint to bring back the legendary Build Engine, famous for classic shooters like Duke Nukem 3D, Shadow Warrior, and Blood. Fast-paced FPS combat across huge, secret-packed levels. Ion Fury is the real deal!

tc.name: Ion Fury

en.name: RollerCoaster Tycoon® 3: Complete Edition
en.short_description: Build the park of a lifetime and rediscover the critically acclaimed rollercoaster simulation bestseller. Feel the thrill of a genre-defining classic, complete with two huge expansion packs.

tc.name: RollerCoaster Tycoon® 3: Complete Edition
tc.short_description: 打造世上絕無僅有的遊樂園，再次探索這款備受好評的暢銷雲霄飛車模擬遊戲。藉由兩個內容豐富的擴充套件，完整感受這款遊樂園模擬經典之作帶來的刺激與歡樂。

en.name: The Life and Suffering of Sir Brante — Chapter 1&2
en.short_description: A narrative-driven hardcore RPG set in a gritty world where the gods are real. Set out on a challenging lifetime journey, where every choice you make has a price to pay and consequence to it. Will you become an inquisitor, a judge, or conspire against the old order? Dare to decide!

tc.name: The Life and Suffering of Sir Brante — Chapter 1&2

Set out on a challenging lifetime journey, where every choice you make has a price to pay and consequence to it. Will you become an inquisitor, a judge, or conspire against the old order? Dare to decide!

en.name: Boxes: Lost Fragments
en.short_description: As a legendary thief, your next assignment lures you into a grand and lavish mansion. There you find a series of puzzle boxes, designed for an unknown purpose. What should have been a quick in-and-out, gradually turns into your own harrowing struggle for freedom and answers.

tc.name: Boxes: Lost Fragments
tc.short_description: 身為傳奇大盜的你，下一個任務是潛入某座宏偉奢華的宅邸。在那裡你發現了一系列設計獨特但用途不明的神祕箱子。這次行動本該快去快回，卻在突然間變成了一場追尋答案與自由的艱困挑戰。

en.name: Satellite Reign
en.short_description: Satellite Reign is a real-time, class-based strategy game, set in an open-world cyberpunk city. You command a group of 4 agents through rain-soaked, neon-lit streets, where the law is the will of mega-corporations.

en.name: Cthulhu Saves the World
en.short_description: The lord of insanity, Cthulhu was all set to plunge the world into insanity and destruction when his powers were sealed by a mysterious sorcerer. The only way for him to break the curse is to become a true hero. Save the world to destroy it in an epic parody RPG journey of redemption, romance, and insanity!

en.short_description: Amidst the scorched sands of ancient Persia, there is a legend spun in an ancient tongue. It speaks of a time borne by blood and ruled by deceit. Drawn to the dark powers of a magic dagger, a young Prince is led to unleash a deadly evil upon a beautiful kingdom.

en.short_description: Created by solo developer Nikola Kostic - Have you ever wanted to poop on people but were too shy to just go for it? There's poop in my soup lets you do just that, poop in soups, poop on people, poop on poodles, poop anywhere you please, from the streets of New York to Paris to Beijing.

en.name: The Dig®
en.short_description: An asteroid the size of a small moon is on a crash course toward Earth. Once the wayward asteroid is nuked into a safe orbit, a trio conducts a routine examination of the rocky surface. What they uncover is anything but routine.

tc.name: Thumper

en.name: Solium Infernum
en.short_description: Take the Infernal Throne in this hellish turn-based grand strategy game. The Prince of Darkness has vanished, leaving Archfiends to conspire: muster your legions while intoning dark sorceries, devilish schemes, and machiavellian plots. Who will be the new ruler of Hell and ascend the Throne?

tc.name: Solium Infernum
tc.short_description: 在這款宏大的回合制策略遊戲中，奪下地獄王權。撒旦消失，魔王們蠢蠢欲動：集結你的大軍，同時醞釀黑魔術、邪惡計畫和不擇手段的陰謀。誰會登上王位，成為新的地獄統治者？

en.short_description: Adventure and fight in a medieval fantasy open world! Build heroic characters with various abilities, travel through villages, cities, or perilous dungeons. tc.short_description: 在開放式的中世紀奇幻世界裡冒險與戰鬥！培養能力各異的英雄角色，遊歷於星羅棋佈的村莊，城塞，亦或危機四伏的地下城。經典硬核的回合制小隊戰鬥和角色培養系統：視野，戰霧，衝鋒，夾擊，法術，戰技，你可以在“踢門團”式的競技場模式中自由體驗更多有趣的遊戲元素。

en.name: Infernax
en.short_description: Infernax is the adventures of a great knight who returns to his homeland only to find it plagued with unholy magic. Uncover the mysteries of the curse and face the consequences of your actions.

tc.name: Infernax
tc.short_description: 《Infernax》講述偉大騎士的冒險故事，他返回家鄉時，發現邪惡魔法橫行，肆虐著美麗家園。快來揭開詛咒的神祕謎團，並為自己的行為承擔後果。

en.name: Mitoza

en.name: Maitetsu:Last Run!!
en.short_description: 《爱上火车-Last Run!!-》是日本美少女游戏知名品牌Lose所制作的E-mote视觉小说。本作为本篇故事的二次强化版与各路线后日谈及续集的合集，拥有相当于两部作品的内容，字数高达200万字。本作由Cura担当原画与人物设计，进行豹负责剧本，并由tO(と)主导演出效果。中日文版同步在日本与海外进行发售。

tc.name: 愛上火車-Last Run!!-
tc.short_description: 《愛上火車-Last Run!!-》是日本美少女遊戲知名品牌Lose所製作的E-mote視覺小說。本作為本篇故事的二次強化版與各路線後日談及續集的合集，擁有相當於兩部作品的內容，字數高達200萬字。本作由Cura擔當原畫與人物設計，進行豹負責劇本，並由tO(と)主導演出效果。中日文版同步在日本與海外進行發售。

en.name: Ragnarock
en.short_description: Lead your viking ship to victory in this rhythm game! Pound your drums to the sound of epic music, from celtic rock to viking power metal, and set sail against your rivals. Solo, Split-Screen & Online PVP included.

tc.short_description: Lead your viking ship to victory in this rhythm game! Pound your drums to the sound of epic music, from celtic rock to viking power metal, and set sail against your rivals. Solo, Split-Screen & Online PVP included.

en.name: Blackout Z: Slaughterhouse Edition
en.short_description: Blackout Z' is a super fast top-down view shooter where you face ZOMBIES, SAWS and the DARK. Do you have what it takes to have what it takes to survive the zombie apocalypse with only your gun and an old flashlight?

tc.name: Blackout Z: Slaughterhouse Edition
tc.short_description: Blackout Z 是一款超快速的自上而下的視角射擊遊戲，您可以在其中面對 ZOMBIES、SAWS 和 DARK。你有能力只用你的槍和舊手電筒筒在殭屍啟示錄中生存嗎？

en.name: SquareCells
en.short_description: SquareCells is an ambient logic puzzle game.

tc.name: SquareCells
tc.short_description: SquareCells is an ambient logic puzzle game.

en.name: STAR WARS™ Rebellion
en.short_description: It is a time of great upheaval. The first Death Star has been destroyed, marking a major victory for the Rebellion. But the Empire remains strong. As commander, you must choose to take control of either the Rebel Alliance or the Galactic Empire. Your goal: complete domination of the galaxy.

en.name: Oh...Sir!! The Insult Simulator
en.short_description: A Hilarious Insult-‘em up in which players must verbally take-out their friends and family in different game modes. Assemble witty insults using different word strings, and employ combos, criticals, continuations and more to battle your opponents both offline and online across multiple devices.

Assemble witty insults using different word strings, and employ combos, criticals, continuations and more to battle your opponents both offline and online across multiple devices.

en.name: Fort Solis
en.short_description: Answer the call from a mining base on Mars as engineer Jack Leary and search for the missing crew. Fort Solis will immerse you with cinematic visuals powered by UE 5 and voice acting of Roger Clark and Troy Baker. Explore the mining complex and reach climax of this narrative thriller experience.

tc.name: Fort Solis
tc.short_description: 《Fort Solis》，一款引人入勝、故事驅動，發生在「紅色星球」上的驚悚遊戲

en.name: Olympic Games Tokyo 2020 – The Official Video Game™
en.short_description: The Olympic Games are back, and this time it's your chance for glory! Whether you play with friends, family, or go for gold on the global leaderboards, this is a party game that anyone can pick up and enjoy!

tc.name: 2020東京奧運 The Official Video Game
tc.short_description: 您發光發熱的時機再次降臨，奧運會又回來了！不管是與好友遊玩、與家人同樂，或在全球排行榜上爭金牌，這是一款老少咸宜的派對遊戲，任何人都可盡情享受！

en.name: I Am Fish
en.short_description: I Am Fish is a charming, physics-based adventure starring four intrepid fish friends, forcibly separated from their home in a pet shop fish tank. Swim, fly, roll and chomp your way to the open ocean in a bid for freedom and to re-unite once again.

tc.name: 我是小魚
tc.short_description: 《我是小魚》是以物理學為基礎打造的迷人冒險遊戲。四隻大膽無謂的小魚朋友被迫離開寵物商店魚缸裡的家之後，悠游、飛越、翻滾、大口咬咬，一路奔向遼闊海洋，重獲自由並與好友再度相聚。游戲支持中文。

en.name: Junkyard Simulator
en.short_description: Did you ever wish to work in a junkyard? Now you can, with Junkyard Simulator. They are many roads leading to success - whichever you take depends on your decisions.

tc.name: Junkyard Simulator
tc.short_description: Did you ever wish to work in a junkyard? Now you can, with Junkyard Simulator. They are many roads leading to success - whichever you take depends on your decisions.

en.name: 2064: Read Only Memories
en.short_description: 2064: Read Only Memories is a cyberpunk point-and-click adventure set in Neo-San Francisco. Team up with Turing, the world's first sapient machine, to unravel a conspiracy that threatens to shake an entire society

tc.name: 2064: Read Only Memories
tc.short_description: 2064: Read Only Memories is a cyberpunk point-and-click adventure set in Neo-San Francisco. Team up with Turing, the world's first sapient machine, to unravel a conspiracy that threatens to shake an entire society

en.name: Terra Incognita Chapter One: The Descendant
en.short_description: Terra Incognita is a classic role playing game. The world of Terra is slowly falling into chaos. A great war is coming and It's time to take up arms against a corrupt royal family. You must travel across this huge world and unite the nations of Terra, recruiting comrades along the way.

en.name: Ships At Sea
en.short_description: Experience the thrill of navigating a wide range of ships. In single- and multiplayer modes, immerse yourself in tasks such as service, cargo transport, and commercial fishing as you explore the breathtaking open world of Norway´s Islands and its stunning scenery. The ocean is within your reach!

tc.name: Ships At Sea
tc.short_description: 體驗操控各種船隻的刺激。在單人和多人模式中，當你探索挪威群島及其壯觀景色的廣闊開放世界時，投入到服務、貨物運輸和商業捕魚等任務中。大海近在咫尺！

en.name: Worm.is: The Game
en.short_description: Smash worms or slither trying! Warning: Incredibly addicting Multiplayer Game!

tc.name: Worm.is: The Game

en.name: Railway Empire
en.short_description: In Railway Empire, you will create an elaborate and wide-ranging rail network, purchase over 40 different trains modelled in extraordinary detail, and buy or build railway stations, maintenance buildings, factories and tourist attractions to keep your travel network ahead of the competition.

tc.name: Railway Empire
tc.short_description: In Railway Empire, you will create an elaborate and wide-ranging rail network, purchase over 40 different trains modelled in extraordinary detail, and buy or build railway stations, maintenance buildings, factories and tourist attractions to keep your travel network ahead of the competition.

en.name: Mortal Shell
en.short_description: Their Flesh is Your Armor. Mortal Shell is a deep action-RPG that tests your sanity and resilience in a shattered world. Survival demands superior awareness, precision, and instincts. Possess lost warriors, track down hidden sanctums of the devout, and face formidable foes.

tc.name: Mortal Shell
tc.short_description: 《Mortal Shell》是一款深度的動作 RPG，並會在一個支離破碎的世界內考驗你的理智與韌性。敵人的憐憫之心蕩然無存，你只有依靠卓越的感知力、精準度和直覺才能倖存。控制死去的戰士、找到虔誠信徒的秘密聖地，並面對可怕的敵人。

en.name: Bramble: The Mountain King
en.short_description: Bramble The Mountain King is a grim adventure set in a world inspired by dark, Nordic fables. Explore the beautiful yet dangerous and twisted land of Bramble in your endeavour to rescue your sister. Traverse a wondrous landscape and survive deadly encounters with Bramble's many hideous creatures.

tc.name: Bramble: The Mountain King
tc.short_description: 《荊棘：群山之王》是一款受北歐傳說啟發的黑暗世界冒險的遊戲。為了拯救姊姊，探索這個美麗卻又危險的扭曲荊棘之地。遊歷奇妙的美景，遭遇《荊棘》中致命又猙獰的生物，掙扎吧！求生吧！。

en.name: Operation: Tango - Friend Pass
en.short_description: Download the Friend Pass and play for free with a friend who owns the full Operation: Tango game. It takes two to save the world, but it only takes one to pay for it.

tc.name: Operation: Tango - Friend Pass
tc.short_description: 下載好友通行證，免費與擁有《探戈行動》的好友共同游玩。拯救世界需要兩個人，但游戲一個人掏腰包就夠。

en.name: .hack//G.U. Last Recode
en.short_description: .hack//G.U. is back! This collection includes all 3 original .hack//G.U. titles, Rebirth, Reminisce, and Redemption, all fully restored and remastered. As well as an all new 4th Volume: .hack//G.U. Reconnection.

tc.name: .hack//G.U. Last Recode
tc.short_description: 「.hack//G.U.」在HD復刻下重返榮耀！除了「.hack//G.U.」系列全3部（Vol.1～3），額外收錄內容為全新劇情的Vol.4！進化的畫面與大幅強化的系統操作交織而成的「The World」，就此再誕！

en.name: STAR WARS™ Battlefront (Classic, 2004)

en.short_description: Survive the ever increasing pressure of time for as long as you can! A minimalistic incremental game about time management that takes inspiration from roguelite games, with a focus on meta-progression. Every generation has a better chance at survival, because previous lives influence its instincts

Upgrade dragons and forge weapons to unlock more power. Free your Titan in 5v5 PvP battles across 3 different map types or play in ‘Adventure Mode’, traveling across different regions and unlocking rewards.

en.name: Pistol Whip
en.short_description: Enter: the ultimate action hero. Pistol Whip is a physical action-rhythm game where film-inspired gunplay and blood-pumping beats collide. Blast, duck and dodge your way through fever dream Scenes, build unique rhythms in a ballet of bullets and claim glory on the leaderboards. Includes mod support!

tc.name: Pistol Whip

en.name: Rusty Lake: Roots
en.short_description: Experience the beginning and end of characters' lives and build your own family tree! Rusty Lake: Roots is the second premium point-and-click adventure by the creators of the Cube Escape series and Rusty Lake Hotel.

tc.short_description: 經歷遊戲角色們的人生始末，並且建立你的家譜！《銹湖：根源 Rusty Lake: Roots》是第二款由密室逃脫系列和銹湖旅館遊戲創作者開發出的優質點擊類冒險遊戲。

en.name: Journey of Greed
en.short_description: This is a perfect hybrid of social board game and strategy card game. Steal, set traps, assassinate, escape, mind games... Compete online with three other players at each adventure and use every mean possible to gain the most coins.

tc.name: 冒險公社
tc.short_description: 一個在線“友盡”桌遊與策略卡牌的完美結合體，玩家可以通過背地偷竊、坑害隊友、攜款逃跑、激情博弈…等策略來搜刮最多的金錢，然後獲得勝利。

en.name: Wargame: European Escalation

en.name: TRIANGLE STRATEGY
en.short_description: A new tactics RPG from the team who brought you the Bravely series and Octopath Traveler. An epic tale, brought to life with stunning HD-2D graphics. Make difficult decisions in this story set against a backdrop of the war-torn continent of Norzelia.

tc.name: TRIANGLE STRATEGY
tc.short_description: 本作為由「BRAVELY」系列、《OCTOPATH TRAVELER 歧路旅人》的開發團隊所打造的全新戰略RPG。遊戲將以HD-2D的精美畫面呈現壯闊的英雄傳。故事舞台為戰亂的諾澤利亞大陸，玩家將不得不做出艱難的抉擇。你的正義將會邁向什麼樣的未來……？

en.name: Voices from the Sea

tc.name: Voices from the Sea
tc.short_description: Follow the story of a young boy, Cantus as he meets Maris, the mysterious girl by the sea - an experience that will change his life forever.

en.name: HAAK
en.short_description: HAAK is a Metroidvania-Platformer. As the mysterious wanderer Haak, you embarked on an epic expedition across the vast cyber-wasteland to find your lost brother. Explore deserted cities and metro, refine your weapons and hack skills, and uncover the secrets behind metal and dust.

tc.name: HAAK
tc.short_description: 《HAAK》是一款類銀橫版動作冒險遊戲，你將扮演神秘的浪人——哈克，運用光刃和鉤爪靈活走位、破解機關，探索失落的城市和地鐵，蒐集裝備並不斷強化技能，為了尋找失散的兄弟踏上一場橫越廣闊廢土的史詩旅程。

en.name: 迷雾之夏-The Vigilant Villa
en.short_description: The Vigilant Villa is a plots-oriented, texts-based AVG adventure game inheriting the classic “A locked room mystery" story mode. Where the game heads towards is completely decided by player’s own deductions and choices.

tc.name: 迷雾之夏-The Vigilant Villa
tc.short_description: 《迷霧之夏》，一款懸疑推理AVG。 當暴雨襲來，陰謀與厄運也接踵而至。你將扮演推理小說家方時，來到鬱金香別墅，開始一段與命運的邂逅。在這裏你將遇到詭異的謎題與蹊蹺的懸案，並且瞭解到何為真摯的友誼，何又為冰冷的惡意。這是一段愛恨交織的故事，這是你的故事…..

en.name: CAYNE
en.short_description: Hadley wakes in a facility. She is 9 months pregnant. They want her baby... CAYNE is the FREE, isometric horror game from the creators of STASIS.

tc.name: CAYNE

tc.name: PILGRIM
tc.short_description: Pilgrim is a medieval-based, co-op horror, adventure. Can you and your friends make it to the end of The Road?
