en.short_description: Explore the land of Sulnas as the "Shadow of Death", a cat girl who's dauntless and fierce. The land is poisoned by secret power and desperately needs salvation. Can you save it from its sure demise or will you doom its fate like everyone else would?

tc.name: 獸娘秘境：異象殘影(Mysteria~Occult Shadows~)
tc.short_description: 《靈之祕境：異象殘影》是個暗黑童話風格3D全視角，華麗爽快戰鬥的ACT遊戲，你將控制傳奇神力的貓靈“死神 暗影”，在靈之祕境“蘇爾納斯”世界裡，親歷超自然靈異事件，抵達理想境界

en.name: We Who Are About To Die
en.short_description: Fight & strategize your way through spectacles and arenas - rise from lowly slave to Grand Champion and earn your freedom. Or... die trying. This Gladiator RPG Roguelite features in-depth career management and a unique physics simulated combat system. To those who are about to die, I salute you!

tc.name: We Who Are About To Die
tc.short_description: 奮力戰鬥、制定策略，在觀眾面前一一突破競技場的挑戰。以低賤的奴隸身分起家，逐步成為最終冠軍，獲得自由。不成功便成仁。 這是一款角鬥士角色扮演輕度Rogue遊戲，有豐富的生涯管理系統，還有獨特的物理模擬戰鬥系統。在此向各位將死志士致敬！

en.name: Yarimono
en.short_description: The protagonist's life takes a turn after their partner Yarimon learns the ultra-invincible move, the "Cheat Tackle". While challenging various trainers to participate in the Yarimon tournament, the protagonist unexpectedly discovers the secrets of this world.

tc.short_description: 超過150種以上的怪獸!!內容豐富度爆表的超大型RPG。 訓練你的Yarimon挑戰冠軍的頭銜!! 就在自己的夥伴Yarimon習得超無敵的「作弊衝撞」這個世界都不一樣了...

en.name: DEAD OR SCHOOL
en.short_description: Underground dwelling girl Hisako is aiming for the surface in a zombie infested Tokyo. Hack and slash RPG! Obtain weapons and gear from enemies, and customize your skill tree to create your own unique and powerful a character!

tc.name: DEAD OR SCHOOL
tc.short_description: Underground dwelling girl Hisako is aiming for the surface in a zombie infested Tokyo. Hack and slash RPG! Obtain weapons and gear from enemies, and customize your skill tree to create your own unique and powerful a character!

en.name: 反转21克
en.short_description: In 2055, "You", the retired soldier king, was assassinated by a comrade who once fought side by side. His peaceful life was suddenly broken. In order to find the truth, he was involved in a series of bizarre murders.

tc.name: 反转21克
tc.short_description: 2055年，退休兵王的「你」被曾經並肩作戰的戰友暗殺，平靜的生活突然被打破，為了尋找真相，連續牽扯出離奇命案、不明追殺、黑市拍賣、永生獵場等事件，當你覺得一切塵埃落定「真相」浮出水面時，卻發現危險才剛降臨。一切選擇皆因「你」而起，最終結局由「你」決定。

en.name: Dominions 5 - Warriors of the Faith
en.short_description: In Dominions 5 you take control of a powerful being that rules a nation and aspires to godhood. The type of Pretender Gods can vary from magically powerful arch mages to huge titans or large monuments. Dominions is a deep 4x turn based strategy game with a very large variety of spells and units.

en.short_description: After the destruction of the EARTH in 2150, the leaders of the Eurasian Dynasty escaped on board an evacuation fleet. Now they are fighting for the survival of the human species. Their base is one large building comprising of smaller variable parts.

en.name: Still Wakes the Deep
en.short_description: 1975. Disaster strikes the Beira D oil rig off the coast of Scotland. Navigate the collapsing rig to save your crew from an otherworldly horror on the edge of all logic and reality in this 3x BAFTA Games Award-winning narrative horror experience.

tc.name: Syberia: The World Before

en.name: Monument Valley
en.short_description: Embark on a journey of forgiveness through impossible environments and illusionary puzzles. Experience this meditative and calming puzzle game by manipulating monuments and creating evolving paths to explore new, surreal, and mysterious worlds.

tc.name: Monument Valley
tc.short_description: 與沉默的公主艾達一起踏上寬恕之旅，穿越不可能的秘境和虛幻的謎題。 通過操控紀念碑並建立不斷演變的路徑，從而探索全新、超現實又神祕的世界，體驗這款安寧恬靜的解謎遊戲。

en.name: King Exit
en.short_description: Because of the Great hero Galoluise, demons are all destroyed.For a rookie teenage girl to become the Savior, everyone loved her.Life seemed happy, and the world was as peace as it could ever get.But 3 years later,Hero Galoluise not only have lost her house, her friends and family members were slaughtered.

tc.name: King Exit
tc.short_description: 這可能是你玩過的同人黃油中劇情最佳的一作，屬於難度較高的本格RPG，劇情不是簡單是監獄凌辱或監獄逃脫，而是以曲折跌宕的情節展開的淒慘卻又熱血的王道故事。出場人物雖多，但每一位角色都個性鮮明，一反傳統作品的僅靠外表就能判斷人物性格的特點。這是繼承了JRPG靈魂：“故事性”的故事。

en.name: Black Book
en.short_description: “Black Book” is a dark RPG Adventure, based on Slavic myths, in which you play as a young sorceress. Fight evil forces in card-based battles and explore the world, where humans live alongside mythological creatures.

en.name: Get Off My Lawn!
en.short_description: They came in peace, but messed with the wrong old man. Armed with a musket, 78 year old Murray Mendelson has single-handedly started an interstellar war. Shoot first and ask questions later in this endless fast paced arcade shooter. Use everything in Murray’s arsenal to keep the aliens off of his perfectly manicured lawn!

tc.name: Get Off My Lawn!
tc.short_description: 他們平靜地來到這裡，但是干擾了這個失常的老男人。78歲的老Murray Mendelson有一支火槍，他僅靠自己一人的力量開始了這場星際大戰。面對不計其數而又行動快速的侵略者，先射擊，然後再問問題。使用Murray 軍械庫里的所有東西，把外星人全都趕出Murray 修剪完美的草坪！

en.name: 中华三国志 the Three Kingdoms of China
en.short_description: Three Kingdoms of China is a free, open-source single-machine strategy three-country game developed by the domestic folk team. The game does not have any commercial nature, hoping to create a dream of Three Kingdoms for the fans of the three kingdoms.

tc.name: 中华三国志 the Three Kingdoms of China
tc.short_description: 中華三國志是由國內民間團隊開發研製的一款免費、代碼開源的單機策略三國遊戲。遊戲不帶有任何商業性質，希望能爲廣大三國愛好者打造一個屬於自己的三國夢。中華三國志已默默發展近10年，遊戲玩法多樣。在原創頭像，武將重設，遊戲ui界面，程序優化，新的地圖方面都在努力進行中。期待各路運營，程序，美工、建模、ui等互聯網精英和歷史達人加入項目，製作華人自己的免費開源遊戲！

en.name: Ticket to Ride: Classic Edition
en.short_description: CONNECT MORE THAN CITIES! Set off with your friends and family to re(discover) Ticket to Ride: Classic Edition, the classic boardgame. In this railway adventure, you’ll need to be the quickest to link up your cities and reach your destinations.

tc.name: Ticket to Ride: Classic Edition
tc.short_description: CONNECT MORE THAN CITIES! Set off with your friends and family to re(discover) Ticket to Ride: Classic Edition, the classic boardgame. In this railway adventure, you’ll need to be the quickest to link up your cities and reach your destinations.

en.name: Cyber Manhunt 2: New World - The Hacking Simulator
en.short_description: Discover a digital realm shrouded in mystery. Sequel to an award-winning narrative driven hacking simulator puzzle game. Play as an AI assistant in a major corporation. Deploy intricate social engineering tactics and expose hidden truths in a world of ambition and high-tech deception.

tc.name: 全網公敵2 新世界
tc.short_description: 《全網公敵2 新世界》是一款結合大數據、網絡安全、人工智能等現實共鳴題材的劇情向解謎遊戲，你將扮演一名隸屬於泰坦公司的人工智能助手，通過社工手段破解目標人物信息，獲取他們的愛好、生活習慣與人際關系，挖掘出他們想要極力隱藏的秘密，找出最終的真相。

en.name: 古龙风云录
en.short_description: 《古龙风云录》是一款大型武侠RPG，拥有古龙作品授权，还原古龙笔下武侠世界。玩家在武侠世界里探索百态江湖，体验超百万字剧情，奇遇各路豪侠，选择并养成你的伙伴，最终一起解开当年回雁峰谜团……
developers: 香港商河洛互動娛樂股份有限公司

tc.name: 古龍風雲錄
tc.short_description: 《古龍風雲錄》是一款大型武俠RPG，擁有古龍作品授權，還原古龍筆下武俠世界。玩家在武俠世界裏探索百態江湖，體驗超百萬字劇情，奇遇各路豪俠，選擇並養成你的夥伴，最終一起解開當年回雁峰謎團……
developers: 香港商河洛互動娛樂股份有限公司

en.name: Total Tank Simulator
en.short_description: Commander in the ranks. Soldier at heart. Choose a faction and deploy and command your army into massive physics-driven WWII battles to the last man standing. Destroy everything on sight with an insane amount of units that will behave tactically.

tc.name: Total Tank Simulator
tc.short_description: 成為統率全軍的指揮軍；成為一夫當關的士兵吧。選擇所屬的勢力，揮軍出兵由物理引擎驅動的大型二戰戰場，奮戰至成為戰場上最後的一人為止。指揮各式各樣人數眾多又深諳戰術的部隊，摧毀視線範圍內的一切。

en.name: Arco
en.short_description: A Mesoamerican fantasy RPG that blends turn-based and real-time combat. Explore the world through three handcrafted stories forged in bloodshed, laced with magic, and united by revenge.

tc.name: Arco
tc.short_description: 三個在血腥中鑄造，以魔法交織，並因復仇而結合的故事。

en.name: Warhammer Quest (Classic)
en.short_description: Based on the classic tabletop game, Warhammer Quest is an addictive mix of role-playing and strategy.

tc.name: Warhammer Quest (Classic)
tc.short_description: Based on the classic tabletop game, Warhammer Quest is an addictive mix of role-playing and strategy.

en.name: MXGP PRO
en.short_description: Adjust your bike's configuration like a mechanic and win a race with the new Pro Physics. Practice in the Compound, a vast area where you can freely explore or compete against the AI. All the official tracks and riders from the 2017 season await you!

tc.name: MXGP PRO
tc.short_description: Motocross 錦標賽的官方遊戲回來了！ 下載 MXGP PRO，即可體驗職業級的 MXGP。 像真正的技師一樣調校您的摩托車，並在全新的 PRO 物理引擎環境下競速。 寬廣的 Compound 場地可供您練習，既可自由探索，也可與電腦競賽。 2017 年賽季的所有官方賽道與車手都在這裡等著您！

en.name: Sherlock Holmes versus Jack the Ripper
en.short_description: Recognized as one of the best licenses in gaming and lauded by the press, Sherlock Holmes is back with an investigation that is sure to be the most horrifying of the series. The famous detective stands against the most dangerous serial killer England has ever known - Jack the Ripper.

tc.name: Sherlock Holmes versus Jack the Ripper
tc.short_description: Recognized as one of the best licenses in gaming and lauded by the press, Sherlock Holmes is back with an investigation that is sure to be the most horrifying of the series. The famous detective stands against the most dangerous serial killer England has ever known - Jack the Ripper.

en.name: Terraforming Mars
en.short_description: The taming of the Red Planet has begun! Corporations are competing to transform Mars into a habitable planet by spending vast resources and using innovative technology to raise temperature, create a breathable atmosphere, and make oceans of water.

tc.name: Terraforming Mars
tc.short_description: The taming of the Red Planet has begun! Corporations are competing to transform Mars into a habitable planet by spending vast resources and using innovative technology to raise temperature, create a breathable atmosphere, and make oceans of water.

en.name: Kindergarten 2
en.short_description: Welcome to Kindergarten 2, which takes place on Tuesday! After the events of Monday, you'll find yourself in a new school with new friends...and new ways to get ruthlessly murdered.

tc.name: Kindergarten 2
tc.short_description: Welcome to Kindergarten 2, which takes place on Tuesday! After the events of Monday, you'll find yourself in a new school with new friends...and new ways to get ruthlessly murdered.

en.name: Beyond Good and Evil™
en.short_description: Play as Jade, a young investigative reporter, and expose a terrible government conspiracy. It is up to you and your loyal pig friend Pey'j to save your planet and its inhabitants.

tc.name: Beyond Good and Evil™
tc.short_description: Play as Jade, a young investigative reporter, and expose a terrible government conspiracy. It is up to you and your loyal pig friend Pey'j to save your planet and its inhabitants.

en.name: Among the Sleep - Enhanced Edition
en.short_description: Among the Sleep: Enhanced Edition is a new and improved version of the award winning first person horror adventure. In the game you play as a small child trapped in a weird nightmare where you go looking for your mom.

tc.name: Among the Sleep - Enhanced Edition
tc.short_description: Among the Sleep: Enhanced Edition is a new and improved version of the award winning first person horror adventure. In the game you play as a small child trapped in a weird nightmare where you go looking for your mom.

en.name: Neva
en.short_description: Experience the moving tale of a young woman and her lifelong bond with a magnificent wolf as they embark on a thrilling adventure through a rapidly dying world.

tc.name: Neva
tc.short_description: 感受動人心弦的故事，瞭解女子與一隻高貴的狼所建立起的畢生羈絆，一起在迅速消逝的世界裡展開精彩冒險。

en.name: Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery EP
en.short_description: Traverse a mythic little realm, use a sword to do battle & evoke sworcery to solve mystical musical mysteries.

tc.name: Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery EP
tc.short_description: Traverse a mythic little realm, use a sword to do battle & evoke sworcery to solve mystical musical mysteries.

en.name: Planetbase
en.short_description: Guide a group of space settlers trying to establish a base on a remote planet. Grow food, collect energy, mine resources, survive disasters and build a self-sufficient colony in a harsh and unforgiving environment.

tc.name: Planetbase
tc.short_description: Guide a group of space settlers trying to establish a base on a remote planet. Grow food, collect energy, mine resources, survive disasters and build a self-sufficient colony in a harsh and unforgiving environment.

en.name: Nation Red
en.short_description: Nation Red is an ultra fast infinite play arena-based shooter providing an exceptional close-quarter battlefield experience. Fight thousands of zombie mutants and their bosses in frantic bloody gameplay while earning close to 100 perks. Fight in Barricade, Survival or Free Play mode.

tc.name: Nation Red
tc.short_description: Nation Red 是一個極快速、殺無赦的競技場式（Arena-based）射擊遊戲，為玩家帶來卓越的近身戰鬥體驗。在遊戲中，玩家可以搭配超過 ~100 種技能和成千上萬的變種喪屍以及他們的頭目戰鬥。1977年 8 月 17 日在中西部的偏遠小鎮中發現有數群喪屍入侵，這些入侵者受到強烈抵抗後便撤回沙漠中，當時他們並不會使用任何工具或是武器。特種部隊隨即前往獵殺倖存的喪屍，在經過六個禮拜的搜索行動後，他們相信已經將所有的喪屍殺之殆盡。現在三十年過後，一位司機駕駛卡車在經過亞利桑那州的一條荒涼道路時，發現了大量的喪屍。在通話中斷前，他甚至提到有些喪屍拿著槍...他們又回來了！而現在正在追殺我們。Steam 獨家內容：線上及本機合作模式 — 聯合其他玩家共同升級並對抗喪屍。

en.name: 狐の旅路
en.short_description: The white hair fox girl, Shirakami Fubuki, will take an adventure in a different world with her companions.

tc.name: 狐の旅路
tc.short_description: The white hair fox girl, Shirakami Fubuki, will take an adventure in a different world with her companions.

en.name: BOXVR
en.short_description: Designed to give us back the fun we lost in exercise, BoxVR is the award-winning VR fitness game where you jab, weave and uppercut your way through workouts in time to adrenaline-pumping music.

tc.name: BOXVR
tc.short_description: Designed to give us back the fun we lost in exercise, BoxVR is the award-winning VR fitness game where you jab, weave and uppercut your way through workouts in time to adrenaline-pumping music.

en.name: Ninja Stealth
en.short_description: Evade the guards and the defences to escape the evil facility on this click and play stealth game, there will be difficult on your path, young padawan!

tc.name: Ninja Stealth
tc.short_description: Evade the guards and the defences to escape the evil facility on this click and play stealth game, there will be difficult on your path, young padawan!

en.name: Border Pioneer
en.short_description: As the kingdom's most promising pioneer, embark on a legendary journey to tame the frontier! Build thriving towns across various landscapes, fending off waves of diverse enemies until you establish a firm foothold and have explored everything the eye can see!

tc.name: 邊境開拓者
tc.short_description: 在《邊境開拓者》中，你將成為王國傑出的開拓者，踏上充滿榮耀與挑戰的征程。在變化多端的關卡中，建立迷你城鎮，抵禦無盡的敵人浪潮。你的城鎮將不斷遭遇敵人的猛烈進攻，構築堅固的基地防禦，用你強大的防禦把敵軍碾壓粉碎！在邊境鑄就你的傳奇，為王國開疆拓土！向下滑，看看這如潮水般的敵人！

en.name: Lucy -The Eternity She Wished For-
en.short_description: If there was a robot that could laugh, cry and smile. ...Does it have a soul?

tc.name: 露西 -她所期望的一切-
tc.short_description: 如果世界上有機器人能夠像人一樣微笑，一樣哭泣，一樣悲傷。你會怎樣想呢？

en.name: ATOMEGA
en.short_description: Grow, fight, collect and evade in the last cosmic arena the very end of time. Acquire MASS to evolve your EXOFORM from the nimble ATOM to the godlike OMEGA and compete for fun and dominance in a fast-paced, multiplayer shooter. ATOMEGA™ !

tc.name: ATOMEGA
tc.short_description: 在時間之末的最後一座宇宙競技場裡，盡情成長、戰鬥、收集、迴避。取得質量，將你的外形體從靈巧的 ATOM 進化為神一般的 OMEGA，在步調快速的多人射擊遊戲中，盡情享樂、競爭取勝！ ATOMEGA™！

en.name: NEO Scavenger
en.short_description: NEO Scavenger is a game where you must survive in the wasteland long enough to figure out who you are. Each turn, you must decide where to go, how to scavenge for supplies, and how to deal with anything and anyone you encounter.

tc.name: NEO Scavenger
tc.short_description: NEO Scavenger is a game where you must survive in the wasteland long enough to figure out who you are. Each turn, you must decide where to go, how to scavenge for supplies, and how to deal with anything and anyone you encounter.

en.name: Rebuild 3: Gangs of Deadsville
en.short_description: Rebuild a ruined city in this post-apocalyptic mix of strategy and simulation. Manage survivors, scavenge for food and supplies, deal with rival gangs, illness, interpersonal strife and zombie attacks.

tc.name: Rebuild 3: Gangs of Deadsville
tc.short_description: Rebuild a ruined city in this post-apocalyptic mix of strategy and simulation. Manage survivors, scavenge for food and supplies, deal with rival gangs, illness, interpersonal strife and zombie attacks.

en.name: Project Warlock
en.short_description: Project Warlock is a first-person shooter that fans of Doom, Hexen, and Wolfenstein cannot miss. It serves you an exploding cocktail of bullets, spells, and monsters. Battle through 60 levels of non-stop action, packed with bloodthirsty enemies and challenging bosses.

tc.name: Project Warlock
tc.short_description: Project Warlock is a first-person shooter that fans of Doom, Hexen, and Wolfenstein cannot miss. It serves you an exploding cocktail of bullets, spells, and monsters. Battle through 60 levels of non-stop action, packed with bloodthirsty enemies and challenging bosses.

en.name: Gatekeeper
en.short_description: Gatekeeper is a fast-paced rogue-like. Go on a quest to chase down Chaos and reclaim the stolen Heart of Time, fighting your way through relentless enemy forces. Play solo or in 4-player co-op and become the next Gatekeeper!

tc.name: 心門守衛
tc.short_description: 《心門守衛》是緊湊刺激的Roguelike遊戲，你必須討伐造主「混沌」，奪回遭竊的時間之心，在源源不絕的敵襲中殺出一條血路。你可以獨自闖蕩異星，也能與4位玩家並肩作戰。快來成為下一位心門守衛吧！

en.name: OXENFREE II: Lost Signals
en.short_description: Five years after the events of OXENFREE, Riley returns to her hometown of Camena to investigate mysterious radio signals. What she finds is more than she bargained for.

tc.name: OXENFREE II: Lost Signals
tc.short_description: Five years after the events of OXENFREE, Riley returns to her hometown of Camena to investigate mysterious radio signals. What she finds is more than she bargained for.

en.name: Anna - Extended Edition
en.short_description: Anna - Extended Edition has been given an overhaul based on the feedback of the thousands of players of the original Anna.

tc.name: Anna - Extended Edition
tc.short_description: Anna - Extended Edition has been given an overhaul based on the feedback of the thousands of players of the original Anna.

en.name: Ghost 1.0
en.short_description: A mysterious agent, capable of becoming a digital ghost, sneaks aboard the Nakamura Space Station. This is where the fun begins: the station is well-protected with its heavy defences, never-ending arsenal of weapons, and mysterious artifacts. It will all have to be destroyed.

tc.name: Ghost 1.0
tc.short_description: A mysterious agent, capable of becoming a digital ghost, sneaks aboard the Nakamura Space Station. This is where the fun begins: the station is well-protected with its heavy defences, never-ending arsenal of weapons, and mysterious artifacts. It will all have to be destroyed.

en.name: Gear Up
en.short_description: Feel the adrenaline as you control your unique tank in multiplayer arcade action! Build your ultimate war machine from over a million different combinations. Now, will you go for the rumbling caterpillar tracks or the crawling spider legs?

tc.name: Gear Up
tc.short_description: Feel the adrenaline as you control your unique tank in multiplayer arcade action! Build your ultimate war machine from over a million different combinations. Now, will you go for the rumbling caterpillar tracks or the crawling spider legs?

en.name: The Fall
en.short_description: Take the role of ARID, the artificial intelligence within a high-tech combat suit. The Fall is a unique combination of adventure-game puzzle solving and side-scroller action, all set within a dark and atmospheric story. Get ready for a disturbing journey as you explore the world of The Fall.

tc.name: The Fall
tc.short_description: Take the role of ARID, the artificial intelligence within a high-tech combat suit. The Fall is a unique combination of adventure-game puzzle solving and side-scroller action, all set within a dark and atmospheric story. Get ready for a disturbing journey as you explore the world of The Fall.

en.name: Gaokao.Love.100Days
en.short_description: Getting a girl-friend before National College Entrance Exam, I know it's crazy, but from today, we will face everything together.

tc.name: 高考戀愛一百天
tc.short_description: 那一天，我有了女朋友。雖然我知道這一切來得有點不是時候，可至少，從現在開始我不再孤身一人。後面的事情，我們都可以一起面對，不管是快樂、煩惱，還是憂傷……以及——100天之後的高考

en.name: Anarchy Arcade
en.short_description: Turn your entire digital life into a game. AArcade is a 3D desktop that launches shortcuts to absolutely anything you like. Join the anarchy of the persistent online metaverse, or remain in your own private reality. Casual in-game building features, plus hundreds of thousands of addons.

tc.name: Anarchy Arcade
tc.short_description: Turn your entire digital life into a game. AArcade is a 3D desktop that launches shortcuts to absolutely anything you like. Join the anarchy of the persistent online metaverse, or remain in your own private reality. Casual in-game building features, plus hundreds of thousands of addons.

en.name: Sinking Simulator
en.short_description: The sequel to the unfinished Sinking Simulator, now with a lot more POWER!!!! Witness your witty love of chaos and destruction sinking 2D ships and everything else on board!

tc.name: Sinking Simulator
tc.short_description: The sequel to the unfinished Sinking Simulator, now with a lot more POWER!!!! Witness your witty love of chaos and destruction sinking 2D ships and everything else on board!

en.name: Stay Close
en.short_description: Stay Close is open-world horror game, with options for single-player and co-op. It has an unique and new gameplay approach unseen so far in any other game. You'll find yourself in a creepy and anomalous town, what is your next move?

tc.name: Stay Close
tc.short_description: Stay Close is open-world horror game, with options for single-player and co-op. It has an unique and new gameplay approach unseen so far in any other game. You'll find yourself in a creepy and anomalous town, what is your next move?

en.name: Gravity Circuit
en.short_description: Gravity Circuit is a flashy action packed 2D platformer in the spirit of console classics. Follow Kai, a lone operative war hero who harnesses the mysterious powers of the Gravity Circuit, on an adventure in a futuristic world inhabited by sentient robots.

tc.name: Gravity Circuit
tc.short_description: 《重力迴路》這款華麗的2D平台動作遊戲極具經典街機精神。 玩家要和一位孤獨的特務兼戰爭英雄，凱，一起駕馭重力迴路的神祕力量，在經歷了末日浩劫，且由有意識的機器人組成的世界裡冒險；更要踏上任務征程，從謎一般的病毒軍團手中拯救這顆星球。

en.name: Marie's Room
en.short_description: Marie's Room is a short story exploration game about an unconventional friendship between two classmates. You play as Kelsey, remembering Marie's room as it was twenty years ago. But something’s off. What happened to Marie?

tc.name: Marie's Room
tc.short_description: Marie's Room is a short story exploration game about an unconventional friendship between two classmates. You play as Kelsey, remembering Marie's room as it was twenty years ago. But something’s off. What happened to Marie?

en.name: Contrast
en.short_description: CONTRAST is a puzzle/platform game where you can move between a fantastic 3D world and a mysterious shadowy universe in 2D in the blink of an eye. Delve into a dreamlike and surreal 1920s world, inspired by the performance art world of vaudeville and film noir, and cradled by a smooth and sultry jazz ambiance.

en.name: Seek Girl Ⅵ
en.short_description: This is a casual Sokoban game. Players need to use the keyboard to control the male character to move to the female character to complete the task and move to the next level.

tc.name: Seek Girl Ⅵ
tc.short_description: 這是一款推箱子的休閑游戲。玩家需要控制男孩找到妹子完成任務進入下一關卡。巧妙的關卡設計和精美的角色立繪使玩家開動腦筋，發揮你的智慧，營救被困的妹子。

en.name: Geometry Wars™ 3: Dimensions Evolved
en.short_description: Experience the full evolution of the award-winning Geometry Wars franchise and battle through waves of enemies on 3D grids in this frenetic arcade shooter!

tc.name: Geometry Wars™ 3: Dimensions Evolved
tc.short_description: Experience the full evolution of the award-winning Geometry Wars franchise and battle through waves of enemies on 3D grids in this frenetic arcade shooter!

en.name: Shin Megami Tensei III Nocturne HD Remaster
en.short_description: Reawaken your inner demon in a modernized version of the acclaimed ATLUS classic, Shin Megami Tensei III Nocturne HD Remaster.

tc.name: 真・女神轉生III NOCTURNE HD REMASTER
tc.short_description: 於現代復甦的系列超級名作『真・女神轉生III NOCTURNE HD REMASTER』―― 讓體內的惡魔甦醒吧。

en.name: Seven: Enhanced Edition
en.short_description: Seven: Enhanced Edition is an open-world, isometric stealth and action role-playing game, in which you play as Teriel, a master thief sent on a mission that will shake the foundations of the Vetrall Empire. Includes the Drowned Past expansion.

tc.name: 七: 增强版
tc.short_description: Seven: Enhanced Edition is an open-world, isometric stealth and action role-playing game, in which you play as Teriel, a master thief sent on a mission that will shake the foundations of the Vetrall Empire. Includes the Drowned Past expansion.

en.name: Daylight
en.short_description: You awake, trapped in an abandoned hospital. Your only source of light is your phone. You hit a dead-end and must turn around, but behind you lurks an eerie presence and strange noises... Experience Daylight, a procedurally generated psychological thriller for your PC.

tc.name: Daylight
tc.short_description: You awake, trapped in an abandoned hospital. Your only source of light is your phone. You hit a dead-end and must turn around, but behind you lurks an eerie presence and strange noises... Experience Daylight, a procedurally generated psychological thriller for your PC.

en.name: PixelJunk™ Monsters Ultimate
en.short_description: Tikiman the Forest Defender is in trouble. Hordes of monsters are sweeping through his realm, hoping to chow down on his offspring – and it’s up to you to defend them. By placing weapon towers at strategic points around the landscape, you can destroy the invaders and save the little ones.

tc.short_description: Tikiman the Forest Defender is in trouble. Hordes of monsters are sweeping through his realm, hoping to chow down on his offspring – and it’s up to you to defend them. en.name: Totally Reliable Delivery Service
en.short_description: Delivery Attempted. That's the Totally Reliable Delivery Service guarantee! T.R.D.S. is a ragdoll physics simulation about terrible package delivery couriers. en.name: Garten of Banban 2

en.name: Fear Therapy
en.short_description: Fear Therapy, is a multiplayer(1-4) and single player psychological horror game.Try to complete the quests and leave the horror house before it is too late! Satan getting angrier every second and nothing holding it back.

en.name: Lucius III
en.short_description: Lucius is back. In a whole new narrative experience, he now returns to his old neighborhood of Winter Hill. The path will be a difficult one, with trials and tribulations waiting ahead. Has he made the right choices? Is it finally time to end it all?

tc.name: Lucius III

en.short_description: Build physically simulated rovers to transport awkwardly shaped cargo across the rugged terrain of Mars. Earn funds, unlock new parts, and use your ingenuity to help the Martians establish a new home. Playable solo or in online co-op!

tc.name: Mars First Logistics
tc.short_description: 一款開放世界物理模擬遊戲。 打造機械化探測器，在火星表面運輸奇形怪狀的貨物。 賺取資金、解鎖新零件，並用您的創造力建立一個新太空殖民地！ 可獨自進行遊戲或與人線上合作！

en.name: Heroes of the Three Kingdoms
en.short_description: 《三国群英传》是由宇峻奥汀（Odin）公司出品的一款策略战棋游戏，也是三国群英传系列的第一部作品 ，于1998年发布。 游戏按即时制展开，双方行动和交战同时进行。游戏进行的大致流程是“内政经营模式”到“大地战略模式”，然后到“战争发生”，再循环到“内政经营模式”。

tc.name: 三國群英傳
tc.short_description: 《三國群英傳》是由宇峻奧汀（Odin）公司出品的壹款策略戰棋遊戲，也是三國群英傳系列的第壹部作品 ，於1998年發布。 遊戲按即時制展開，雙方行動和交戰同時進行。遊戲進行的大致流程是“內政經營模式”到“大地戰略模式”，然後到“戰爭發生”，再循環到“內政經營模式”。

en.name: Nyaruru Fishy Fight

You take a mission, fly to the target ship, sneak inside, and make clever use of your gadgets to distract, ambush and take out the crew.

Explore different game-modes, maps, weapons, ship types and more while eliminating other crews in epic battles on land and sea!

tc.short_description: 在快節奏、玩家對戰制的海盜遊戲 Blazing Sails 中為生存而戰！創建你獨特、專屬的海盜與船艦。與其他玩家協力操縱你強大的船艦！不論是在海上還是陸上戰鬥，在你置身傳奇戰役消滅敵方團隊的同時，你可盡情探索各式遊戲模式、地圖、武器與船種等等！

en.name: (the) Gnorp Apologue
en.short_description: (the) Gnorp Apologue is the journey of the gnorps as you guide them towards their goal of delightfully excessive wealth accumulation.

tc.name: (the) Gnorp Apologue

Recruit heroes, train armies, build cities, forge alliances and save the world in this rich world where it's never the same game twice.

Water has become the most precious resource on the arid red planet, with a few companies fighting a perpetual war for its control.

en.name: Risen 3 - Titan Lords
en.short_description: The world has been abandoned by its gods and is scarred from the rampage of the Titans. Humanity is struggling to regain strength. You, however, have more pressing concerns: your own life has been shattered and you must set off to reclaim what is lost amidst the darkness spreading throughout the world.

en.name: Nunholy
en.short_description: In a world overrun by vampires, a group of nuns with their own stories have arrived at the Hunters' Guild. They are ready to wield any power—even that of demons—to defeat their enemies. What fate awaits them on this perilous journey?

en.name: hack_me
en.short_description: Hack_me is a hacker simulator game. The main objective in game – is to hack big companies's servers to show people that there is nothing in this world that protected on 100%. You’ll need to use your cmd, bruteforce, SQL-injectors and other programs to hack servers.

tc.name: Gloria Victis: Medieval MMORPG
tc.short_description: 《Gloria Victis》是一款侧重真实性的开放世界大型多人在线角色扮演游戏，背景设定为略带魔幻风格的中世纪。本游戏战斗系统无目标锁定机制，依赖玩家操作，玩家可在开放式的PVP战斗中争夺领土控制权。游戏的制造系统有深度而无所不包，经济系统由玩家主导，剧情成熟而宏大，画面写实而绚丽，向玩家呈现沉浸式的游戏体验。 游戏有两大阵营：居住在大草原上的自豪的中土人，以及住在寒冷北方又复仇心切的伊斯米尔人。玩家将选择一方加入，然后奔赴战场！

Defend yourself with realistic firearms, recover strange artifacts, scavenge for loot, and uncover the mysteries of this unforgiving dystopian environment.

If you are a player who pursues blood and is brave enough to challenge the limits, it will definitely inspire your adrenaline and bring you the best combat experience.

en.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 1
en.short_description: What's NEKOPARA? Why, it's a cat paradise! Kashou Minaduki, the son of a long line of Japanese confection makers moved out to open his own shop "La Soleil" as a patisserie.

tc.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 1
tc.short_description: 水無月嘉祥離開了經營著具有悠久傳統的和菓子老店的老家， 決心以西點師的身分，獨力開一間自己的蛋糕店"La Soleil"。 但是從老家寄來的搬家行李裡頭， 竟然混進了兩隻以前在老家養的人型貓，巧克力與香草。

en.name: Nobody - The Turnaround
en.short_description: Nobody – The Turnaround is a life simulator set in a parallel world that echoes modern society. Manage your time and resources carefully, strive to find a way through difficult times, and overcome the predicament you find yourself in.

tc.name: 大多數
tc.short_description: Nobody – The Turnaround is a life simulator set in a parallel world that echoes modern society. Manage your time and resources carefully, strive to find a way through difficult times, and overcome the predicament you find yourself in.

en.name: not available
en.short_description: You are a young teenage Jackie from the ghetto who wants to get out of poverty and embark on a journey of learning about the world and yourself. The world has definitely gone crazy, though it has never been normal, but maybe now is the chance for you. Crisis is a time for action and decisive steps...

tc.name: not available
tc.short_description: 你是一位來自貧民窟的青少年傑基，他想要擺脫貧困，踏上了解世界和自己的旅程。 這個世界肯定已經瘋了，雖然從來沒有正常過，但也許現在就是你的機會。 危機是採取行動和果斷步驟的時候……只是它很可怕，因為每一步都可能讓你倒退很多。 有時很難選擇正確的道路，但不要害怕，你總是可以重複，我們從錯誤中學習。 傑基必須明白，為了到達一個新的地方，你必須首先跳躍並離開地面，不知道未來會發生什麼...... 武士沒有目標，只有一條路，堅忍、耐心和狡猾將幫助你到達頂峰，但你永遠不知道那裡等待著什麼...... 向前？ “只有UP！ “Only UP！” 靈感來自童話故事“傑克和豆莖”，類似於平台遊戲。 你必須經歷與傑克相同的神話之路，才能取得比攀登頂峰更多的成就。

en.name: BIGFOOT
en.short_description: You are a Bigfoot hunter with an important mission: to put an end to rumours once and for all and prove to yourself that Bigfoot is not just a myth or an invention of the mind...

In this treacherous place, where the Baron’s Watch spreads a rising tide of fear and oppression, his skills are the only things he can trust. Even the most cautious citizens and their best-guarded possessions are not safe from his reach.

en.short_description: Take on the role of a private investigator in this immersive detective simulator. Solve murders and other crimes in a procedurally generated and persistent city where every NPC lives and breathes their own independent lives. Find the killer quickly… or they will kill again!

tc.short_description: 這是一款沉浸式沙盒偵探潛行遊戲，故事背景是模擬出來的犯罪腐敗城市，具有科幻及黑色電影的風格。化身成為私家調查偵探，進行任務賺取現金，並最終找到連環殺人魔。如果你不抓住對方，那個殺人魔就會再次犯案……

en.name: How to Survive 2
en.short_description: Dead or Alive? Make up your mind, stranger. We don’t like that undead business here in Louisiana…Survive solo or with friends as you look to fulfill your basic needs of food, water and shelter, crafting your own tools and weapons while you secure your camp and face flesh hungry zombies.

tc.name: How to Survive 2
tc.short_description: Dead or Alive? Make up your mind, stranger. We don’t like that undead business here in Louisiana…Survive solo or with friends as you look to fulfill your basic needs of food, water and shelter, crafting your own tools and weapons while you secure your camp and face flesh hungry zombies.

en.name: LEGO® Star Wars™ - The Complete Saga
en.short_description: Kick Some Brick in I through VI! Play through all six Star Wars movies in one videogame! Adding new characters, new levels, new features and for the first time ever, the chance to build and battle your way through a fun Star Wars galaxy on your PC!

tc.name: LEGO® Star Wars™ - The Complete Saga
tc.short_description: Kick Some Brick in I through VI! Play through all six Star Wars movies in one videogame! Adding new characters, new levels, new features and for the first time ever, the chance to build and battle your way through a fun Star Wars galaxy on your PC!

en.name: Yakuza Kiwami (Legacy)
en.short_description: SEGA’s critically-acclaimed entry that started a legend. Become Kazuma Kiryu, an up-and-coming yakuza who takes the fall for the murder of a crime boss, only to emerge from prison ten years later to a changed world. Remastered from the ground up, now in 4K and uncapped framerates on PC.

tc.name: 人中之龍 極 [Legacy]
tc.short_description: 自2005年誕生以來持續熱賣的系列作，其原點的第一部作品《人中之龍》的完全重製作品《人中之龍 極》登場！與「100億的少女」的相遇，將「傳說之龍」捲入陰謀的漩渦之中。

en.name: Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA Mega Mix+
en.short_description: Take center stage in Hatsune Miku’s premier rhythm game starring the world’s #1 virtual pop star! With a stunner setlist and enormous wardrobe to style, it’s Miku’s ultimate tour—all it needs is you.

tc.name: 初音未來 Project DIVA MEGA39’s＋
tc.short_description: 虛擬歌手「初音未來」主演的節奏遊戲最新力作『初音未來 Project DIVA MEGA39's+』正式在Steam登場！ 「Project DIVA」系列集大成之作升級後回歸。 可遊玩為初音未來寫下精彩歷史的共170首以上的首樂曲的節奏遊戲！ 收錄400件以上的服裝模組（服裝）。 本作遊玩時的3DPV可切換「Future Tone原版」及「動漫風」

en.name: Universe Sandbox
en.short_description: Create & destroy on an unimaginable scale with a realistic physics-based space simulator. Explore the beauty of our universe and the fragility of our planet. Use science to bend the laws of gravity, collide planets, boil away oceans, fire epic space lasers, and customize your universe.

tc.name: Universe Sandbox
tc.short_description: 在不可想象的尺度上進行創造和毀滅... 壹款結合了實時模擬重力、氣候、碰撞和物質相互作用功能的宇宙模擬軟件，讓妳感受宇宙的神奇和我們星球的脆弱。現已支持HTC Vive、Oculus Rift+Touch和Windows MR。

en.name: The Elder Scrolls III: Morrowind® Game of the Year Edition
en.short_description: The Elder Scrolls III: Morrowind® Game of the Year Edition includes Morrowind plus all of the content from the Bloodmoon and Tribunal expansions. The original Mod Construction Set is not included in this package. An epic, open-ended single-player RPG, Morrowind allows you to create and play any kind of character imaginable.

tc.name: The Elder Scrolls III: Morrowind® Game of the Year Edition
tc.short_description: The Elder Scrolls III: Morrowind® Game of the Year Edition includes Morrowind plus all of the content from the Bloodmoon and Tribunal expansions. The original Mod Construction Set is not included in this package. An epic, open-ended single-player RPG, Morrowind allows you to create and play any kind of character imaginable.

en.name: Call of Juarez: Gunslinger
en.short_description: From the dust of a gold mine to the dirt of a saloon, Call of Juarez® Gunslinger is a real homage to the Wild West tales. Live the epic and violent journey of a ruthless bounty hunter on the trail of the West’s most notorious outlaws.

tc.name: Call of Juarez: Gunslinger
tc.short_description: 從金礦的塵土到酒館的泥土，《Call of Juarez® Gunslinger》是對狂野西部軼事致敬的作品。玩家將扮演一名冷酷無情的賞金獵人，踏上充滿暴力元素的史詩級旅程，追捕西部最惡名昭彰的法外之徒。

en.name: Call of Cthulhu®
en.short_description: 1924. Private Investigator Pierce is sent to look into the tragic death of the Hawkins family. Plunge into a world of creeping madness and cosmic horror. Cryptic clues, shadowy figures, and pure terror bar your way as you fight to retain your sanity and solve an otherworldly mystery.

tc.name: Call of Cthulhu®

Cryptic clues, shadowy figures, and pure terror bar your way as you fight to retain your sanity and solve an otherworldly mystery.

en.name: Little Kitty, Big City
en.short_description: You're a curious little kitty with a big personality, on an adventure to find your way back home. Explore the city, make new friends with stray animals, wear delightful hats, and leave more than a little chaos in your wake. After all, isn't that what cats do best?

tc.name: 小貓咪大城市 Little Kitty, Big City
tc.short_description: 扮演一只個性十足的好奇小貓，踏上尋找回家之路的大冒險！探索這座巨大的城市，結交各色的流浪動物朋友，戴上可愛的帽子裝扮，順便再製造一點小混亂...誰讓搞怪搗蛋是我們貓咪的拿手好戲呢？

en.name: Krunker
en.short_description: An easy to get into fully moddable First Person Shooter with advanced movement mechanics. Fully Customizable with Mods, Custom Maps and Thousands of Items to Unlock.

tc.name: Krunker
tc.short_description: An easy to get into fully moddable First Person Shooter with advanced movement mechanics. Fully Customizable with Mods, Custom Maps and Thousands of Items to Unlock.

en.name: Counter-Strike: Condition Zero
en.short_description: With its extensive Tour of Duty campaign, a near-limitless number of skirmish modes, updates and new content for Counter-Strike's award-winning multiplayer game play, plus over 12 bonus single player missions, Counter-Strike: Condition Zero is a tremendous offering of single and multiplayer content.

tc.name: Counter-Strike: Condition Zero
tc.short_description: 《絕對武力：一觸即發》不但有精心製作的 Tour of Duty (使命召喚) 戰役、幾近無限變化的對抗模式、絕對武力多人連線遊戲的更新和新增內容，更有超過 12 個額外單機任務。不管是單人還是多人遊戲，都絕對不容錯過。

en.name: Backrooms: Escape Together
en.short_description: A visually lifelike co-op horror for 1-6 people. Journey through 10 procedurally generated levels, using what's available to survive and progress deeper into the Backrooms.

tc.name: Backrooms: Escape Together
tc.short_description: A visually lifelike co-op horror for 1-6 people. Journey through 10 procedurally generated levels, using what's available to survive and progress deeper into the Backrooms.

en.name: The Banner Saga
en.short_description: Live through an epic role-playing Viking saga where your strategic choices directly affect your personal journey. Make allies as you travel with your caravan across this stunning yet harsh landscape. Carefully choose those who will help fight a new threat that jeopardizes an entire civilization.

tc.name: The Banner Saga

Make allies as you travel with your caravan across this stunning yet harsh landscape. Carefully choose those who will help fight a new threat that jeopardizes an entire civilization.

tc.short_description: 廣受好評的太空飛行模擬遊戲《坎巴拉太空計畫》推出續作：《坎巴拉太空計畫2》。在新一代的太空探索任務中，除了有令人期待的全新零件、震撼人心的視覺效果，還可體驗全面進化的使用者介面和視圖景觀功能，並提供豐富且更為刺激的太空場景，讓您盡情探索其中奧秘。

en.name: Dragon Age™: The Veilguard
en.short_description: Unite the Veilguard and defy the gods in Dragon Age™: The Veilguard, an immersive single-player RPG.

en.name: A Bird Story
en.short_description: An experimental short from the creator of To the Moon & Finding Paradise: A simple & surreal 1-hour interactive animation about a boy and an injured bird, told without dialogues.If you're looking for To the Moon-like experience, I'd suggest playing Finding Paradise first.

en.short_description: The Past Within is the new co-op experience from Rusty Lake! Play together with someone you deem trustworthy: one in The Past, the other in The Future. Observe and communicate what you see around you. Solve the puzzles and uncover Albert Vanderboom’s plan.

tc.name: The Past Within
tc.short_description: The Past Within是一款由Rusty Lake新推出的雙人合作遊戲！與你所信賴的朋友一同遊玩：一人存於過去，一人存於未來。和朋友一起交流所觀察到的一切，解決Albert Vanderboom的迷霧與計畫。

en.name: Dawn of Man
en.short_description: Command a settlement of ancient humans, guide them through the ages in their struggle for survival. Hunt, gather, craft tools, fight, research new techs and face the challenges the environment will throw at you.

tc.name: Dawn of Man

en.name: Gunpoint
en.short_description: Gunpoint is a stealth puzzle game that lets you rewire its levels to trick people. You play a freelance spy who takes jobs from his clients to break into high security buildings and steal sensitive data.

en.short_description: Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines RTS by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Please visit the "Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition" page for additional user reviews.

en.short_description: An accidental fire at a funeral forces the police to re-investigate a closed case of massacre. Lin Lixun participates the re-investigation by chances. As the investigation goes deeper, the past of the victims gradually emerges. However, the case becomes more bewildering.

en.short_description: Don the Ancient Mask. Wield the power of gods. Possess any of your tribespeople, recruit followers, and build a thriving automated civilization. Survive, expand, and forge your own legacy across a vast ancient open world — together with friends.

tc.short_description: 戴上遠古面甲，獲得神明之力，操控任意部落成員，招募族人並建立自動化部落，與朋友一起在龐大的古文明開放世界中生存、擴張並創造屬於你的文明。

en.name: F1® 24

en.name: Placid Plastic Duck Simulator
en.short_description: The ultimate high-tech rubber duck simulation, Placid Plastic Duck brings you dangerous levels of relaxation. With chill music, dreamy 3D graphics, and many different happy ducks, your only priority is to float around. Zero Ducks given.

tc.name: Placid Plastic Duck Simulator
tc.short_description: 究極高科技橡皮鴨模擬，療癒橡皮鴨模擬器為您獻呈達到臨界水平的放鬆體驗。輕鬆的音樂﹑夢幻的 3D 畫面﹑眾多不同的快樂小鴨。您唯一要做的事就是隨意浮沉。什麼都不用「鳥」。

en.name: SANABI
en.short_description: SANABI is an exhilarating stylish dystopian action-platformer. Play as a legendary retired veteran and use your signature prosthetic arm to jump over cliffs and skyscrapers, zip through bullets and traps and defeat powerful enemies.

en.short_description: It is four thousand years before the Galactic Empire and hundreds of Jedi Knights have fallen in battle against the ruthless Sith. You are the last hope of the Jedi Order. Can you master the awesome power of the Force on your quest to save the Republic? Or will you fall to the lure of the dark side?

en.name: Isonzo
en.short_description: Ferocious Alpine warfare will test your tactical skills in this authentic WW1 FPS. Battle among the scenic peaks, rugged valleys and idyllic towns of northern Italy. The Great War on the Italian Front is brought to life and elevated to unexpected heights!

tc.name: Isonzo
tc.short_description: 兇猛的阿爾卑斯山地戰將考驗你在這個真實一戰 FPS 中的戰術技巧。在義大利北部風景優美的山峰、崎嶇的山谷和田園詩般的城鎮中作戰。將義大利戰線上的偉大戰爭帶到了生活中，並提升到了意想不到的境界！

en.name: Outward Definitive Edition
en.short_description: No remarkable journey is achieved without great effort. In Outward, the cold of the night or an infected wound can be as dangerous as a predator lurking in the dark. Explore the vast world of Aurai solo or in Co-op. The Definitive Edition features both DLCs and quality of life improvements.

en.short_description: The Lich has thrown the world into a timeless loop and plunged its inhabitants into never ending chaos. Wield an expanding deck of mystical cards to place enemies, buildings, and terrain along each unique expedition loop for the brave hero.

en.name: For The King

tc.name: Florence
tc.short_description: 二十五歲時，Florence Yeoh感覺有點困惑。她的生活是日復一日地工作、睡覺，以及在社交媒體上打發大量時間。直到有一天，她遇到了一位名叫Krish的大提琴手，他改變了她眼中的整個世界。

en.name: Wasteland 3

tc.name: Wasteland 3

en.name: Mafia
en.short_description: It’s 1930. After an inadvertent brush with the mafia, cabdriver Tommy Angelo is reluctantly thrust into the world of organized crime. Initially, he is uneasy about falling in with the Salieri family, but soon the rewards become too big to ignore.

tc.name: Mafia
tc.short_description: 時值1930年。意外與黑手黨接觸的計程車司機Tommy Angelo不情願地加入了黑社會。起先，他為加入Salieri家族感到不安，但沒過多久，豐厚的獎賞多到讓他難以抗拒。隨著他的地位提昇，報酬變得愈來愈豐厚，但差事也變得更加骯髒齷齪。Tommy或許終能贏得Salieri家族的敬重，但成為黑幫份子將讓他對自己選擇的新生活感到更加的矛盾衝突。

en.name: Gears 5
en.short_description: From one of gaming’s most acclaimed sagas, Gears is bigger than ever. With all-out war descending, Kait Diaz breaks away to uncover her connection to the enemy and discovers the true danger to Sera – herself.

tc.name: Gears 5

tc.name: ISLANDERS
tc.short_description: ISLANDERS is a minimalist strategy game about building cities on colorful islands.

en.name: The Forever Winter
en.short_description: The Forever Winter is a tactical shooter where you and your squad must loot the dead to survive under the shadow of terrifying and gargantuan war machines locked in a never-ending conflict. Millions of deaths later the war continues with our latest update!

tc.name: The Forever Winter
tc.short_description: 《永恒的冬天》是一款合作战术生存恐怖射击游戏。你和小队必须在可怕巨型的战争机器阴影下，在永无止境的冲突中，掠夺死尸， 搏命生存。

en.name: Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy
en.short_description: Fire up a wild ride across the cosmos with a fresh take on Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy. In this action-adventure game, you are Star-Lord leading the unpredictable Guardians from one explosion of chaos to the next. You got this. Probably.

tc.name: Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy
tc.short_description: 《漫威星際異攻隊》將帶你踏上盪氣迴腸、驚險萬分的星際之旅，透過令人耳目一新的視角任你馳騁星際、縱橫宇宙。玩家將在這部動作冒險遊戲扮演星爵，率領一言不合就爆走的星際異攻隊，闖過一場又一場昏天暗地的大混戰。你沒問題的。應該啦。

en.name: Football Manager 2022
en.short_description: The closest thing to real football management. FM22 brings new, progressive ways to find your winning edge, instill your footballing style and earn it on the pitch.

tc.name: Football Manager 2022
tc.short_description: 最貼近真實足球經理的體驗。《FM22》迎來創新功能，讓你尋找致勝的關鍵，實現你的球風，贏得全場喝采。

en.name: STAR WARS™ Republic Commando™
en.short_description: You are the leader of an elite squad of Republic Commandos, your mission is to infiltrate, dominate, and ultimately, annihilate the enemy. Your squad will follow your orders and your lead, working together as a team - instinctively, intelligently, instantly. You are their leader. They are your weapon.

tc.name: STAR WARS™ Republic Commando™
tc.short_description: You are the leader of an elite squad of Republic Commandos, your mission is to infiltrate, dominate, and ultimately, annihilate the enemy. Your squad will follow your orders and your lead, working together as a team - instinctively, intelligently, instantly. You are their leader. They are your weapon.

en.name: For The King II
en.short_description: Battle against Fahrul's tyrannical Queen alone or as a party of four players in the sequel to For The King, the massively popular turn-based roguelite tabletop RPG. Will you unravel the once beloved Queen's terrible secret?

tc.name: 為了吾王 II / For the King II
tc.short_description: 《為了吾王》是結合桌遊與 Roguelike 元素的熱門回合制角色扮演遊戲。在這款續作中，你將獨自對抗專橫的法汝女王，或是組成四人小隊展開冒險。對於曾經備受愛戴的女王，你能夠揭開她的可怕秘密嗎？

en.name: Cossacks 3
en.short_description: Cossacks 3 is the return of RTS classics. Obtain resources, build cities and research technologies while taking command of great armies, crushing enemies in grand historical warfares on land and sea!

tc.name: Cossacks 3
tc.short_description: Cossacks 3 is the return of RTS classics. Obtain resources, build cities and research technologies while taking command of great armies, crushing enemies in grand historical warfares on land and sea!

en.name: Sanfu
en.short_description: 2000年，山城市新闻频道的电视画面莫名跳出一则旧广告，而广告的代言人是已经去世的特异功能少年——三眼神童。有传闻三眼神童的亡魂劫持了电视信号。 调查局受命展开调查。随着调查的深入，一个藏在黑暗处的犯罪团伙逐渐浮出水面。

tc.name: 三伏
tc.short_description: 2000年，山城市新闻频道的电视画面莫名跳出一则旧广告，而广告的代言人是已经去世的特异功能少年——三眼神童。有传闻三眼神童的亡魂劫持了电视信号。 调查局受命展开调查。随着调查的深入，一个藏在黑暗处的犯罪团伙逐渐浮出水面。

en.name: Worms W.M.D
en.short_description: The worms are back in their most destructive game yet. With a gorgeous, hand-drawn 2D look, brand new weapons, the introduction of crafting, vehicles and buildings plus the return of some much-loved classic weapons and gameplay, Worms W.M.D is the best worms experience ever.

tc.name: Worms W.M.D
tc.short_description: The worms are back in their most destructive game yet. With a gorgeous, hand-drawn 2D look, brand new weapons, the introduction of crafting, vehicles and buildings plus the return of some much-loved classic weapons and gameplay, Worms W.M.D is the best worms experience ever.

en.name: LEGO® Worlds
en.short_description: Experience a galaxy of Worlds made entirely from LEGO bricks. EXPLORE gigantic landscapes, DISCOVER countless surprises, and CREATE anything you can imagine by building with LEGO bricks.

tc.name: LEGO® Worlds
tc.short_description: 體驗完全由 LEGO 積木構成的宇宙星系。探索巨大的景觀、發現無數的驚喜，並使用 LEGO 積木創造出你所能想像的任何東西。

en.name: DCS World Steam Edition
en.short_description: Feel the excitement of flying the Su-25T "Frogfoot" attack jet and the TF-51D "Mustang" in the free-to-play Digital Combat Simulator World!

tc.name: DCS World Steam Edition
tc.short_description: Feel the excitement of flying the Su-25T "Frogfoot" attack jet and the TF-51D "Mustang" in the free-to-play Digital Combat Simulator World!

en.name: Outcore: Desktop Adventure
en.short_description: All you wanted was a nice game. But now you find yourself opening Windows apps like Paint & Notepad to solve puzzles, and searching for files on your computers that you didn't put there... Who is she? Why did she appear on your desktop? Let's dive into her memories and find out.

tc.name: Outcore: Desktop Adventure
tc.short_description: 你本來只是想輕輕鬆鬆的玩個遊戲。但你發覺你現在會開啟小畫家和筆記本來解謎，又會在你的硬碟裡搜尋你從沒有建立過的檔案...... 她是誰？為什麼她會在你電腦的桌面上出現？我們來潛入她的記​憶來找出答案吧。

en.name: Dragon Age™ Inquisition
en.short_description: Winner of over 130 Game of the Year awards, discover the definitive Dragon Age: Inquisition experience. The Game of the Year Edition includes the critically acclaimed game, all three official add-ons - Jaws of Hakkon, The Descent, and Trespasser - and more.

tc.name: 《闇龍紀元異端審判》
tc.short_description: 拯救 Thedas 之戰的每個選擇都很重要。創造英雄、選擇技能，並組成隊伍，根絕世上惡魔。

en.name: Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes
en.short_description: Find yourself trapped alone in a room with a ticking time bomb. Your friends have the manual to defuse it, but they can't see the bomb, so you're going to have to talk it out – fast!

tc.name: Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes
tc.short_description: 你發現自己與一個正在倒數的計時炸彈獨處一室，而你的夥伴則拿着拆彈手冊，但他們卻看不見你手中的炸彈... 快點開始說話來拆彈吧！ 遊戲爲本地合作類遊戲，需要最少兩名玩家。

en.name: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
en.short_description: Explore the world with our largest fleet of aircraft and take simulation to new heights while pursuing your aviation career within Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024.

tc.name: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
tc.short_description: 透過《Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024》，與我們規模最大的飛機艦隊一起探索世界，將模擬提升到新高度，同時追逐你的航空職涯。

en.name: Party Hard
en.short_description: It's 3:00 a.m. Your neighbours are having a loud party. Stop them. Party Hard is tinyBuild's award-winning stealth strategy game about ruining parties by any means.

tc.name: Party Hard
tc.short_description: It's 3:00 a.m. Your neighbours are having a loud party. Stop them. Party Hard is tinyBuild's award-winning stealth strategy game about ruining parties by any means.

en.name: Natural Selection 2
en.short_description: A fast paced multiplayer shooter that pits aliens against humans in a strategic and action-packed struggle for survival!

tc.name: Natural Selection 2
tc.short_description: A fast paced multiplayer shooter that pits aliens against humans in a strategic and action-packed struggle for survival!

en.name: Tales of the Black Forest
en.short_description: In a world filled with yōkai, a surging dark power has overshadowed a Japanese town. A group of 2 developers have produced a Japanese pixel adventure game to tell a tale that dates back to the Heisei era...In the name of dreams and passion.

tc.name: Tales of the Black Forest
tc.short_description: 暗潮湧動的日本小鎮，詭異多彩的妖怪世界，如煙花般綺麗的平成怪談物語……兩人團隊打造的日式像素風奇幻冒險遊戲，致敬自由、浪漫與夢想。

en.name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2015
en.short_description: New cars, new tools, new options, more parts and much more fun in the next version of Car Mechanic Simulator! Take your wrench! Create and expand your auto repairs service empire. Car Mechanic Simulator 2015 will take you behind the scenes of daily routine in car workshop.

tc.name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2015
tc.short_description: New cars, new tools, new options, more parts and much more fun in the next version of Car Mechanic Simulator! Take your wrench! Create and expand your auto repairs service empire. Car Mechanic Simulator 2015 will take you behind the scenes of daily routine in car workshop.

en.name: Blasphemous 2
en.short_description: The Penitent One awakens as Blasphemous 2 joins him once again in an endless struggle against The Miracle. Dive into a perilous new world filled with mysteries and secrets to discover, and tear your way through monstrous foes that stand between you and your quest to end the cycle once and for all.

tc.name: Blasphemous 2
tc.short_description: Penitent One 在《Blasphemous 2》醒來，再次陷入對抗 Miracle 永無休止的旅程。深入這個危險新世界，裡頭充滿謎團和秘密等待您去發現，眾多可怕敵人將阻擋您完成目標，您必須殺出一條血路，想辦法徹底終結這個循環。

en.name: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines
en.short_description: Vampire®: The Masquerade-Bloodlines™ delivers a new type of RPG experience-one that blends all the core elements of a traditional RPG with the graphical richness, immediacy and brutal combat of a first-person action game. The game plunges players into the dark and gritty vampire underworld of modern-day L.A. as a creature of the night.

tc.name: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines
tc.short_description: Vampire®: The Masquerade-Bloodlines™ 帶來新種角色扮演體驗，融合傳統角色扮演遊戲的核心要素，再配上第一人稱動作遊戲的精美畫面、臨場刺激與野蠻搏鬥。 這款遊戲把玩家拉進現代洛杉磯黑暗而血腥的吸血鬼地下世界， 成為夜世界的一員。 玩家要運用種類繁多的吸血鬼能力和武器，擊敗人類和其他吸血鬼，在此過程中培養角色的能力、與其他角色互動，並解決劇情任務。 這款遊戲採用 Valve 的 Source 技術，遊戲設計則源自 White Wolf 熱門的紙上角色扮演系列 Vampire: The Masquerade 及其官方氏族。

en.name: Supreme Commander 2
en.short_description: Includes 47 Steam achievements, leaderboards, and stats!

tc.name: Supreme Commander 2
tc.short_description: Includes 47 Steam achievements, leaderboards, and stats!

en.name: Goat Simulator 3
en.short_description: Pilgor's baaack! Gather your herd and venture forth into Goat Simulator 3; an all-new (at least on Steam), totally realistic, sandbox farmyard experience. Invite up to three friends in local or online co-op, create carnage as a team, or compete in mini-games and then not be friends anymore.

tc.name: 《模擬山羊3》
tc.short_description: Pilgor重出江湖！ 召集夥伴一起進入《Goat Simulator 3》的世界，在極具真實感的農場沙盒場景中體驗一場全新冒險（至少在Steam上是這樣）。你最多可邀請三位好友進行本機遊戲或線上合作，既可組隊廝殺，也能在小遊戲中拼個你死我活，當然，恐怕從此連朋友都沒得做。

en.name: Supraland
en.short_description: Try the demo! A mix between Portal, Zelda and Metroid. Exploration, puzzles, terrible combat, secret upgrades and new abilities that help you reach new places. Playtime 12-25h.

tc.name: Supraland
tc.short_description: 先玩看看試玩版吧! 混合了傳送門、薩爾達和銀河戰士。探索、尋找隱藏的升級道具，解開謎題、擊敗怪獸或是尋找新的能力幫助你到達新的地區。

en.name: Call of Duty®: WWII
en.short_description: Call of Duty®: WWII - a breathtaking experience that redefines World War II.

tc.name: Call of Duty®: WWII
tc.short_description: 《決勝時刻®：二戰》──扣人心弦的遊戲體驗，重新定義第二次世界大戰。

en.name: Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered
en.short_description: Feel the thrill of the chase and the rush of escape behind the wheels of the world’s hottest high-performance cars in Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered– a heart-pumping, socially competitive racing experience.

tc.name: 《極速快感™：超熱力追緝》重製版
tc.short_description: 在《極速快感™：超熱力追緝》重製版中駕駛全世界最火熱的高性能車款，感受追逐的快感與逃脫的亢奮，體會令人心跳加速的社群競速體驗。

en.name: Shadowrun Returns
en.short_description: The unique cyberpunk-meets-fantasy world of Shadowrun has gained a huge cult following since its creation nearly 25 years ago. Now, creator Jordan Weisman returns to the world of Shadowrun, modernizing this classic game setting as a single player, turn-based tactical RPG.

tc.name: Shadowrun Returns
tc.short_description: The unique cyberpunk-meets-fantasy world of Shadowrun has gained a huge cult following since its creation nearly 25 years ago. Now, creator Jordan Weisman returns to the world of Shadowrun, modernizing this classic game setting as a single player, turn-based tactical RPG.

en.name: Subsistence
en.short_description: Subsistence is a sandbox, first person, solo or co-op, PvE open-world survival game. Struggle through changing seasons to build a base, develop technology and gear-up in the hostile environment. Defend yourself from wildlife, the elements and AI hunters (who also build bases in the world).

tc.name: Subsistence
tc.short_description: 荒野求生 是一個沙盒式 , 第一人稱視角 , 可單機或聯機 , PvE 開放式生存遊戲 . 在變換的季節中努力求生建造基地 , 發展科技和武裝自己以應付危險的環境. 保護自己免於被野生動物吃掉 , 和 環境因素 跟 NPC獵人(獵人也會建立自己的營地)

en.name: Block N Load
en.short_description: Five of you. Five of them. Face off in a battle where everything you build, destroy, construct or shoot has a devastating impact on the entire game. Build defences using a crazy range of block types and work together in this FPS where no game is EVER the same. NOW FREE TO PLAY.

tc.name: Block N Load
tc.short_description: Five of you. Five of them. Face off in a battle where everything you build, destroy, construct or shoot has a devastating impact on the entire game. Build defences using a crazy range of block types and work together in this FPS where no game is EVER the same. NOW FREE TO PLAY.

en.name: FAR: Lone Sails
en.short_description: Traverse a dried-out seabed littered with the remains of a decaying civilization. Keep your unique vessel going, overcome numerous obstacles and withstand the hazardous weather conditions. How far can you make it? What will you find?

tc.name: FAR: Lone Sails
tc.short_description: 在散佈著衰落文明遺跡的乾涸海床上穿行。讓自己獨特的小車不斷前行，克服重重的障礙，抵禦危險的天氣。你能行多遠？你能找到什麼？

en.name: Machinarium
en.short_description: Machinarium is the award-winning independent adventure game developed by the makers of Samorost series, Botanicula and CHUCHEL. Help Josef the robot save his girlfriend Berta kidnapped by the Black Cap Brotherhood gang!

tc.name: 機械迷城 (Machinarium)
tc.short_description: 《機械迷城（Machinarium）》中每個角色都是機器人,包括我們的小英雄,他將為了對付壞人並解救自己的女朋友展開了一系列的解謎，沒有多餘的對白，遊戲情節和線索皆靠細膩的動畫來表現。

en.name: 港詭實錄ParanormalHK
en.short_description: Paranormal HK is a first person horror game about Urban legends of Hong Kong, China. The story is about a crew of online supernatural channel“Beyond the Invisible” went to Kowloon Walled City to film a short movie for their latest episode and encountered something out of their expectations.

tc.name: 港詭實錄
tc.short_description: 《港詭實錄》是一款以中國香港都市傳說為題材的第一人稱恐怖冒險遊戲。故事講述一群年輕人為了錄製探靈節目“逃出靈界點”，來到九龍城寨遺址。然而這次的錄製卻因為一些突發事件變得詭異起來……

en.name: Horizon Forbidden West™ Complete Edition
en.short_description: Experience the epic Horizon Forbidden West™ in its entirety with bonus content and the Burning Shores expansion included. The Burning Shores add-on contains additional content for Aloy’s adventure, including new storylines, characters, and experiences in a stunning yet hazardous new area.

tc.name: 《地平線 西域禁地》完全版
tc.short_description: 體驗磅礴鉅作《地平線 西域禁地》完全版，收錄特典和〈炙炎海岸〉擴充內容。 〈炙炎海岸〉追加內容提供更多亞蘿伊冒險的遊戲內容，包含在美麗又致命的新地區展開的全新劇情、新角色與遊戲體驗。

en.name: House Party
en.short_description: House Party is an edgy comedy adventure game inspired by classic comedies of the '90s. Every decision changes your story and every character has something to reveal. There’s also a button to take your pants off.

tc.name: House Party
tc.short_description: 你被邀请来到了House Party！这是属于你的夜晚！你可以选择好好做人，或者做个讨人厌的混蛋！新的故事线和选择都将取决于你的选择！快啦吧，派对已经开始了，就等你出场啦！

en.name: There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension
en.short_description: There is no game. So don't go messing things up by clicking everywhere. You don’t want to be kicked out of your video game world, do you? Of course not!

tc.name: There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension
tc.short_description: There is no game. So don't go messing things up by clicking everywhere. You don’t want to be kicked out of your video game world, do you? Of course not!

en.name: Aliens: Fireteam Elite
en.short_description: Aliens: Fireteam Elite is a cooperative third-person survival game set in the iconic Alien Universe. Battle through hordes of different types of Xenomorph, customize your character and gear, and level-up as you try to contain this ever-growing threat.

tc.name: Aliens: Fireteam Elite
tc.short_description: 《異形：特戰菁英》是第三人稱合作生存遊戲，背景設定在著名的異形宇宙。在你嘗試遏止這日益擴大的威脅的征途中，與不同種類的異形群戰鬥、自訂你的角色和裝備，並提升等級。

en.name: Fallout 3
en.short_description: Vault-Tec engineers have worked around the clock on an interactive reproduction of Wasteland life for you to enjoy from the comfort of your own vault. Included is an expansive world, unique combat, shockingly realistic visuals, tons of player choice, and an incredible cast of dynamic characters.

tc.name: Fallout 3
tc.short_description: Vault-Tec engineers have worked around the clock on an interactive reproduction of Wasteland life for you to enjoy from the comfort of your own vault. Included is an expansive world, unique combat, shockingly realistic visuals, tons of player choice, and an incredible cast of dynamic characters.

en.name: Amazing Frog?
en.short_description: Amazing Frog? is an openworld, sandbox, physics game. Grand Frog Auto in Swindon, with farting ragdoll frogs.

tc.name: Amazing Frog?
tc.short_description: Amazing Frog? is an openworld, sandbox, physics game. Grand Frog Auto in Swindon, with farting ragdoll frogs.

en.name: Amnesia: The Dark Descent
en.short_description: Amnesia: The Dark Descent, a first person survival horror. A game about immersion, discovery and living through a nightmare. An experience that will chill you to the core.

tc.name: Amnesia: The Dark Descent
tc.short_description: Amnesia: The Dark Descent, a first person survival horror. A game about immersion, discovery and living through a nightmare. An experience that will chill you to the core.

en.name: Guns of Icarus Online
en.short_description: Assemble your crew, take to the skies in the premier PvP airship combat game. Guns of Icarus Online is all about flying massive airships, shooting big turret weapons, and working as a team for supremacy of the skies. Everyone as one, victory or death, together.

tc.name: Guns of Icarus Online
tc.short_description: Assemble your crew, take to the skies in the premier PvP airship combat game. Guns of Icarus Online is all about flying massive airships, shooting big turret weapons, and working as a team for supremacy of the skies. Everyone as one, victory or death, together.

en.name: Rayman® Legends
en.short_description: Michel Ancel, the celebrated creator of Rayman®, Beyond Good & Evil®, and the Raving Rabbids®, returns to unleash his innovative creativity on this new entry into the Rayman® franchise.When Rayman, Globox, and the Teensies discover a mysterious tent filled with captivating paintings, they are suddenly transported to a series of...

tc.short_description: Michel Ancel, the celebrated creator of Rayman®, Beyond Good & Evil®, and the Raving Rabbids®, returns to unleash his innovative creativity on this new entry into the Rayman® franchise.When Rayman, Globox, and the Teensies discover a mysterious tent filled with captivating paintings, they are suddenly transported to a series of...

en.name: Psychonauts
en.short_description: A Psychic Odyssey Through the Minds of Misfits, Monsters, and Madmen. This classic action/adventure platformer from acclaimed developers Double Fine Productions follows the story of a young psychic named Razputin.

tc.name: Psychonauts
tc.short_description: A Psychic Odyssey Through the Minds of Misfits, Monsters, and Madmen. This classic action/adventure platformer from acclaimed developers Double Fine Productions follows the story of a young psychic named Razputin.

en.name: Transformice
en.short_description: Transformice is an MMO platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese! Will the almighty Shaman help you or just ruin everything? Millions of levels, hectic physics, skill trees, and more importantly... hats!

tc.name: Transformice
tc.short_description: Transformice is an MMO platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese! Will the almighty Shaman help you or just ruin everything? Millions of levels, hectic physics, skill trees, and more importantly... hats!

en.name: Sun Haven
en.short_description: Build your farm and relationships with townsfolk, or forge ahead on a quest of magic, monsters, and dragons. Level up through a skill tree in 8 person multiplayer, or adventure solo!

tc.name: Sun Haven
tc.short_description: 建造你的農場和與村民的關係，或在魔法、怪物和龍的任務中前進。透過 8 人多人模式的技能樹升級，或單獨冒險！

en.name: Baldur's Gate II: Enhanced Edition
en.short_description: Rediscover the beloved RPG classic— now enhanced for modern adventurers! Gather your party of heroes and continue the legendary adventure in this story-rich fantasy epic where every choice matters.

tc.name: Baldur's Gate II: Enhanced Edition
tc.short_description: Rediscover the beloved RPG classic— now enhanced for modern adventurers! Gather your party of heroes and continue the legendary adventure in this story-rich fantasy epic where every choice matters.

en.name: Sanctum 2
en.short_description: Sanctum 2 is the sequel to the world’s first Tower Defense/FPS hybrid game. Pick from four unique character classes and embark on a mission to protect the oxygen-producing Cores from hordes of deadly aliens who are threatened by their existence.

tc.name: Sanctum 2
tc.short_description: Sanctum 2 is the sequel to the world’s first Tower Defense/FPS hybrid game. Pick from four unique character classes and embark on a mission to protect the oxygen-producing Cores from hordes of deadly aliens who are threatened by their existence.

en.name: Skater XL - The Ultimate Skateboarding Game
en.short_description: Experience unparalleled board control and responsiveness while you skate iconic real-world skate spots. This is the evolution of skateboarding gameplay. With Independent Foot Control and unique physics-based gameplay, skate gamers finally have the expressive controls they have always dreamed of.

tc.name: Skater XL - The Ultimate Skateboarding Game
tc.short_description: 體驗無與倫比的滑板控制和回應性，在具代表性的現實世界滑板地點滑行。這是一款革命性的滑板遊戲。透過獨立的腳部控制和獨特的物理引擎遊玩體驗，滑板遊戲玩家終於能夠擁有夢寐以求的自由操控體驗。

en.name: Torchlight III
en.short_description: In Torchlight III, Novastraia is again under threat of invasion and it’s up to you to defend against the Netherim and its allies. Gather your wits and brave the frontier to find fame, glory, and new adventures!

tc.name: Torchlight III
tc.short_description: 《火炬之光 2》的事件已經過去了一個世紀，燼石帝國進入衰退期。在《火炬之光 3》中，諾瓦特拉亞再一次陷入遭到侵略的危機之中，你必須挺身而出抵擋冥裔和它們的幫兇。打起十二分精神，勇敢地在前線中戰鬥，贏取聲望、榮譽，並體驗新的冒險！

en.name: Wildermyth
en.short_description: Wildermyth follows heroes over their whole careers, from their pitchfork days to their powerful primes, and on into old age and memory. It’s a party-based procedural storytelling RPG where tactical combat and story decisions will alter your world and reshape your cast of characters.

tc.name: Wildermyth
tc.short_description: Wildermyth follows heroes over their whole careers, from their pitchfork days to their powerful primes, and on into old age and memory. It’s a party-based procedural storytelling RPG where tactical combat and story decisions will alter your world and reshape your cast of characters.

en.name: DRAGON QUEST® XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age™ - Definitive Edition
en.short_description: The Definitive Edition includes the critically acclaimed DRAGON QUEST XI, plus additional scenarios, orchestral soundtrack, 2D mode and more! Whether you are a longtime fan or a new adventurer, this is the ultimate DQXI experience.

tc.name: 勇者鬥惡龍XI S 尋覓逝去的時光 - Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: Definitive Edition 內含備受讚譽的『勇者鬥惡龍XI』主遊戲，以及額外劇情、管弦樂配樂、2D 模式等等新內容！無論你是老練玩家或新冒險家，都能享受最極致的 DQXI 遊戲體驗。

en.name: Witch It
en.short_description: Witch It is a multiplayer hide & seek game set in a vibrant, magical world. Brave hunters seek hidden witches that curse their villages!

tc.name: Witch It
tc.short_description: 《Witch It》是一款多人捉迷藏遊戲。背景設定於機智的魔幻世界。勇敢的獵人必須找出詛咒他們村莊的女巫！

en.name: Sniper Ghost Warrior Contracts 2
en.short_description: SGW Contracts 2 is a modern warfare shooter set in the Middle East. Play as Raven, Contract Sniper Assassin, as you take out a series of targets across a dramatic single-player campaign. With extreme-range shots exceeding 1000m, gear up for the most challenging entry to the series yet.

tc.name: Sniper Ghost Warrior Contracts 2
tc.short_description: 《SGW Contracts 2》是一款位於中東的戰術性現代戰爭射擊遊戲。遊玩傭兵狙擊殺手－－渡鴉，你將在戲劇性的單人戰役模式中消滅一系列目標。完成超過 1000 公尺的極遠距離射擊，並為本系列至今最刺激的一款遊戲做好準備。

en.name: Frostpunk 2
en.short_description: Develop, expand, and advance your city in a society survival game set 30 years after an apocalyptic blizzard ravaged Earth. In Frostpunk 2, you face not only the perils of never-ending winter, but also the powerful factions that watch your every step inside the Council Hall.

tc.name: 冰汽時代2
tc.short_description: 地球遭受暴風雪侵襲的30年後，滿目瘡痍的景象宛如世界末日。《冰汽時代2》是款社會生存遊戲，玩家需要在遊戲中發展並壯大自己的城市。除了面對危機四伏的無盡冬霜，玩家還要應付議會廳內部難纏的種種勢力。

en.name: The Lord of the Rings Online™
en.short_description: Join the world’s greatest fellowship of players in the award-winning online re-creation of J. R. R. Tolkien’s legendary Middle-earth.

tc.name: The Lord of the Rings Online™
tc.short_description: Join the world’s greatest fellowship of players in the award-winning online re-creation of J. R. R. Tolkien’s legendary Middle-earth.

en.name: Assassin's Creed® Revelations
en.short_description: Ezio Auditore walks in the footsteps of the legendary mentor Altair, on a dangerous journey of discovery and revelation.

tc.name: Assassin's Creed® Revelations
tc.short_description: Ezio Auditore walks in the footsteps of the legendary mentor Altair, on a dangerous journey of discovery and revelation.

en.name: Tales from the Borderlands
en.short_description: Tales from the Borderlands is a five-part episodic game set on the unforgiving world of Pandora between the events of Borderlands 2 and Borderlands 3. This is a story full of Borderlands' trademark humor, following two adventurers on their quest for greatness.

tc.name: Tales from the Borderlands
tc.short_description: 《邊緣禁地傳說》是款分為五個章節的故事冒險遊戲，以嚴酷的潘朵拉世界為舞台，講的是《邊緣禁地2》和《邊緣禁地3》之間發生的事件。玩家將跟著兩位冒險者踏上宏偉征途，享受充滿《邊緣禁地》著名幽默氛圍的故事劇情。

en.name: Quake
en.short_description: Developed by the award-winning id Software, Quake® is the ground-breaking, original dark fantasy first-person shooter that inspires today’s retro-style FPS games. With Quake (Enhanced), experience the authentic, updated, and visually enhanced version of the original.

tc.name: Quake
tc.short_description: 《Quake®》由獲獎肯定的id Software開發，是一款原創黑暗奇幻第一人稱射擊遊戲，更是影響到現在的復古風格FPS遊戲，而《Quake》（強化版）將帶玩家體驗本作最正宗，視覺效果大幅提升的最新版本。

en.name: Need For Speed: Hot Pursuit
en.short_description: Need for Speed Hot Pursuit launches you into a new open-world landscape behind the wheel of the world's fastest and most beautiful cars. From Criterion, the award-winning studio behind the Burnout series, Hot Pursuit will redefine racing games for a whole new generation.

tc.name: Need For Speed: Hot Pursuit
tc.short_description: Need for Speed Hot Pursuit launches you into a new open-world landscape behind the wheel of the world's fastest and most beautiful cars. From Criterion, the award-winning studio behind the Burnout series, Hot Pursuit will redefine racing games for a whole new generation.

en.name: Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous - Enhanced Edition
en.short_description: Embark on a journey to a realm overrun by demons in a new epic RPG from the creators of the critically acclaimed Pathfinder: Kingmaker. Explore the nature of good and evil, learn the true cost of power, and rise as a Mythic Hero capable of deeds beyond mortal expectations.

tc.name: Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous - Enhanced Edition
tc.short_description: Embark on a journey to a realm overrun by demons in a new epic RPG from the creators of the critically acclaimed Pathfinder: Kingmaker. Explore the nature of good and evil, learn the true cost of power, and rise as a Mythic Hero capable of deeds beyond mortal expectations.

en.short_description: Bless Unleashed is an open-world online game that can be enjoyed with your friends and countless others. Venture out to engage in intense combat while exploring vast regions and treacherous dungeons.

tc.name: Bless Unleashed
tc.short_description: Bless Unleashed is an open-world online game that can be enjoyed with your friends and countless others. Venture out to engage in intense combat while exploring vast regions and treacherous dungeons.

en.name: Styx: Master of Shadows
en.short_description: Styx: Master of Shadows is an infiltration game with RPG elements taking place in a dark fantasy universe, where you sneak, steal and assassinate your way through as Styx, a Goblin two-centuries of age.

tc.name: Styx: Master of Shadows
tc.short_description: Styx: Master of Shadows is an infiltration game with RPG elements taking place in a dark fantasy universe, where you sneak, steal and assassinate your way through as Styx, a Goblin two-centuries of age.

en.name: Realm of the Mad God Exalt
en.short_description: Embark on an exhilarating journey into the pixelated Realm of the Mad God! Join, an action-packed, free-to-play MMO bullet hell game. Discover a world with danger, challenges, and hidden treasures as you battle through waves of enemies. Team up with players and conquer dungeons to become a legend!

tc.name: Realm of the Mad God Exalt
