Discover a world with danger, challenges, and hidden treasures as you battle through waves of enemies. Team up with players and conquer dungeons to become a legend!

en.name: LEGO® Batman™: The Videogame
en.short_description: When all the villains in Arkham Asylum team up and break loose, only the dynamic duo is bold enough to take them on to save Gotham City. The fun of LEGO, the drama of Batman and the uniqueness of the combination makes for a comical and exciting adventure in LEGO Batman: The Videogame.

tc.name: LEGO® Batman™: The Videogame
tc.short_description: 當阿卡漢瘋人院的所有反派合作並逃脫時，只有「動力雙人組」夠大膽，敢對付他們以拯救高譚市。LEGO 的樂趣、蝙蝠俠的劇情，以及該組合的獨特性，讓《LEGO Batman: The Videogame》帶來讓人捧腹且精彩刺激的冒險。扮演蝙蝠俠和他的搭檔羅賓，打造、駕駛，搖擺並在高譚市捕捉逃脫的反派，包括小丑，企鵝，稻草人等。然後，從另一面跳入故事，並扮演蝙蝠俠的敵人！享受你所掌握的力量、與蝙蝠俠戰鬥，並在整個城市散佈混沌。善（或惡）永不停歇。

en.name: Detention
en.short_description: Detention is an atmospheric horror game set in 1960s Taiwan under martial law. Incorporated religious elements based in Taiwanese/Chinese culture and mythology, the game provided players with unique graphics and gaming experience.

tc.name: 返校
tc.short_description: 以一九六零年代的台灣為原型的架空劇情。 獨特的插畫拼貼風格，以及精心編製的原創音樂。 在令人屏息的緊張感中，解開一個又一個秘密。 孤獨的學生，殘酷的校園，以及讓人無力面對的真相。

en.name: The Stanley Parable: Ultra Deluxe
en.short_description: The Stanley Parable: Ultra Deluxe is an expanded re-imagining of 2013's The Stanley Parable. You will play as Stanley, and you will not play as Stanley. You will make a choice, and you will become powerless. You are not here to win. The Stanley Parable is a game that plays you.

tc.name: The Stanley Parable: Ultra Deluxe
tc.short_description: The Stanley Parable: Ultra Deluxe is an expanded re-imagining of 2013's The Stanley Parable. You will play as Stanley, and you will not play as Stanley. You will make a choice, and you will become powerless. You are not here to win. The Stanley Parable is a game that plays you.

en.name: Pixel Strike 3D
en.short_description: Pixel Strike 3D is a Multiplayer First-Person Shooter that features fast-paced gameplay and a wide variety of player customization. Battle friends and foes from all around the world in over 20 unique game modes, with over 70 available weapons.

tc.name: Pixel Strike 3D
tc.short_description: Pixel Strike 3D is a Multiplayer First-Person Shooter that features fast-paced gameplay and a wide variety of player customization. Battle friends and foes from all around the world in over 20 unique game modes, with over 70 available weapons.

en.name: DmC: Devil May Cry
en.short_description: In this retelling of Dante's origin story which is set against a contemporary backdrop, DmC Devil May Cry™ retains the stylish action.

tc.name: DmC: Devil May Cry
tc.short_description: 但丁的故事起源設定在一個當代的背景下，DmC Devil May Cry™ 依然保留了這個系列的標誌性特點：華麗的動作、流暢的戰鬥和自信滿滿的主角，但故事更加深入殘酷和核心的邊緣。

en.name: Need for Speed™ Payback
en.short_description: Set in the underworld of Fortune Valley, you and your crew were divided by betrayal and reunited by revenge to take down The House, a nefarious cartel that rules the city’s casinos, criminals and cops. In this corrupt gambler’s paradise, the stakes are high and The House always wins.

tc.name: Need for Speed™ Payback
tc.short_description: Need for Speed™ Payback - Deluxe Edition 讓您在競爭中獲得領先優勢。 利用獨家自訂物品來鶴立雞群，並獲得遊戲內折扣及聲望加成，同時還能在冒險的一開始便獲得五箱貨櫃。

en.name: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II: Retribution
en.short_description: Command any of the six unique factions in the next standalone expansion of the critically acclaimed Dawn of War real-time strategy franchise. Choose to build a massive army or lead a small squad of elite heroes into battle and experience a single player campaign customized to your favorite race.

tc.name: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II: Retribution
tc.short_description: 迎接人氣爆表的即時戰略遊戲《破曉之戰》系列獨立擴充，指揮六種獨特勢力的任一陣營。建立龐大軍團或率領精英小隊殺入戰場，體驗單人玩家戰役，自訂你最愛的種族。上線與敵人一決高下，體驗 41 世紀 的快節奏殘酷戰鬥。

en.name: RuneScape ®
en.short_description: RuneScape is a high fantasy open world MMORPG. Explore an ever changing and evolving living world where new challenges, skills, and quests await. Featuring unprecedented player freedom, you choose how to play, adventure, and grow.

tc.name: RuneScape ®
tc.short_description: RuneScape is a high fantasy open world MMORPG. Explore an ever changing and evolving living world where new challenges, skills, and quests await. Featuring unprecedented player freedom, you choose how to play, adventure, and grow.

en.name: Workers & Resources: Soviet Republic
en.short_description: Build a soviet republic from an impoverished country into a rich industrial superpower in a city builder with intricate production chains and a fully simulated global economy. Manage the lives of your citizens from education to work and party loyalty to criminal activity.

tc.name: 工人與資源：蘇維埃共和國 Workers & Resources: Soviet Republic
tc.short_description: 在擁有精密生產鏈且完整模擬全球經濟的城市建造遊戲中，將蘇維埃共和國脫離窮苦國家之列，成為富有的工業強權。管理國民生活中的方方面面，從教育到工作、對黨的忠誠以及犯罪活動一個也不放過。

en.name: Stronghold Crusader HD (2012)
en.short_description: The highly anticipated sequel to the best-selling Stronghold, Stronghold Crusader HD throws you into historic battles and castle sieges from the Crusades with fiendish AI opponents, new units, 4 historical campaigns and over 100 unique skirmish missions.

tc.name: Stronghold Crusader HD (2012)
tc.short_description: The highly anticipated sequel to the best-selling Stronghold, Stronghold Crusader HD throws you into historic battles and castle sieges from the Crusades with fiendish AI opponents, new units, 4 historical campaigns and over 100 unique skirmish missions.

en.name: DOOM + DOOM II
en.short_description: Developed by id Software, and originally released in 1993 and 1994, the definitive, newly enhanced versions of DOOM + DOOM II are available as a combined product.

tc.name: DOOM + DOOM II
tc.short_description: 《DOOM》由id Software開發，最初在1993年和1994年推出，現在新的最終增強版《DOOM + DOOM II》已經以組合產品的形式推出。

en.name: Bellwright
en.short_description: Establish and expand your own settlements, liberate the land and assist its villagers, and recruit others to your cause while learning more about a life you had to leave behind. Command your forces, prove your valor through combat, and cement yourself as the hero of your people.

tc.name: Bellwright
tc.short_description: 建立並擴展屬於您自己的領土，解放村落，幫助村民，並招募其他人加入您的事業。了解關於你的背景故事並同時了解更多您不得不放棄的過去。指揮您的部隊，通過戰鬥証明您的勇氣，並鞏固您作爲人民英雄的地位。

en.name: The Universim
en.short_description: Jump straight into managing your own planets as you guide a civilization through the ages. Build the ultimate empire in The Universim, a new breed of God Game in development by Crytivo.

tc.name: The Universim
tc.short_description: 現在就開始通過引導一個文明走過數個世紀，來管理您自己的行星吧。成為《宇宙模擬器》中的終極君王，這是由Crytivo全新開發的上帝類遊戲。

en.name: Murders on the Yangtze River
en.short_description: "Murders on Yangtze River" is an Ace Attorney-like detective game that takes you on a journey through early 20th century China as you solve a series of intriguing cases. Use your logical reasoning and deduction skills to uncover clues, interrogate suspects, and solve the mysteries.

tc.name: 山河旅探 Murders on the Yangtze River
tc.short_description: 《山河旅探》是由奧秘之家所開發的一款中國主題特色的橫向本格推理遊戲。玩家將化身為國民偵探沈仲平，通過調查推理一樁樁令人匪夷所思的離奇案件，從而挖掘出終極案件背後所隱藏的驚人真相，同時也將發現那些關於自己的身世之謎。

en.name: ATLYSS
en.short_description: Enter the world of ATLYSS, a Singleplayer/Online RPG where you can fight with or against friends in a surreal world filled with creatures beyond comprehension. Customize and progress your character(s), complete quests, and discover strange locations.

tc.name: ATLYSS
tc.short_description: Enter the world of ATLYSS, a Singleplayer/Online RPG where you can fight with or against friends in a surreal world filled with creatures beyond comprehension. Customize and progress your character(s), complete quests, and discover strange locations.

en.name: DARK SOULS™ II
en.short_description: Developed by FROM SOFTWARE, DARK SOULS™ II is the highly anticipated sequel to the gruelling 2011 breakout hit Dark Souls. The unique old-school action RPG experience captivated imaginations of gamers worldwide with incredible challenge and intense emotional reward.

tc.name: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 5
tc.short_description: 人類啊，對抗命運吧！ 本款遊戲是描寫人類在西元2022年，面對突如其來侵襲地球的外星生命體，賭上「全地球防衛機構」EDF的性命與之戰鬥的動作射擊遊戲。 玩家將化身EDF的士兵，一一殲滅來勢洶洶無以計數的巨大敵人，守護地球的和平。

en.name: Timberman

tc.name: Hacknet
tc.short_description: Hacknet是一款身歷其境，基於終端的駭客模擬器。跟隨一位最近逝世的駭客遺留的指示探索渾沌的網路世界。他的死因可能不如媒體報導的意外如此單純。

en.name: GUILTY GEAR Xrd REV 2
en.short_description: Astonishing 3D cell animations and overwhelming content volume, the next-generation fighting game "GUILTY GEAR Xrd REV 2" is now out on Steam! Total cast of 25 unique characters, and tons of game modes, get ready to ROCK!

en.name: Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night
en.short_description: Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night is an exploration-focused, side-scroller action RPG by Koji Igarashi. Play as Miriam, an orphan scarred by an alchemist's curse that slowly crystallizes her body. Battle through a demon-infested castle and defeat its master to save yourself, and all of humanity!

tc.name: Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night
tc.short_description: 《血咒之城：暗夜儀式》是一款以探索為主的橫向卷軸動作角色扮演遊戲，由五十嵐孝司親手打造，505 Games全球發行，2P Games在大中國地區提供聯合發行支持。扮演米麗亞姆，一個被煉金術士詛咒而導致身體正慢慢變成水晶的孤兒。通過奮力戰鬥闖過一座充滿惡魔的城堡，擊敗城堡的主人，拯救自己以及所有人類。

en.name: Salt and Sanctuary
en.short_description: Explore a haunting, punishing island in this stylized 2D action RPG. Salt and Sanctuary combines fast and brutal 2D combat with richly developed RPG mechanics in a cursed realm of forgotten cities, blood-soaked dungeons, and desecrated monuments.

tc.name: Salt and Sanctuary
tc.short_description: Explore a haunting, punishing island in this stylized 2D action RPG. Salt and Sanctuary combines fast and brutal 2D combat with richly developed RPG mechanics in a cursed realm of forgotten cities, blood-soaked dungeons, and desecrated monuments.

en.name: Far Cry®
en.short_description: A tropical paradise seethes with hidden evil in Far Cry®, a cunningly detailed action shooter that pushes the boundaries of combat to shocking new levels. Freelance mariner Jack Carver is cursing the day he ever came to this island.

tc.name: Far Cry®
tc.short_description: A tropical paradise seethes with hidden evil in Far Cry®, a cunningly detailed action shooter that pushes the boundaries of combat to shocking new levels. Freelance mariner Jack Carver is cursing the day he ever came to this island.

en.name: Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel
en.short_description: Launch into the Borderlands universe and shoot ‘n’ loot your way through a brand new adventure that rockets you onto Pandora’s moon in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel!

tc.name: Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel
tc.short_description: Launch into the Borderlands universe and shoot ‘n’ loot your way through a brand new adventure that rockets you onto Pandora’s moon in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel!

en.name: Death Must Die
en.short_description: Descend the nether in search of Death himself! Choose from God-given powers to slay his hordes of minions. Unlock new heroes, collect powerful items and create game-breaking synergies in this roguelite hack and slash survivors game.

tc.name: Death Must Die
tc.short_description: Descend the nether in search of Death himself! Choose from God-given powers to slay his hordes of minions. Unlock new heroes, collect powerful items and create game-breaking synergies in this roguelite hack and slash survivors game.

en.name: Orcs Must Die! 3
en.short_description: Slice, burn, toss, zap, grind and gib massive hordes of repugnant orcs in this long-awaited successor to the award-winning Orcs Must Die! series.

tc.name: Orcs Must Die! 3
tc.short_description: 在備受期待的獲獎遊戲系列《Orcs Must Die! 》的續作中，斬殺、焚燒、拋擲與電擊成群的討厭獸人吧。

en.name: Verdun
en.short_description: Merciless trench warfare immerses you and your squad in intense battles of attack and defense. Verdun is the first multiplayer FPS set in an authentic World War One setting offering a rarely seen battlefield experience.

tc.name: Verdun
tc.short_description: Merciless trench warfare immerses you and your squad in intense battles of attack and defense. Verdun is the first multiplayer FPS set in an authentic World War One setting offering a rarely seen battlefield experience.

en.name: Ranch Simulator: Build, Hunt, Farm
en.short_description: Builder. Farmer. Hunter. Trader. Ranching certainly isn’t your average job. Think you have the skills to turn your family’s rundown homestead into the most prosperous ranch in the valley? Then it’s time to head out into the wilderness in this captivating single and multiplayer open-world simulator.

tc.name: Ranch Simulator: Build, Hunt, Farm
tc.short_description: 建築工人。農夫。獵人。商人。經營牧場當然不是普通的工作。你認為自己有能力將家族留下的破舊家園變成山谷中最繁榮的牧場嗎？那就進入這個迷人的單人與多人開放世界模擬遊戲，徜徉在曠野之中吧。

en.name: How to Survive
en.short_description: “A real Gem” – Destructoid at E3 “Offers a different experience for zombie game veterans” – Co-Optimus“Has a lot more going for it than smashing brains and gory, red goo ... With a surprisingly deep crafting system” – GamesRadarYou're shipwrecked on an isolated island, a desperate castaway in a total freakshow world. How will you survive?

tc.name: How to Survive
tc.short_description: “A real Gem” – Destructoid at E3 “Offers a different experience for zombie game veterans” – Co-Optimus“Has a lot more going for it than smashing brains and gory, red goo ... With a surprisingly deep crafting system” – GamesRadarYou're shipwrecked on an isolated island, a desperate castaway in a total freakshow world. How will you survive?

en.name: Codename CURE
en.short_description: Codename CURE is a first person, co-operative zombie game with support for up to five players, providing dynamic, fast-paced zombie fragging with both objective, and survival-based missions.

tc.name: Codename CURE
tc.short_description: Codename CURE is a first person, co-operative zombie game with support for up to five players, providing dynamic, fast-paced zombie fragging with both objective, and survival-based missions.

en.name: Persona® 5 Strikers
en.short_description: Join the Phantom Thieves and strike back against the corruption overtaking cities across Japan. A summer vacation with close friends takes a sudden turn as a distorted reality emerges; reveal the truth and redeem the hearts of those imprisoned at the center of the crisis!

tc.name: 女神異聞錄５ 亂戰：魅影攻手
tc.short_description: 反擊時刻來臨！ 化身心之怪盜團，對抗藏身在日本全境的惡勢力吧！原本應該和夥伴一同狂歡的夏日之旅，卻隨著扭曲的現實一夕變調！ 揭發真相，奪回事件主角被囚禁的心吧！

en.name: Assassin's Creed® III Remastered
en.short_description: Relive the American Revolution or experience it for the first time in Assassin's Creed® III Remastered, with enhanced graphics and improved gameplay mechanics. Also includes Assassin's Creed Liberation remastered and all solo DLC content.

tc.name: Assassin's Creed® III Remastered
tc.short_description: 畫面更棒、遊戲機制更精進的《刺客教條 III 重製版》將帶玩家重新回味或初次體驗美國大革命的年代。更棒的是，另也包含《刺客教條：自由使命 重製版》和所有單人 DLC 內容。

en.name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
en.short_description: Uncover one of history’s greatest mysteries in a first-person, single-player adventure. The year is 1937, sinister forces are scouring the globe for the secret to an ancient power connected to the Great Circle, and only one person can stop them - Indiana Jones™.

tc.name: 《印第安納瓊斯：古老之圈》
tc.short_description: 在這款第一人稱的單人冒險遊戲解開史上最驚天動地的謎團。1937年，邪惡勢力席捲全球，尋覓古代力量的祕密，這個祕密與古老之圈有關，而世上唯一能阻止他們的人就是印第安納瓊斯。

en.name: Youtubers Life
en.short_description: Become the most successful youtuber on the planet! Create videos, get subscribers, attend events, interact with your fans… and grow your channel. Live a youtuber’s life!

tc.name: Youtubers Life
tc.short_description: 成為星球上最成功的播主吧！創作視頻，吸引訂閱者，參與活動，與粉絲互動……令頻道不斷壯大。體驗播主的生活！

en.name: VTOL VR
en.short_description: VTOL VR is a near-futuristic combat flight game built for Virtual Reality. Pilot advanced multi-role jets, using your hands to flip switches, press buttons, and manipulate the virtual flight controls.

tc.name: VTOL VR
tc.short_description: VTOL VR is a near-futuristic combat flight game built for Virtual Reality. Pilot advanced multi-role jets, using your hands to flip switches, press buttons, and manipulate the virtual flight controls.

en.name: Marauders
en.short_description: Marauders is a tactical first-person multiplayer looter shooter set in a sci-fi universe. As a space pirate, work solo, or in a squad with up to 3 other players to navigate a hostile battleground, hunt for loot, craft new weapons and gear, and salvage what you’ll need to survive.

tc.name: Marauders
tc.short_description: 《Marauders》是一款以反烏托邦科幻世界為背景的第一人稱多人戰術射擊遊戲。玩家將成為一名太空海盜獨自打拼，或是與最多 3 名其他玩家組隊，在危機四伏的戰場上闖蕩、與其他隊伍和 AI 對手展開激烈戰鬥並生存下來、取得無價的戰利品、打造新的武器和裝備，並收集求生所需的任何資源。

en.name: Monster Train
en.short_description: Monster Train is a strategic roguelike deck building game with a twist. Set on a train to hell, you’ll use tactical decision making to defend multiple vertical battlegrounds. With real time competitive multiplayer and endless replayability, Monster Train is always on time.

tc.name: Monster Train
tc.short_description: Monster Train is a strategic roguelike deck building game with a twist. Set on a train to hell, you’ll use tactical decision making to defend multiple vertical battlegrounds. With real time competitive multiplayer and endless replayability, Monster Train is always on time.

en.name: NBA 2K21
en.short_description: NOTE: All multiplayer servers for NBA 2K21 will be shutdown as of 12/31/2022. After that time, all game functions requiring online servers will no longer function.

tc.name: NBA 2K21
tc.short_description: 注意：所有NBA2K21的多人遊戲伺服器將於2022/12/31關閉。之後所有需要在線伺服器的功能將無法使用。

en.name: Crime Scene Cleaner
en.short_description: Once you get tangled with the mob, you will forever be a part of the mob. At least they pay a decent salary and all you have to do is clean up after their dirty work, but you know what you’re doing. So clean crime scenes, earn as much money as you can, and get ready for the next mission.

tc.name: Crime Scene Cleaner
tc.short_description: 一旦被黑道牽扯上，你就永遠擺脫不了。好在他們薪水還算不錯，你只需要幫他們善後，不過這些你都駕輕就熟。清理犯罪現場，賺取更多報酬，為下一個任務做好準備吧。

en.name: RUINER
en.short_description: RUINER is a brutal action shooter set in the year 2091 in the cyber metropolis Rengkok. A wired psychopath lashes out against a corrupt system to uncover the truth and retrieve his kidnapped brother under the guidance of a secretive hacker friend.

tc.name: RUINER
tc.short_description: RUINER 是一款刺激的動作射擊遊戲,故事發生於 2091 年嶺谷市,一位配有生化裝置的狂徒為拯救被綁的兄長,接受了神秘駭客的幫助,攻擊腐敗的體制並揭發背後的真相。 在墮落的暗巷中體驗,瓦解「天堂」背後主宰虛擬世界的企業巨頭。 結合超極限的反應速度、強化工具及武器來達成任務。

en.name: Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville™
en.short_description: Kick some grass in Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville, the wackiest shooter yet!

tc.name: 植物大戰殭屍™: 和睦小鎮保衛戰
tc.short_description: 在《植物大戰殭屍: 和睦小鎮保衛戰》這款爆笑射擊遊戲中大顯神威！

en.name: Gorogoa
en.short_description: Gorogoa is an elegant evolution of the puzzle genre, told through a beautifully hand-drawn story designed and illustrated by Jason Roberts. Winner of Debut Game at the 2018 BAFTA Games Awards, as well as Best Mobile Game and the Innovation Award at the GDC 2018 Choice Awards.

tc.name: Gorogoa
tc.short_description: Gorogoa 是一款獨具特色的解謎遊戲，故事情節源自 Jason Roberts 設計和作畫的精美手繪插畫。

en.name: Mindustry
en.short_description: An open-ended factory management game with RTS and tower defense elements.

tc.name: Mindustry
tc.short_description: 一款側重資源管理的開放式塔防遊戲。

en.name: Brutal Legend
en.short_description: Brütal Legend is an action-adventure that marries visceral action combat with open-world freedom. Set in a universe somewhere between Lord of the Rings and Spinal Tap, it’s a fresh take on the action/driving genre, which in this case is full of imitation cover bands, demons intent on enslaving humanity and Heavy metal tunes.

tc.name: Brutal Legend
tc.short_description: 《惡黑搖滾》(Brütal Legend) 是一款結合動作鮮明的戰鬥與自由開放世界的動作冒險遊戲。遊戲的世界觀大概介於《魔戒》(Lord of the Rings) 與《搖滾萬萬歲》(Spinal Tap) 之間，這對於動作／駕駛遊戲類型是全新的嘗試；這裡充滿了模仿翻唱樂團，還有惡魔想要奴役人類與重金屬音樂。傑克·布萊克 (Jack Black)，出色的喜劇演員和音樂家，扮演萬用樂團技師 Eddie Riggs，還有許多在金屬音樂中最出名的人們客串演出，玩家和金屬樂迷絕對不能錯過這場瘋狂的冒險旅程。 PC 版本的《惡黑搖滾》包含兩款多人遊戲地圖包 Hammer of Infinite Fate 與 Tears of the Hextadon 作為免費額外內容。

en.name: From the Depths
en.short_description: Over 1000 unique components allow you to build and command voxel vehicles from the deep ocean to outer space! Forge strategies, allegiances and fleets strong enough to destroy eight deadly factions of the planet and reign supreme. A genre-defying mashup of simulation, building, RTS and RPG.

tc.name: From the Depths
tc.short_description: Over 1000 unique components allow you to build and command voxel vehicles from the deep ocean to outer space! Forge strategies, allegiances and fleets strong enough to destroy eight deadly factions of the planet and reign supreme. A genre-defying mashup of simulation, building, RTS and RPG.

en.name: SCP: 5K
en.short_description: SCP: 5K is a co-op or singleplayer tactical horror FPS project that puts players in the midst of a conspiracy where the SCP Foundation has turned on humanity. Enjoy Early Access as we continue to work towards a completed full release of the project!

tc.name: SCP: 5K
tc.short_description: SCP: 5K is a co-op or singleplayer tactical horror FPS project that puts players in the midst of a conspiracy where the SCP Foundation has turned on humanity. Enjoy Early Access as we continue to work towards a completed full release of the project!

en.name: Tricky Towers
en.short_description: With your brilliant robe and magic powers, it’s time to build some Tricky Towers! Stack your bricks in this land of fable, whose marvelous tower will be the most stable? Battle your friends and rise to fame, in this frantic physics game.

tc.name: Tricky Towers
tc.short_description: 有了華麗的戰袍以及魔法的力量，那麼就來建造一些Tricky塔吧！ 在這片寓言之地堆磚砌瓦，並盡力摧毀敵方的塔。施展魔法來建造高塔，並在這刺激的物理派對遊戲中抵禦對手黑暗魔法的破壞。

en.name: Infestation: The New Beginning
en.short_description: Infestation is a Survival Horror MMO that immerses players in a zombie-infested, post-apocalyptic world in which a viral outbreak has decimated the human population leaving in its wake, a nightmare of epic proportion.

tc.name: Infestation: The New Beginning
tc.short_description: Infestation is a Survival Horror MMO that immerses players in a zombie-infested, post-apocalyptic world in which a viral outbreak has decimated the human population leaving in its wake, a nightmare of epic proportion.

en.name: inZOI
en.short_description: "Every life becomes a story" Create your unique story by controlling and observing the lives of 'Zois'. Customize characters and build houses using inZOI's easy-to-use tools to live the life of your dreams and experience the different emotions of life created by its deep and detailed simulation.

tc.name: inZOI
tc.short_description: 「每段人生都是一则故事。」透過操控與觀察每位 Zoi 的生活，創造屬於你的獨特體驗。 藉由 inZOI 的強大工具，自由定製角色與建造夢想中的房屋。在細緻入微的模擬體驗中，迎接生活中的各種事件，感受生命的喜怒哀樂，體驗夢寐以求的生活吧！

en.name: S.K.I.L.L. - Special Force 2 (Shooter)
en.short_description: S.K.I.L.L. - Special Force 2 is a fast-paced, action-packed FPS shooter based on the Unreal Engine 3. The game features a wide range of game modes, tons of maps and a huge selection of weapons.

tc.name: S.K.I.L.L. - Special Force 2 (Shooter)
tc.short_description: S.K.I.L.L. - Special Force 2 is a fast-paced, action-packed shooter based on the Unreal Engine 3. The game features a wide range of game modes, tons of maps and a huge selection of weapons.

en.name: Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City
en.short_description: Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City includes both The Lost and Damned and The Ballad of Gay Tony together and does not require a copy of the original Grand Theft Auto IV to play.

tc.name: Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City
tc.short_description: Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City includes both The Lost and Damned and The Ballad of Gay Tony together and does not require a copy of the original Grand Theft Auto IV to play.

en.name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
en.short_description: Experience what it’s like to be Batman and face off against Gotham's greatest villians. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island.

tc.name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
tc.short_description: 體驗扮演蝙蝠俠的感覺，並與高譚市最強大的反派對峙。探索阿卡漢瘋人院的每一寸土地，並在這個惡名昭彰的島嶼上自由漫遊。

en.name: Legion TD 2 - Multiplayer Tower Defense
en.short_description: An infinitely replayable multiplayer and single-player tower defense. Defend against waves of enemies and destroy the enemy's king before they destroy yours. Legion TD 2 is a one-of-a-kind game of tactics, teamwork, and prediction. Party as 1-8 players.

tc.name: Legion TD 2 - Multiplayer Tower Defense
tc.short_description: 可無限重玩的單人以及多人塔防遊戲。抵禦一波又一波的敵人，先下手為強消滅敵方國王。《軍團戰爭 2》是一款集戰略、團隊合作、預判為一體的獨一無二的遊戲。支援 1-8 人團隊。

en.name: Starship Troopers: Terran Command
en.short_description: Lead the Mobile Infantry in this RTS game set in the Starship Troopers film universe. Balance your army composition with a diverse set of unit types, overcome line-of-sight and line-of-fire challenges through tactical positioning, and use special abilities to smash the Arachnid hordes!

tc.name: Starship Troopers: Terran Command
tc.short_description: Lead the Mobile Infantry in this RTS game set in the Starship Troopers film universe. Balance your army composition with a diverse set of unit types, overcome line-of-sight and line-of-fire challenges through tactical positioning, and use special abilities to smash the Arachnid hordes!

en.name: Call of Duty®: Ghosts
en.short_description: Outnumbered and outgunned, but not outmatched.Call of Duty®: Ghosts is an extraordinary step forward for one of the largest entertainment franchises of all-time. This new chapter in the Call of Duty® franchise features a new dynamic where players are on the side of a crippled nation fighting not for freedom, or liberty, but simply to...

tc.name: Call of Duty®: Ghosts
tc.short_description: Outnumbered and outgunned, but not outmatched.Call of Duty®: Ghosts is an extraordinary step forward for one of the largest entertainment franchises of all-time. This new chapter in the Call of Duty® franchise features a new dynamic where players are on the side of a crippled nation fighting not for freedom, or liberty, but simply to...

en.name: Galactic Civilizations III
en.short_description: Build a civilization that will stand the test of time in the largest space-based strategy game ever! Choose from dozens of unique races and make a name for yourself across the galaxy through diplomacy, espionage, technological advances, and more.

tc.name: Galactic Civilizations III
tc.short_description: Build a civilization that will stand the test of time in the largest space-based strategy game ever! Choose from dozens of unique races and make a name for yourself across the galaxy through diplomacy, espionage, technological advances, and more.

en.name: Halls of Torment
en.short_description: Slay hordes of terrifying monsters in this horde survival roguelite. Descend into the Halls of Torment where the Lords of the underworld await you. Treasures, magical trinkets, and a growing cast of heroes will grant you the power to vanquish these horrors from beyond. How long can you survive?

tc.name: Halls of Torment 苦痛殿堂
tc.short_description: Slay hordes of terrifying monsters in this horde survival roguelite. Descend into the Halls of Torment where the Lords of the underworld await you. Treasures, magical trinkets, and a growing cast of heroes will grant you the power to vanquish these horrors from beyond. How long can you survive?

en.name: The Beast Inside
en.short_description: The Beast Inside is a unique, gripping twist on thriller and survival horror. Immerse in the story of long-buried secrets, personal tragedies, and madness. Play as two protagonists bounded by dark heritage. Combat the enemies, solve riddles and experience real terror in the 3D-scanned environment.

tc.name: The Beast Inside
tc.short_description: The Beast Inside is a unique, gripping twist on thriller and survival horror. Immerse in the story of long-buried secrets, personal tragedies, and madness. Play as two protagonists bounded by dark heritage. Combat the enemies, solve riddles and experience real terror in the 3D-scanned environment.

en.name: Prototype™
en.short_description: You are the Prototype, Alex Mercer, a man without memory armed with amazing shape-shifting abilities, hunting your way to the heart of the conspiracy which created you; making those responsible pay. Fast & Deadly Shape-Shifting Combat: Reconfigure your body to the situation at hand.

tc.name: Prototype™
tc.short_description: 你就是原型兵器：Alex Mercer，一個失去記憶、但卻擁有驚人變形能力的男子，正深入探求自己被創造出來的身世之謎，誓言要讓這些幕後兇手付出代價。快速且致命的變形戰鬥： 你的軀體可依據處境而恣意變形，從爪子、利刃、大錘到鞭子，選擇適當的武器來因應各種情勢。也可以變形成為盾牌或盔甲進行防禦，或使用進階感應能力（熱感應視覺及感染探測視覺）來追蹤你的敵人。誇張的靈活移動： 流暢的穿梭建築與建築間、在牆壁上急奔、或是跳躍於車輛與任何障礙物之上，適應環境的跑酷能力將使你在紐約市的開放世界隨心所欲的移動。獨特的偽裝能力： 任何時間你只要解決敵人，便能偽裝他們的外貌並獲得他們的記憶與能力。

en.name: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne
en.short_description: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne is a violent, film-noir love story. Dark, tragic and intense, the in-depth story is a thrill-ride of shocking twists and revelations. Love hurts.

tc.name: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne
tc.short_description: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne 是一篇兼具暴力美學和寫實風格的愛情故事。遊戲充斥著陰暗、悲劇和緊湊的情節，其故事劇情就像搭乘雲霄飛車一樣轉折跌宕、處處驚奇，而愛可以成傷。

en.name: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links
en.short_description: Take on Duelists around the world with "Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links"! Step into a world that crosses dimensions and connects all Duelists. In Duel World, any location transforms into a Duel Field where heated Duels unfold!

tc.name: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links
tc.short_description: 在《Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links》與世界各地的決鬥好手一較高下！ 進入一個時空交錯、連結所有決鬥者的世界。在決鬥世界，每個地方都是戰場，激烈的決鬥隨時展開！

en.name: Mortal Online 2
en.short_description: Step into Nave, a vast fantasy sandbox world with a player-driven economy, persistent housing, and deep crafting systems. Engage in first-person, full-loot PvP combat with other players and perilous foes. Build, explore, and conquer in an unforgiving world. The land is yours—who will you become?

tc.name: Mortal Online 2
tc.short_description: Step into Nave, a vast fantasy sandbox world with a player-driven economy, persistent housing, and deep crafting systems. Engage in first-person, full-loot PvP combat with other players and perilous foes. Build, explore, and conquer in an unforgiving world. The land is yours—who will you become?

en.name: Evil West
en.short_description: A dark menace consumes the Old West. In solo or coop, fight with style in visceral, explosive combat against bloodthirsty monstrosities. Eradicate the vampiric hordes with your lightning-fueled gauntlet and become a Wild West Superhero.

tc.name: Evil West
tc.short_description: 黑暗的威脅吞噬了舊西部。單打獨鬥或合力作戰，在血肉橫飛的驚爆戰鬥中對抗嗜血的怪物。用注滿閃電威能的鐵手套殲滅成群的吸血鬼，成為狂野西部的超級英雄。

en.name: Beholder
en.short_description: You’re a state-installed landlord in a totalitarian country. Place listening devices, steal and sneak into your tenants’ apartments. Use what you uncovered to report anyone capable of plotting against the state. You MUST! But WILL you?

tc.name: Beholder
tc.short_description: 你是一名在極權社會中被政府安插的樓管。你必須監視房客，偷窺、偷聽並為房客建立檔案！你報告任何會違法或密謀顛覆政府的人。你必須！但你會嗎？

en.name: RuneScape: Dragonwilds
en.short_description: On RuneScape’s forgotten continent of Ashenfall, dragons have awoken. Gather, build, skill and craft to survive in this co-operative (1-4) survival crafting game. Only by mastering survival and uncovering ancient secrets can they hope to slay the Dragon Queen—alone or with allies.

en.name: Football Manager 2021
en.short_description: New additions and game upgrades deliver added levels of depth, drama and football authenticity. FM21 empowers you like never before to develop your skills and command success at your club.

tc.name: Football Manager 2021
tc.short_description: 遊戲中的新功能和更新，為你帶來提升到新層次的深度、戲劇性與最貼近現實的足球。《FM21》為你提供前所未見的權限，逐步開發你的管理能力，帶領球隊邁向成功。

en.name: The Escapists 2
en.short_description: Craft, Steal, Brawl and Escape! It’s time to bust out of the toughest prisons in the world as you return to the life of an inmate in The Escapists 2, now with multiplayer! Have you got what it takes to escape?

tc.name: The Escapists 2
tc.short_description: Craft, Steal, Brawl and Escape! It’s time to bust out of the toughest prisons in the world as you return to the life of an inmate in The Escapists 2, now with multiplayer! Have you got what it takes to escape?

en.name: The Crew™
en.short_description: The Crew is a revolutionary action-driving MMO, developed exclusively for next-gen consoles and high-end PCs that leverage new hardware capabilities to connect players online like never before. The Crew takes you and your friends on a wild ride across a massive, open-world recreation of the United States that is loaded with exciting...
developers: Ivory Tower in collaboration with Ubisoft Reflections

en.name: Backpack Battles
en.short_description: A PvP inventory management auto battler! Buy and craft powerful items, then carefully arrange them in your backpack.

tc.name: 背包亂鬥 Backpack Battles
tc.short_description: 這是一款 PVP 背包物品管理自動戰鬥遊戲！購買和製作稀有物品，仔細擺放，打造強力組合，使用背包跟其他玩家激烈對戰。

en.name: Pillars of Eternity
en.short_description: Prepare to be enchanted by a world where the choices you make and the paths you choose shape your destiny. Obsidian Entertainment, the developer of Fallout: New Vegas™ and South Park: The Stick of Truth™, together with Paradox Interactive is proud to present Pillars of Eternity.

tc.short_description: Prepare to be enchanted by a world where the choices you make and the paths you choose shape your destiny. Obsidian Entertainment, the developer of Fallout: New Vegas™ and South Park: The Stick of Truth™, together with Paradox Interactive is proud to present Pillars of Eternity.

en.name: Ravenswatch
en.short_description: Fallen heroes of old folk tales and legends: you are on the verge of a crucial battle against the Nightmare invading and corrupting your world. A roguelike action game from the creators of Curse of the Dead Gods©, playable solo or in online co-op.

tc.name: Ravenswatch 鸦卫奇旅
tc.short_description: 古老童話及傳奇故事的墮落英雄：你正面臨著準備一觸即發的關鍵戰爭，必須對抗噩夢以阻止其入侵及腐化你的世界。由《Curse of the Dead Gods©》創作者所設計的 roguelike 動作遊戲，可單人遊玩或線上合作。

en.name: The Evil Within
en.short_description: Developed by Shinji Mikami -- creator of the seminal Resident Evil series -- and the talented team at Tango Gameworks, The Evil Within embodies the meaning of pure survival horror. Highly-crafted environments, horrifying anxiety, and an intricate story are combined to create an immersive world that will bring you to the height of tension.

tc.name: The Evil Within
tc.short_description: Developed by Shinji Mikami -- creator of the seminal Resident Evil series -- and the talented team at Tango Gameworks, The Evil Within embodies the meaning of pure survival horror. Highly-crafted environments, horrifying anxiety, and an intricate story are combined to create an immersive world that will bring you to the height of tension.

en.name: Terminator: Resistance
en.short_description: Terminator: Resistance, is a first-person shooter set during the 'Future War' scenario that was only glimpsed at in the iconic films, 'THE TERMINATOR' and 'T2: JUDGMENT DAY'. The machines are destined to lose, but at what cost?

tc.name: Terminator: Resistance
tc.short_description: 體驗導致人類命運最終戰的事件。 《Terminator: Resistance》是前兩部《魔鬼終結者》電影中簡短展示的“未來戰爭”場景中的第一人稱射擊遊戲。

en.name: Cloudpunk
en.short_description: A neon-noir story in a rain-drenched cyberpunk metropolis. It’s your first night on the job working for the Cloudpunk delivery service. Two rules: Don’t miss a delivery and don’t ask what’s in the package.

tc.name: Cloudpunk
tc.short_description: 在規模龐大，無序蔓延的賽博朋克都市Nivalis中，你將以Cloudpunk送貨司機的身份度過第一個夜晚，並邂逅形形色色的人類、人工智能與機器人，每個角色都會講述自己的故事。

en.name: War Selection
en.short_description: War Selection is a compelling RTS game featuring base building, resource extraction and warfare. Evolve from a stone age tribe to a distinct industrial nation with unique game mechanics and battle for supremacy with dozens of players on a unique procedurally generated map.

tc.name: War Selection
tc.short_description: War Selection is a compelling RTS game featuring base building, resource extraction and warfare. Evolve from a stone age tribe to a distinct industrial nation with unique game mechanics and battle for supremacy with dozens of players on a unique procedurally generated map.

en.name: Last Man Standing
en.short_description: The Ultimate BATTLE ROYALE! Sharpen your skills and kill everyone in your way as you hunt for guns, gear and glory in a massive battlefield where only ONE can be crowned the LAST MAN STANDING. Earn cash prizes in a monthly competitions,

tc.name: Last Man Standing
tc.short_description: The Ultimate BATTLE ROYALE! Sharpen your skills and kill everyone in your way as you hunt for guns, gear and glory in a massive battlefield where only ONE can be crowned the LAST MAN STANDING. Earn cash prizes in a monthly competitions,

en.name: Night in the Woods
en.short_description: NIGHT IN THE WOODS is an adventure game focused on exploration, story, and character, featuring dozens of characters to meet and lots to do across a lush, vibrant world.

tc.name: Night in the Woods
tc.short_description: NIGHT IN THE WOODS is an adventure game focused on exploration, story, and character, featuring dozens of characters to meet and lots to do across a lush, vibrant world.

en.name: Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare®
en.short_description: Experience a visceral Campaign or assemble your team in the ultimate online playground with multiple Special Ops challenges and a mix of Multiplayer maps and modes.

tc.name: Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare®
tc.short_description: 体验激动人心的剧情战役，或组队踏入终极在线战场，其中包含多个特别行动、多人地图及模式。

en.name: EVERSPACE™
en.short_description: EVERSPACE™ combines fast-paced combat with roguelike elements, great visuals and a captivating story. It takes you on a challenging journey through an ever-changing, beautifully crafted universe full of surprises. Shoot, craft and loot your way to victory while the odds are stacked against you.

tc.name: EVERSPACE™
tc.short_description: 《EVERSPACE™》結合快節奏戰鬥、Roguelike 類型元素、華麗視覺效果與扣人心弦的劇情。遊戲將帶你踏上充滿挑戰的旅程，穿越變化無窮、驚喜不斷的美麗宇宙。一路射擊強敵、製作武器、劫掠資源，在極其不利的條件下奮力奪得勝利。

en.name: STAR WARS™ Empire at War - Gold Pack
en.short_description: Command or corrupt an entire galaxy in the definitive Star Wars strategy collection. It is a time of galactic civil war. Will you take up the reins of the Rebellion, assume control of the Empire, or rule the Star Wars Underworld?

tc.name: STAR WARS™ Empire at War - Gold Pack
tc.short_description: Command or corrupt an entire galaxy in the definitive Star Wars strategy collection. It is a time of galactic civil war. Will you take up the reins of the Rebellion, assume control of the Empire, or rule the Star Wars Underworld?

en.name: BOKURA
en.short_description: BOKURA is a two-player puzzle adventure game. Play as two boys who ran away from their homes and work together to take yourselves somewhere far, far away. Relive the friendship of your childhood through the journey of two boys.

tc.name: 不同的冬天
tc.short_description: 《不同的冬天》是一款雙人益智冒險遊戲。玩家將扮演兩個離家出走的男孩，他們必須齊心協力，越過重重阻礙，只為到達男孩們心中那個「遙遠的地方」。和朋友一起踏上旅途，找回那一天的友情吧。

en.name: Metaphor: ReFantazio
en.short_description: After his assassination, the will of the late king decrees the next monarch to be elected by the people. Forge bonds and win over a kingdom divided in this award-winning fantasy RPG with turn-based and action combat, party customization with powerful Archetypes, and hours of exploration.

tc.name: 暗喻幻想：ReFantazio
tc.short_description: 《暗喻幻想：ReFantazio》是一款奇幻RPG，描述在國王遇刺後，少年被捲入突然展開的選舉中，成為新國王候選人，其命運就此轉動。在環遊世界的每一天之中，玩家可自由選擇如何度過，並可使用各種職階與隊伍來對抗強敵們。現在，就讓我們開始「只有在幻想中才能實現的現實之旅」吧。

en.name: Wobbledogs
en.short_description: A 3D pet simulation where you raise your own personal hive of mutating dogs, physically simulated all the way down to their guts! Wobbledogs is a casual and chill sandbox for players of all ages who want to care for their very own virtual pets in a surprising, unique, and stress-free environment.

tc.name: Wobbledogs
tc.short_description: 這是款3D寵物模擬遊戲，你可以飼養自己的突變小狗，遊戲實體模擬出小狗外觀，就連腸道也不放過！《Wobbledogs》是款老少咸宜的小品沙盒遊戲，玩家能在出乎意料、獨特又紓壓的環境飼養自己的虛擬寵物。

en.name: Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey
en.short_description: Survive your evolution in Neogene Africa starting 10 million years ago. Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey is a third-person open world survival game where you Explore, Expand, and Evolve to advance your clan to the next generation in the exciting new adventure from Panache Digital Games.

tc.name: Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey
tc.short_description: 跟著《先祖：人類奧德賽》回到一千萬年前，在人類起源之際的非洲大陸率領家族，盡情探索環境、擴張領土並演化，成功存活下來。

en.name: VA-11 Hall-A: Cyberpunk Bartender Action
en.short_description: VA-11 HALL-A: Cyberpunk Bartender Action is a booze em' up about waifus, technology, and post-dystopia life.

tc.name: VA-11 Hall-A: Cyberpunk Bartender Action
tc.short_description: VA-11 HALL-A: Cyberpunk Bartender Action is a booze em' up about waifus, technology, and post-dystopia life.

en.name: The Callisto Protocol™
en.short_description: Survive to escape the horrors of Callisto and uncover the dark secrets of Jupiter’s dead moon.

tc.name: The Callisto Protocol™
tc.short_description: Survive to escape the horrors of Callisto and uncover the dark secrets of Jupiter’s dead moon.

en.name: Orcs Must Die! 2
en.short_description: You’ve tossed, burned and sliced them by the thousands – now orcs must die more than ever before! Grab a friend and slay orcs in untold numbers in this sequel to the 2011 AIAS Strategy Game of the Year from Robot Entertainment.

en.name: MADNESS: Project Nexus
en.short_description: MADNESS: Project Nexus is a third-person Run n' Gun / Beat'Em Up filled with arcade-style action and button-mashing brutality. Gun your way through droves of bad guys in the Story Campaign, or build your perfect killing machine in the neverending onslaught of Arena Mode.

tc.short_description: MADNESS: Project Nexus is a third-person Run n' Gun / Beat'Em Up filled with arcade-style action and button-mashing brutality. Gun your way through droves of bad guys in the Story Campaign, or build your perfect killing machine in the neverending onslaught of Arena Mode.

en.name: EVERSPACE™ 2
en.short_description: EVERSPACE 2 is a fast-paced single-player spaceship shooter with exploration in space and on planets, tons of loot, RPG elements, mining, and crafting. Experience an exciting sci-fi story set in a vivid, handcrafted open world full of secrets, puzzles, and perils.

tc.name: 永恒空间2
tc.short_description: 《EVERSPACE 2》是一款快節奏快的單人太空射擊遊戲，你可以在太空及行星上深入探索、大肆搜刮，體驗RPG元素、採礦及製造玩法。在生動的手繪風格開放世界中體驗刺激的科幻故事情節，踏上充滿秘密、謎團與危險的旅程。

en.name: WAKFU
en.short_description: Immerse yourself in the WAKFU universe with this free to play MMORPG. Select your class, travel the world, meet adventurers to challenge powerful monsters in epic turn-based battles.Participate in the kingdom’s economy and politics and create your own legend!

tc.name: WAKFU
tc.short_description: Immerse yourself in the WAKFU universe with this free to play MMORPG. Select your class, travel the world, meet adventurers to challenge powerful monsters in epic turn-based battles.Participate in the kingdom’s economy and politics and create your own legend!

en.name: CrossCode
en.short_description: A retro-inspired 2D Action RPG set in the distant future. CrossCode combines 16-bit SNES-style graphics with butter-smooth physics, a fast-paced combat system, and engaging puzzle mechanics, served with a gripping sci-fi story.

tc.name: CrossCode
tc.short_description: A retro-inspired 2D Action RPG set in the distant future. CrossCode combines 16-bit SNES-style graphics with butter-smooth physics, a fast-paced combat system, and engaging puzzle mechanics, served with a gripping sci-fi story.

en.name: Rogue Legacy
en.short_description: Rogue Legacy is a genealogical rogue-"LITE" where anyone can be a hero. Each time you die, your child will succeed you. Every child is unique. One child might be colorblind, another might be a dwarf with vertigo. But that's OK, because no one is perfect, and you don't have to be to succeed.

tc.name: Rogue Legacy
tc.short_description: Rogue Legacy is a genealogical rogue-"LITE" where anyone can be a hero. Each time you die, your child will succeed you. Every child is unique. One child might be colorblind, another might be a dwarf with vertigo. But that's OK, because no one is perfect, and you don't have to be to succeed.

en.name: Tribes of Midgard
en.short_description: A vibrant blend of survival and action RPG for 1-10 players! Craft legendary items, grow your home base and embark on an epic journey through procedural realms to face towering creatures hel-bent on unleashing Ragnarök. Valhalla can wait, Einherjar!

tc.name: Tribes of Midgard
tc.short_description: 生存與動作 RPG 元素的生動融合，可讓 1 至 10 名玩家一同遊玩！製作傳說物品、拓展大本營並踏上一段史詩之旅，在程序生成的國度中面對勢要引發諸神黃昏的龐大敵人。英靈戰士，先別急著返回英靈殿！

en.name: The Outer Worlds
en.short_description: The Outer Worlds is an award-winning single-player RPG from Obsidian Entertainment and Private Division. As you explore a space colony, the character you decide to become will determine how this player-driven story unfolds. In the colony's corporate equation, you are the unplanned variable.

tc.name: The Outer Worlds
tc.short_description: The Outer Worlds is an award-winning single-player RPG from Obsidian Entertainment and Private Division. As you explore a space colony, the character you decide to become will determine how this player-driven story unfolds. In the colony's corporate equation, you are the unplanned variable.

en.name: Wingspan
en.short_description: Wingspan is a relaxing, award-winning strategy card game about birds for 1 to 5 players. Each bird you play extends a chain of powerful combinations in one of your three habitats. Your goal is to discover and attract the best birds to your network of wildlife preserves.

tc.name: Wingspan
tc.short_description: Wingspan是一款屢獲殊榮的鳥類策略卡牌遊戲，輕鬆愉快，適合 1-5名玩家。每隻鳥的加入都會讓你三塊棲息地之一 的鳥類組合變得更為豐富多彩。你的目標是發現和 吸引最好的鳥類進入你的野生動物保護區。

en.name: Fran Bow
en.short_description: Fran Bow is a creepy adventure game that tells the story of Fran, a young girl struggling with a mental disorder and an unfair destiny.

tc.name: Fran Bow
tc.short_description: Fran Bow is a creepy adventure game that tells the story of Fran, a young girl struggling with a mental disorder and an unfair destiny.

en.name: Will To Live Online
en.short_description: Will To Live is a MMORPG-shooter whose action takes place in a severe post-apocalyptic world. Explore the world, engage in fights with mutants and other survivors, join the clans in the struggle for existence and prove your right to Live.

tc.name: Will To Live Online
tc.short_description: Will To Live is a MMORPG-shooter whose action takes place in a severe post-apocalyptic world. Explore the world, engage in fights with mutants and other survivors, join the clans in the struggle for existence and prove your right to Live.

en.name: Super Hexagon
en.short_description: Super Hexagon is a minimal action game by Terry Cavanagh, with music by Chipzel.

tc.name: Super Hexagon
tc.short_description: “Super Hexagon”（超級六角形）是特里·卡瓦納（Terry Cavanagh）所創的最迷你動作遊戲，由Chipzel配樂。（遊戲語言為英文）

en.name: Barony
en.short_description: Barony is the premier first-person roguelike with cooperative play! Adventure alone, or gather a party with iconic and unusual RPG classes to face off against the brutal dungeons. Test your resourcefulness, wits, and friendships, on your quest to lift the evil lich's curse!

tc.name: Barony
tc.short_description: Barony is the premier first-person roguelike with cooperative play! Adventure alone, or gather a party with iconic and unusual RPG classes to face off against the brutal dungeons. Test your resourcefulness, wits, and friendships, on your quest to lift the evil lich's curse!

en.name: Cultivation Tales
en.short_description: Cultivation Tales is an open world survival craft online game. You will experience collecting, crafting, hunting, fighting, building, researching, in a wild mythical world. Fight for your clan and yourself, from mortal to divinity!

tc.short_description: Cultivation Tales is an open world survival craft online game. You will experience collecting, crafting, hunting, fighting, building, researching, in a wild mythical world. Fight for your clan and yourself, from mortal to divinity!

en.name: Nodebuster
en.short_description: Nodebuster is a short, experimental incremental game about busting nodes and destroying reality.

tc.name: Nodebuster
tc.short_description: Nodebuster is a short, experimental incremental game about busting nodes and destroying reality.

en.name: Big Ambitions
en.short_description: Big Ambitions is a revolutionary role-playing business sim. Go from nothing to the biggest entrepreneur in New York by opening small businesses or slowly building huge corporations any way you like.

tc.name: Big Ambitions
tc.short_description: 《Big Ambitions》是一款革命性的角色扮演商業模擬遊戲。以你喜歡的方式，從一無所有的狀態成為紐約最頂尖的企業家。

en.name: Little Misfortune
en.short_description: Led by her new friend, Mr. Voice, Misfortune ventures into the woods, where mysteries are unraveled and a little bad luck unfolds.

tc.name: Little Misfortune
tc.short_description: Led by her new friend, Mr. Voice, Misfortune ventures into the woods, where mysteries are unraveled and a little bad luck unfolds.

en.name: Little Inferno
en.short_description: Throw your toys into your fire, and play with them as they burn. An adventure that takes place almost entirely in front of a fireplace - about looking up up up out of the chimney, and the cold world just on the other side of the wall. From the creators of World of Goo and Human Resource Machine.

tc.name: 小小煉獄
tc.short_description: 把你的玩具扔進火裡，在熊熊燃燒的火焰中擺弄它們。這是一場幾乎完全發生在壁爐前的冒險，帶著你的思緒往上飄啊飄啊飄出煙囪，眺望牆壁另一端的冰冷世界。 由《黏黏世界》、《程序員升職記》和《70億人類》的主創人員精心製作。

en.name: Valkyria Chronicles™
en.short_description: The critically acclaimed Valkyria Chronicles is now available on PC in 1080p True HD, including all previously released DLC!

tc.name: Valkyria Chronicles™
tc.short_description: The critically acclaimed Valkyria Chronicles is now available on PC in 1080p True HD, including all previously released DLC!

en.name: Half-Life 2: Episode One
en.short_description: Half-Life 2 has sold over 4 million copies worldwide, and earned over 35 Game of the Year Awards. Episode One is the first in a series of games that reveal the aftermath of Half-Life 2 and launch a journey beyond City 17. Also features two multiplayer games. Half-Life 2 not required.

tc.name: Half-Life 2: Episode One
tc.short_description: 《戰慄時空 2》全球已經銷售超過四百萬套，並贏得超過 35 個「年度遊戲」獎項。Episode One 是《戰慄時空 2》一系列續章的第一幕，帶您開啟遠離 17 號城市的旅程。同時包含了兩個多人遊戲。不需要《戰慄時空 2》。

en.name: Tavern Master
en.short_description: Tavern Master is all about managing your medieval tavern. You start with a very small room, couple of benches and tables and build your way up to a huge successful tavern with a kitchen, rooms for guests, group of loyal staff and much more!

tc.name: Tavern Master
tc.short_description: 《酒館大師 (Tavern Master)》專注於打造經營中世紀酒館的完美體驗。你的生意要從只有幾組桌椅的窮巷陋室做起，一步步發展為廚房，客房，忠誠的員工隊伍應有盡有，名震天下的大酒館！

en.name: Octodad: Dadliest Catch
en.short_description: Octodad: Dadliest Catch is a game about destruction, deception, and fatherhood. The player controls Octodad, a dapper octopus masquerading as a human, as he goes about his life. Octodad's existence is a constant struggle, as he must master mundane tasks with his unwieldy boneless tentacles while simultaneously keeping his cephalopodan...

en.name: Pavlov
en.short_description: Pavlov is a multiplayer shooter in VR with heavy focus on community features. Realistic reloading features and fast paced combat as part of the core experience. Play the #1 most popular VR shooter on PC today.

tc.short_description: Pavlov is a multiplayer shooter in VR with heavy focus on community features. Realistic reloading features and fast paced combat as part of the core experience. Play the #1 most popular VR shooter on PC today.

en.name: ENDLESS™ Space 2
en.short_description: ENDLESS™ Space 2 is a Strategic Space Opera, featuring the compelling “just one more turn” gameplay, set in the mysterious ENDLESS™ Universe. As the leader of your civilization, will you impose your vision and build the greatest stellar empire?

tc.name: ENDLESS™ Space 2
tc.short_description: 《Endless Space 2》是一款注重策略的宇宙史詩遊戲，場景設在神祕的永恆宇宙，採用讓人欲罷不能的回合制。身為一個文明的領導人，你能不能運用自己的遠見，建立最偉大的星際帝國？

en.name: Assassin’s Creed® Rogue
en.short_description: Introducing Assassin’s Creed® Rogue, the darkest chapter in the Assassin’s Creed franchise yet. As Shay, you will experience the slow transformation from Assassin to Assassin Hunter. Follow your own creed and set off on an extraordinary journey through New York City, the wild river valley, and far away to the icy cold waters of the North...

tc.name: Assassin’s Creed® Rogue

en.name: Dicey Dungeons
en.short_description: Become a giant walking dice, explore dungeons and defy Lady Luck in this dice powered roguelike! Now featuring "Reunion", a free DLC with six brand-new episodes!

tc.name: Dicey Dungeons
tc.short_description: 當你是一枚骰子時，又要如何與幸運女神為敵呢？

en.name: Internet Cafe Simulator 2
en.short_description: Internet Cafe Simulator 2 is an extremely comprehensive and detailed internet cafe business simulation game.

tc.name: Internet Cafe Simulator 2
tc.short_description: Internet Cafe Simulator 2 is an extremely comprehensive and detailed internet cafe business simulation game.

en.name: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game
en.short_description: Make your dream cars a reality with Automation’s unparalleled car and engine design tools. Gain a competitive edge through smart engineering and business decisions to help you build an automotive empire. Will you become an industry leader, or just a footnote in automotive history?

tc.name: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

Gain a competitive edge through smart engineering and business decisions to help you build an automotive empire. Will you become an industry leader, or just a footnote in automotive history?

en.name: Far Cry® New Dawn
en.short_description: Dive into a transformed vibrant post-apocalyptic Hope County, Montana, 17 years after a global nuclear catastrophe. Lead the fight against the Highwaymen, as they seek to take over the last remaining resources.

tc.name: Far Cry® New Dawn
tc.short_description: 於世界核災 17 年之後，深入在末日後徹底改變的蒙大拿希望郡。 領導對抗攔路強盜，不讓他們奪走僅剩的資源

en.name: Baba Is You
en.short_description: Baba Is You is a puzzle game where the rules you have to follow are present as blocks you can interact with. By manipulating them, you can change how the game works, repurpose things you find in the levels and cause surprising interactions!

tc.name: Baba Is You
tc.short_description: 《Baba Is You》是一款益智遊戲，玩家必須遵循的規則都以方塊的形式呈現，且玩家可以和這些方塊互動。只要操控這些方塊，就能改變遊戲的運作方式，重新定義關卡中各種物體的意義，並創造出意想不到的互動！

en.name: Sea of Stars
en.short_description: Sea of Stars is a turn-based RPG inspired by the classics. It tells the story of two Children of the Solstice who will combine the powers of the sun and moon to perform Eclipse Magic, the only force capable of fending off the monstrous creations of the evil alchemist known as The Fleshmancer.

tc.name: Sea of Stars 星之海
tc.short_description: 《星之海》是一款向經典致敬的回合制角色扮演遊戲。 玩家將扮演兩位雙至日之子，集日月之力施展星蝕魔法，以此對抗邪惡血肉術士手下的恐怖造物。

en.name: Tales of ARISE
en.short_description: 300 years of tyranny. A mysterious mask. Lost pain and memories. Wield the Blazing Sword and join a mysterious, untouchable girl to fight your oppressors. Experience a tale of liberation, featuring characters with next-gen graphical expressiveness!

tc.name: 破曉傳奇
tc.short_description: ３００年的暴政、不明面具、遺失的痛覺與記憶。化身為強大火焰之劍的唯一使用者，與不可碰觸的少女及伙伴們一起挺身對抗壓迫者吧。以新世代技術描繪出表情生動的角色，一個關於解放的戰鬥故事。

en.name: Ni no Kuni™ II: Revenant Kingdom
en.short_description: Join the young king Evan as he sets out on an epic quest to found a new kingdom and, with the help of some new friends, unite his world, saving its people from a terrible evil.

tc.name: Ni no Kuni™ II: Revenant Kingdom
tc.short_description: 化身年轻国王Evan，为自己立了个宏伟的使命，寻找建立新的国度，与一同冒险犯难的伙伴们，将国家团结起来、拯救人民逃离恶魔的魔掌。

en.name: Resident Evil
en.short_description: The game that defined the survival-horror genre is back! Check out the remastered HD version of Resident Evil.

tc.name: Resident Evil
tc.short_description: 生存恐怖類型的遊戲回歸！這是重新製作的高清版Resident Evil。

en.name: Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 3 (2011)
en.short_description: The best-selling first-person action series of all-time returns with an epic sequel to the multiple GOTY award winner Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 2

tc.name: Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 3 (2011)

en.short_description: Become the Blade that Destroys Demons!

tc.name: 鬼滅之刃 火之神血風譚
tc.short_description: 化為滅鬼之刃吧！

en.name: Tower Unite
en.short_description: PLAY, CREATE, PARTY! Tower Unite is a community-based virtual world party game with online games, entertainment, activities, and absolutely NO microtransactions.

tc.name: Tower Unite
tc.short_description: PLAY, CREATE, PARTY! Tower Unite is a community-based virtual world party game with online games, entertainment, activities, and absolutely NO microtransactions.

en.short_description: Clone Drone in the Danger Zone is a robot voxel slice-em-up where any part of your body can be sliced off. With your mind downloaded into a robot gladiator, you must survive the sinister trials of the arena.

tc.name: Clone Drone in the Danger Zone
tc.short_description: Clone Drone in the Danger Zone is a robot voxel slice-em-up where any part of your body can be sliced off. With your mind downloaded into a robot gladiator, you must survive the sinister trials of the arena.

en.name: JUMP FORCE
en.short_description: Create your own avatar to fight alongside the most powerful Manga heroes in an original Story Mode, or head to the Online Lobby to challenge other players and discover lots of modes and activities.

tc.name: JUMP FORCE
tc.short_description: 創造屬於你的虛擬化身，在遊戲原創劇情模式中與最強大的漫畫英雄並肩作戰，或是前去連線大廳挑戰其他玩家，並且發掘各種玩法。

en.name: Not For Broadcast
en.short_description: A new political Party has won a landslide in the General Election, and for some reason the editor at the news station you work at has done a runner. Now it’s up to you, the Janitor, to take over the editing booth in this tumultuous time - will you help the government, or stand in their way?

tc.name: Not For Broadcast
tc.short_description: A new political Party has won a landslide in the General Election, and for some reason the editor at the news station you work at has done a runner. Now it’s up to you, the Janitor, to take over the editing booth in this tumultuous time - will you help the government, or stand in their way?

en.name: Mini Motorways
en.short_description: Mini Motorways is a strategy simulation game about designing the road map for a growing city. Build a traffic network, one road at a time, to create a bustling metropolis. Redesign your roads and place your motorways to get everyone where they need to go. How long can you keep the city moving?

tc.name: Mini Motorways
tc.short_description: Mini Motorways 是關於在城市發展中設計道路網的策略模擬遊戲。按部就班地建設交通網絡，創造繁華的大都市。重新設計您的道路並放置高速公路，讓每個人都能到達目的地。你能讓城市運轉多久？

en.name: Superflight
en.short_description: Superflight is an intense, easy to learn wingsuit game with an infinite number of beautiful procedurally generated maps. A great game to relax for half an hour and chase your latest highscore!

tc.name: Superflight
tc.short_description: Superflight is an intense, easy to learn wingsuit game with an infinite number of beautiful procedurally generated maps. A great game to relax for half an hour and chase your latest highscore!

en.name: Yes, Your Grace
en.short_description: These are troubling times, Your Grace. The petitioners’ petty matters exceed our limited resources, to say nothing of the war. A careful balance must be struck. Your throne awaits.

tc.name: Yes, Your Grace
tc.short_description: These are troubling times, Your Grace. The petitioners’ petty matters exceed our limited resources, to say nothing of the war. A careful balance must be struck. Your throne awaits.

en.name: ROMANCE OF THE THREE KINGDOMS XIV
en.short_description: Triumph over the land, take charge of the fate of China! Conquer territories and fly your colors!

tc.name: 三國志14
tc.short_description: 奪取土地、喪失土地、收復失地。得「土地」者得天下！

en.name: Divinity: Original Sin (Classic)
en.short_description: Gather your party and get ready for a new, back-to-the-roots RPG adventure! Discuss your decisions with companions; fight foes in turn-based combat; explore an open world and interact with everything and everyone you see. Join up with a friend to play online in co-op and make your own adventures with the powerful RPG toolkit.
