en.short_description: Command military Special Ops Teams in gripping tactical combat against a Middle East-based terrorist network. Sequel to RockPaperShotgun's "Best Tactics Game of 2014".

tc.name: 破门而入2：北方特遣队
tc.short_description: 指挥特种作战小队，体验紧张激烈的战术对抗，打击虚构的中东恐怖组织。这款游戏是RockPaperShotgun旗下“2014年最佳战术游戏”的续作。

en.name: Stranded Deep
en.short_description: Take the role of a plane crash survivor stranded somewhere in the Pacific Ocean. Come face to face with some of the most life threatening scenarios that will result in a different experience each time you play. Scavenge. Discover. Survive.

tc.name: Stranded Deep
tc.short_description: Take the role of a plane crash survivor stranded somewhere in the Pacific Ocean. Come face to face with some of the most life threatening scenarios that will result in a different experience each time you play. Scavenge. Discover. Survive.

en.name: Feed the Cups
en.short_description: Feed the Cups is a Roguelite multiplayer online cooperative game. Run a Drink Shop, stocking up, preparing ingredients, taking orders, crafting drinks, cleaning up, and checking equipment. Join your friends together!

tc.name: Feed the Cups
tc.short_description: Feed the Cups is a Roguelite multiplayer online cooperative game. Run a Drink Shop, stocking up, preparing ingredients, taking orders, crafting drinks, cleaning up, and checking equipment. Join your friends together!

en.name: Armello
en.short_description: Armello is a grim fairy-tale board game come to life, with every match combining deep, tactical card play, rich tabletop strategy and RPG elements. Leverage subterfuge, spells and careful strategy to wrangle control of the game's chaotic odds as you quest for the throne.

tc.name: Armello
tc.short_description: 愛門羅是一款嚴肅且風格奇幻，栩栩如生的棋盤遊戲。充滿著虛張聲勢並結合了深度策略的冒險，戰術性紙牌行動，豐富的棋盤策略與RPG要素。進行史詩般單人模式或多人對戰模式，施放咒術，雇用特務，並且準備好毒藥與計謀來追求寶座任務吧！

en.name: Saints Row 2
en.short_description: Saints Row 2 brings true freedom to open-world gaming. Players can play as who they want, how they want, and with whomever they want in this sequel to the much acclaimed and tremendously successful Saints Row.

tc.name: Saints Row 2
tc.short_description: Saints Row 2 brings true freedom to open-world gaming. Players can play as who they want, how they want, and with whomever they want in this sequel to the much acclaimed and tremendously successful Saints Row.

en.name: CastleMiner Z
en.short_description: CastleMiner Z is an infinite world filled with deep places to explore, and horrifying monsters to slay. Build structures out of blocks, craft weapons and tools from raw materials, and explore the vast and frightening world around you.

tc.name: CastleMiner Z
tc.short_description: CastleMiner Z is an infinite world filled with deep places to explore, and horrifying monsters to slay. Build structures out of blocks, craft weapons and tools from raw materials, and explore the vast and frightening world around you.

en.name: Symphony of War: The Nephilim Saga
en.short_description: Enter Tahnra, a land savaged by war. You, a fresh academy graduate with humble beginnings, will grow to lead a grand army against a corrupt adversary. Gather heroes, form bonds, and lead your force in turn-based battles. Make use of tactics, terrain, morale and more to bring peace to the land!

tc.name: Symphony of War: The Nephilim Saga
tc.short_description: Enter Tahnra, a land savaged by war. You, a fresh academy graduate with humble beginnings, will grow to lead a grand army against a corrupt adversary. Gather heroes, form bonds, and lead your force in turn-based battles. Make use of tactics, terrain, morale and more to bring peace to the land!

en.name: Deponia
en.short_description: In Deponia, the world has degenerated into a vast garbage dump, in which the crotchety Rufus ekes out his sorry existence.

tc.name: Deponia
tc.short_description: 在德波尼亞，世界退化成了巨大垃圾堆，壞脾氣的魯夫斯在這裡勉強求生。

en.name: FPS Chess
en.short_description: Battle a friend in this fast paced 1v1 class-based first-person shooter. Chess takes a back-seat to FPS as you win duel after duel and capture the opponent's pieces until you've beaten their king and won the game.

tc.name: FPS Chess
tc.short_description: Battle a friend in this fast paced 1v1 class-based first-person shooter. Chess takes a back-seat to FPS as you win duel after duel and capture the opponent's pieces until you've beaten their king and won the game.

en.name: F1® 2020
en.short_description: F1® 2020 allows you to create your F1® team for the very first time and race alongside the official teams and drivers. Alternatively, challenge your friends in new split-screen with casual race options for more relaxed racing. Compete on 22 circuits, with current and classic content.

tc.name: F1® 2020
tc.short_description: F1® 2020 首次讓你建立自己的 F1® 車隊，跟官方車隊和車手一起比賽。或者，在全新的螢幕分割模式中選擇休閒比賽選項，挑戰你的好友，以來一場更輕鬆的比賽。在 22 款賽道中，以當代和經典內容比賽。

en.name: Hydroneer
en.short_description: Hydroneer is a mining and base building sandbox. Dig for gold and other resources to turn a profit and enhance your mining operation. Build a base of operations, forge weapons, go fishing, and dig deep!

tc.name: Hydroneer
tc.short_description: Hydroneer is a mining and base building sandbox. Dig for gold and other resources to turn a profit and enhance your mining operation. Build a base of operations, forge weapons, go fishing, and dig deep!

en.name: Yakuza: Like a Dragon
en.short_description: Become Ichiban Kasuga, a low-ranking yakuza grunt left on the brink of death by the man he trusted most. Take up your legendary bat and get ready to crack some underworld skulls in dynamic RPG combat set against the backdrop of modern-day Japan.

tc.name: 人中之龍7　光與闇的去向　國際版
tc.short_description: 品味新主角「春日一番」在新舞台「橫濱伊勢佐木異人町」與夥伴一步步往上爬，並粉碎強大惡徒的熱血劇情。最新作品才有的精彩內容，等您來體驗。

en.name: ENDER MAGNOLIA: Bloom in the Mist
en.short_description: Decades after the events of ENDER LILIES, Homunculi — sorrowful, artificial life forms — roam the land. In this dark fantasy Metroidvania, face formidable enemies and explore a bewitching post-apocalyptic world. Humans and Homunculi — what awaits at the end of the quest for their salvation?

tc.name: ENDER MAGNOLIA: Bloom in the Mist
tc.short_description: 這款探索類動作RPG，描繪的是《ENDER LILIES》那場死亡之雨的災難經過數十年之後的故事。失控的「機械生命體」崛起，將身處的世界化為了人間煉獄。你將在本作中自由探索這淒美而殘酷的末世國度，並與同伴合力對抗強敵。在這趟救贖之旅的盡頭，迎接人類和機械生命體的，又會是怎樣的命運？

en.name: The Dark Pictures Anthology: Man of Medan
en.short_description: The Dark Pictures Anthology is a series of stand-alone, branching cinematic horror games that can also be played online with a friend. In Man of Medan, five friends set sail on a holiday diving trip that soon changes into something much more sinister.

tc.name: The Dark Pictures Anthology: Man of Medan
tc.short_description: 《黑相集》是一系列獨立電影式，帶有多分歧故事情節並且可以與朋友一同連線遊玩的恐怖遊戲。 在《黑相集：棉蘭號》中，五位好友啟程前往假日潛水之旅突然急轉直下，發展成某種不祥的災難。

en.name: Dwarf Fortress
en.short_description: Build a fortress and try to help your dwarves survive against a deeply generated world. Keep your dwarves happy, grow their community and beware of digging too deeply. The deepest, most intricate simulation of a world that's ever been created.

tc.name: Dwarf Fortress
tc.short_description: 史上最具深度與複雜性的世界模擬器。傳奇遊戲《矮人要塞》現已登陸Steam！在這個由程序生成，擁有自洽生態、動態歷史與百萬細節的幻想宇宙中，構築一座要塞，努力幫助矮人文明生存下去。

en.name: Boundary
en.short_description: Boundary is a multiplayer tactical space-based shooter game, engaging in fierce team vs team zero gravity firefights and executing low-gravity operations on orbiting space installations against other enemy astroperators and other entities.

tc.name: 邊境
tc.short_description: 《邊境》是一款近未來太空題材的第一人稱射擊遊戲，帶您領略真正的無重力戰術射擊體驗。形形色色的太空操作員在近軌道相遇，打破常規束縛，讓失重成為你的武器！

en.name: The Incredible Adventures of Van Helsing
en.short_description: Put on your wide-brimmed hat, grab your weapons and embark on an incredible adventure in the gothic-noir world of Borgovia, where mad science threatens the fragile peace between monster and mortal.

tc.name: The Incredible Adventures of Van Helsing
tc.short_description: Put on your wide-brimmed hat, grab your weapons and embark on an incredible adventure in the gothic-noir world of Borgovia, where mad science threatens the fragile peace between monster and mortal.

en.name: Disney Dreamlight Valley
en.short_description: Explore a world filled with the magic of Disney as you discover rich stories and build the perfect neighborhood alongside Disney and Pixar heroes and villains in this new life-sim adventure game. Welcome to Disney Dreamlight Valley.

tc.name: 迪士尼夢光谷
tc.short_description: Explore a world filled with the magic of Disney as you discover rich stories and build the perfect neighborhood alongside Disney and Pixar heroes and villains in this new life-sim adventure game. Welcome to Disney Dreamlight Valley.

en.name: WRC 7 FIA World Rally Championship
en.short_description: Take on all the challenges of the 2017 World Rally Championship: the official cars and drivers, 13 countries, 52 Special Stages, every surface, more powerful cars, more demanding physics, longer races, and an eSports mode to keep you on the edge of your seat all year round.

tc.name: WRC 7 FIA World Rally Championship
tc.short_description: 參加 WRC 的 13 場拉力賽，遊戲忠實重製了比賽環境。在冠軍戰化身駕駛新車上陣的最佳車手。無論是自己或線上遊玩，挑戰Epic Stages、面對每週挑戰、在 WRC 中表現的像個專業人士！

en.name: Transport Fever
en.short_description: Transport Fever is a railroad-focused tycoon game. Players start in 1850 and build up a thriving transport company. As an emerging transport tycoon, the player constructs stations, airports, harbors and makes money by connecting areas requiring transport services. Build up your own Empire!

tc.name: Transport Fever
tc.short_description: Transport Fever is a railroad-focused tycoon game. Players start in 1850 and build up a thriving transport company. As an emerging transport tycoon, the player constructs stations, airports, harbors and makes money by connecting areas requiring transport services. Build up your own Empire!

en.name: Bendy and the Ink Machine
en.short_description: Bendy and the Ink Machine® is the first person puzzle action horror game that will forever ruin your childhood love of cartoons.

tc.name: Bendy and the Ink Machine
tc.short_description: Bendy and the Ink Machine® is the first person puzzle action horror game that will forever ruin your childhood love of cartoons.

en.name: My Friend Pedro
en.short_description: My Friend Pedro is a violent ballet about friendship, imagination, and one man’s struggle to obliterate anyone in his path at the behest of a sentient banana.

tc.name: My Friend Pedro
tc.short_description: 我的朋友佩德羅是一場關於友情、幻想的血色芭蕾，講述了一個男人如何在一個會說話的香蕉的引導下人擋殺人、佛擋殺佛

en.name: SpeedRunners
en.short_description: Cut-throat multiplayer running game that pits 4 players against each other, locally and/or online. Run, jump, swing around, and use devious weapons and pick-ups to knock opponents off-screen! One of the most competitive games you'll ever play.

tc.name: SpeedRunners
tc.short_description: Cut-throat multiplayer running game that pits 4 players against each other, locally and/or online. Run, jump, swing around, and use devious weapons and pick-ups to knock opponents off-screen! One of the most competitive games you'll ever play.

en.name: Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair
en.short_description: Jabberwock Island—You and your classmates were ready for fun in the sun until Monokuma returned to restart his murderous game! Trapped in a kill-or-be-killed situation, your only hope rests in solving the island’s mysteries.

tc.name: 超級槍彈辯駁2 再會了絕望學園
tc.short_description: Jabberwock Island—You and your classmates were ready for fun in the sun until Monokuma returned to restart his murderous game! Trapped in a kill-or-be-killed situation, your only hope rests in solving the island’s mysteries.

en.name: Dome Keeper
en.short_description: Defend against waves of alien monsters in this unique roguelike action miner. Dig for resources, collect useful gadgets, and upgrade equipment to increase odds of survival – just hurry back before your dome is destroyed!

tc.name: Dome Keeper 穹頂守護者
tc.short_description: 走進獨樹一格的類Rogue採礦動作遊戲，抵禦一波接一波外星怪物的攻擊。挖掘資源，收集實用裝置並升級裝備，不斷提高你存活下來的可能性。切記，要在穹頂被摧毀前及時趕回來！

en.name: Borderlands Game of the Year Enhanced
en.short_description: Discover the original co-op shooter-looter, crammed with new enhancements! As one of 4 trigger-happy mercenaries with RPG progression, equip bazillions of guns to take on the desert planet Pandora.

tc.name: Borderlands Game of the Year Enhanced
tc.short_description: 快來體驗這款經過全新優化的合作式射擊奪寶遊戲鼻祖吧！扮演4位無法無天的傭兵之一體驗RPG養成要素，裝備無窮盡的槍械征服荒涼的行星Pandora。

en.name: Stonehearth
en.short_description: Pioneer a living world full of warmth, heroism, and mystery. Help a small group of settlers build a home for themselves in a forgotten land. Establish a food supply, build shelter, defend your people, monitor their moods, and find a way to grow and expand, facing challenges at every step.

tc.name: Stonehearth
tc.short_description: Pioneer a living world full of warmth, heroism, and mystery. Help a small group of settlers build a home for themselves in a forgotten land. Establish a food supply, build shelter, defend your people, monitor their moods, and find a way to grow and expand, facing challenges at every step.

en.name: OCTOPATH TRAVELER™
en.short_description: Eight travelers. Eight adventures. Eight roles to play. Embark on an epic journey across the vast and wondrous world of Orsterra and discover the captivating stories of each of the eight travelers.

tc.name: 歧路旅人
tc.short_description: 八位旅人，八次冒險，八個角色等你來扮演。橫越奇妙又寬廣的奧魯斯特拉大陸，展開精彩旅程，揭開八位旅人各自的動人篇章。

en.name: Prototype 2
en.short_description: Become the ultimate shape-shifting weapon!

tc.name: Prototype 2
tc.short_description: Become the ultimate shape-shifting weapon!

en.name: Marvel's Avengers - The Definitive Edition
en.short_description: Assemble your team of Earth’s Mightiest Heroes, embrace your powers, and live your Super Hero dreams.

tc.name: 《漫威復仇者聯盟》：最終版
tc.short_description: 集結地表最強英雄團隊，接受你的力量，實現你的超級英雄夢。

en.name: The Escapists
en.short_description: The Escapists provides players the opportunity of experiencing a light-hearted insight into everyday prison life with the main objective being that of escaping!

tc.name: The Escapists
tc.short_description: The Escapists provides players the opportunity of experiencing a light-hearted insight into everyday prison life with the main objective being that of escaping!

en.name: Sifu
en.short_description: Sifu is a realistic third-person brawler with tight Kung Fu combat mechanics and cinematic martial arts action embarking you on a path for revenge.

tc.name: Sifu
tc.short_description: 《Sifu》是一款寫實風格的第三人稱格鬥遊戲，緊湊的功夫戰鬥系統與電影式的武打動作體驗，將帶領你踏上復仇的征途。

en.name: DiRT 4
en.short_description: DiRT 4 is all about embracing fear. It’s about the thrill, exhilaration and adrenaline that is absolutely vital to off-road racing. It’s about loving the feeling of pushing flat out next to a sheer cliff drop, going for the gap that’s too small and seeing how much air you can get. Be Fearless.

tc.name: DiRT 4
tc.short_description: 領先全球的越野賽車系列回來囉！大地長征4讓你乘坐在有著強悍馬力的載具上，來感受地球上最艱難的拉力，rallycross與landrush。遊戲中「你的舞台」系統讓你只靠一顆按鍵即可創造出成千上萬種賽道。

en.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl
en.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl tells a story about survival in the Zone – a very dangerous place, where you fear not only the radiation, anomalies and deadly creatures, but other S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s, who have their own goals and wishes.

tc.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl
tc.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl tells a story about survival in the Zone – a very dangerous place, where you fear not only the radiation, anomalies and deadly creatures, but other S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s, who have their own goals and wishes.

en.name: One Finger Death Punch
en.short_description: Experience cinematic kung-fu battles in the fastest, most intense brawler the indie world has ever seen! With the unique 1:1 response system of One Finger Death Punch, players will feel the immediate feedback of every bone-crunching hit. Pay tribute to the masters using five classic kung-fu styles mixed with additional weapons.

tc.name: One Finger Death Punch
tc.short_description: Experience cinematic kung-fu battles in the fastest, most intense brawler the indie world has ever seen! With the unique 1:1 response system of One Finger Death Punch, players will feel the immediate feedback of every bone-crunching hit. Pay tribute to the masters using five classic kung-fu styles mixed with additional weapons.

en.name: MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries
en.short_description: The year is 3015. The battlefields are dominated by war machines known as BattleMechs. Level entire cities and decimate the enemy in your BattleMech. Follow a quest for glory and revenge. Manage an expanding mercenary company. Fight alongside your friends with a four-player PvE co-op.

tc.name: MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries
tc.short_description: The year is 3015. The battlefields are dominated by war machines known as BattleMechs. Level entire cities and decimate the enemy in your BattleMech. Follow a quest for glory and revenge. Manage an expanding mercenary company. Fight alongside your friends with a four-player PvE co-op.

en.name: BRAIN / OUT
en.short_description: Brain / Out is a multiplayer shooter with a nostalgic post-Soviet feel. Experience dynamic battles and exterminate your enemies with a large arsenal of modern weaponry. Lock'n'load!

tc.name: BRAIN / OUT
tc.short_description: Brain / Out 是一個前蘇聯風格的多人射擊遊戲。體驗動感的戰鬥並使用現代武器大幹一場吧!

en.name: Kingdom: New Lands
en.short_description: Kingdom: New Lands builds upon the award-winning gameplay and mystery of Kingdom by introducing an abundance of new content to the IGF-nominated title while maintaining the simplicity and depth that legions of monarchs have come to experience and enjoy.

tc.name: Kingdom: New Lands
tc.short_description: Kingdom: New Lands builds upon the award-winning gameplay and mystery of Kingdom by introducing an abundance of new content to the IGF-nominated title while maintaining the simplicity and depth that legions of monarchs have come to experience and enjoy.

en.name: Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove
en.short_description: Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove is the complete Shovel Knight collection, containing all 5 games in the epic saga! Dig, blast, slash, and bash your way through a fantastical, 8-bit inspired world of pixel-perfect platforming, memorable characters, and world-class action-adventure gameplay.

tc.name: Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove
tc.short_description: 鏟子騎士：無盡寶藏包含鏟子騎士系列全5作！這是一個世界級的冒險遊戲，在懷舊的人物和像素畫面中挖、炸、砍、劈，開闢出你自己的奇異道路！

en.name: Montaro
en.short_description: Montaro is a DOGE.

tc.name: Montaro
tc.short_description: 咚咚咚咚向前奔跑,超可愛的柴犬夢太郎療癒你的心!

en.name: Age of Mythology: Retold
en.short_description: Play as mythological Gods and smite your enemies in this award-winning, mythological Real-Time Strategy classic given new life. Wage war across timeless campaigns, fierce skirmishes, and god-powered multiplayer modes.

tc.name: Age of Mythology: Retold
tc.short_description: 由屢獲殊榮的 Age of Empires 系列創作者製作，Age of Mythology: Retold 超越了歷史，來到了眾神、神獸和人類彼此爭鬥的神話時代。

en.name: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales
en.short_description: Discover a brand new RPG from the creators of The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt. Facing an imminent invasion, Meve — war-veteran and Queen of Lyria and Rivia — is forced to once again enter the warpath and set out on a dark journey of destruction and revenge.

tc.name: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales
tc.short_description: 踏進由《巫師 3：狂獵》團隊創造的全新角色扮演遊戲。戰功彪炳的里瑞亞與利維亞女王梅芙面對來勢洶洶的侵略，必須再次征戰沙場，並展開黑暗的復仇與毀滅之旅。

en.name: Sniper Ghost Warrior Contracts
en.short_description: Become the ultimate assassin in the most realistic modern warfare sniping game available. Engage in an immersive single-player campaign across large, open-ended maps. Tactical thinking, stealth approach and precision in execution of long shots required.

tc.name: Sniper Ghost Warrior Contracts
tc.short_description: 在最真實的現代戰爭狙擊遊戲中成為終極殺手。進入大型開放地圖來沈浸於單人戰役之中。你必須擁有戰術性思考、隱匿行動和精準的遠程射擊。

en.name: A Plague Tale: Requiem
en.short_description: Embark on a heartrending journey into a brutal, breathtaking world, and discover the cost of saving those you love in a desperate struggle for survival. Strike from the shadows or unleash hell with a variety of weapons, tools and unearthly powers.

tc.name: A Plague Tale: Requiem
tc.short_description: 走進異象四起卻令人屏息的殘酷世界，踏上淒婉揪心的旅程。不惜代價求生、拯救自己所愛的人，感受其中的糾結與痛苦。利用各種兵器、工具和非同尋常的能力，暗中偷襲或發動駭人的攻勢。

en.name: Inside the Backrooms
en.short_description: Inside the Backrooms is a horror multiplayer game mixed with different mechanics that will make you spend an intense night with friends. Explore, think, interact, but be careful, it is rumored that there are several entities wishing to find you...

tc.name: Inside the Backrooms
tc.short_description: Inside the Backrooms is a horror multiplayer game mixed with different mechanics that will make you spend an intense night with friends. Explore, think, interact, but be careful, it is rumored that there are several entities wishing to find you...

en.name: Refunct
en.short_description: Refunct is a peaceful, short first-person platformer about restoring a vibrant world.

tc.name: Refunct
tc.short_description: Refunct是一款平靜，簡短，關於恢復一個繽紛世界的第一人稱平台遊戲。

en.name: ENDLESS™ Legend
en.short_description: ENDLESS™ Legend is a 4X turn-based fantasy strategy game by the creators of ENDLESS™ Space and Dungeon of the ENDLESS™. Control every aspect of your civilization as you struggle to save your homeworld Auriga. Create your own Legend!

tc.name: 無盡帝國
tc.short_description: 《ENDLESS™ Legend》是一款4X回合制奇幻策略遊戲，由《ENDLESS™ Space》和《Dungeon of the ENDLESS™》創作團隊悉心打造。一手掌控文明大小事，同時奮力營救自己的家園Auriga。打造您的個人傳奇！

en.name: Red Dead Redemption
en.short_description: Experience the story of former outlaw John Marston as he tracks down the last remaining members of the notorious Van der Linde Gang in the PC debut of the critically acclaimed predecessor to Red Dead Redemption 2.

tc.name: Red Dead Redemption
tc.short_description: 這款廣受好評的 Red Dead Redemption 2 前作首度登陸 PC。親身體驗昔日亡命之徒約翰．瑪斯頓的故事，並隨著這個角色一起追殺惡名昭彰的范特林幫的殘存成員。

en.name: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon® Breakpoint
en.short_description: Become a Ghost, fighting against a rogue spec ops faction called the Wolves, in the latest Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon®!

tc.name: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon® Breakpoint
tc.short_description: 在最新的《火線獵殺》中成為魅影，與叛變的特種部隊陣營「影狼」決一死戰！

en.name: CarX Street
en.short_description: Conquer mountain roads, highways, and city streets. Build your dream car with detailed tuning that unleashes the potential of “CarX Technology”© physics. Take part in thrilling races, enjoying realistic gameplay and dynamic driving.

tc.name: CarX Street
tc.short_description: 在《CarX Street》中征服山坡、廣闊的高速公路和熙來攘往的城市街道。透過微調打造您夢想中的賽車，發揮 CarX Technology© 物理引擎的全部潛力。參加刺激的線下或線上比賽，享受逼真的遊戲體驗和動態的操控感。

en.name: Argo
en.short_description: Jump straight into combat in this official standalone FREE total conversion of Arma 3. Argo is a hardcore tactical first-person shooter, in which you fight across unrestricted terrain, and where a single bullet is all it takes. Master your craft to rank up and become (in)famous on the battlefield.

tc.name: Argo
tc.short_description: 在這款改編自 Arma 3 的官方免費獨立遊戲中您可以直接投入戰鬥。Argo 是一款專業的第一人稱戰術射擊遊戲，在遊戲中，您將在毫無限制的戰區作戰，而所要的僅僅是一發子彈。磨煉您的技能，不斷晉升，讓自己的英名（惡名）傳遍戰場。

en.name: Watch Dogs®: Legion
en.short_description: Build a resistance as you fight to take back a near-future London facing its downfall. Welcome to the Resistance.

tc.name: Watch Dogs®: Legion
tc.short_description: 在《看門狗：自由軍團》裡你能組成反抗勢力，共同拯救正一步步走向崩毀的近未來倫敦。

en.name: Minecraft Dungeons
en.short_description: Fight your way through an exciting action-adventure game, inspired by classic dungeon crawlers and set in the Minecraft universe!

tc.name: Minecraft Dungeons
tc.short_description: 在全新的動作冒險遊戲中全力奮戰，遊戲靈感來自經典的「深入地牢」，也是 Minecraft 宇宙中的新成員！

en.name: Half-Life 2: Lost Coast
en.short_description: Originally planned as a section of the Highway 17 chapter of Half-Life 2, Lost Coast is a playable technology showcase that introduces High Dynamic Range lighting to the Source engine.

tc.name: Half-Life 2: Lost Coast
tc.short_description: 《Lost Coast》原本企劃做為《戰慄時空 2》中「17 號高速公路」遊戲章節的一部分，現在則是導入 Source 引擎所加入的高動態範圍光源之技術展示遊戲。

en.name: Milk outside a bag of milk outside a bag of milk
en.short_description: A sequel to Milk inside a bag of milk inside a bag of milk. Dive into demented and bizarre world once again and help the girl become a little happier.

tc.name: Milk outside a bag of milk outside a bag of milk
tc.short_description: A sequel to Milk inside a bag of milk inside a bag of milk. Dive into demented and bizarre world once again and help the girl become a little happier.

en.name: Grimm's Hollow
en.short_description: A spooky, freeware RPG where you search the afterlife for your brother. Reap ghosts with your scythe, explore haunted caves, and eat ghostly treats on your journey through death.

tc.name: Grimm's Hollow
tc.short_description: A spooky, freeware RPG where you search the afterlife for your brother. Reap ghosts with your scythe, explore haunted caves, and eat ghostly treats on your journey through death.

en.name: shapez 2 - Factory
en.short_description: Dive into a factory-building game with the focus on just that – building huge space factories! Design sprawling multi-level factories and satisfying production lines without limits. Tackle progressively challenging automation goals at your own pace, without the threat of enemies.

tc.name: 異形工廠2
tc.short_description: 深入體驗字如其名的“超·大”工廠建造世界！建設規模龐大的多層工廠，用穩健高效的自動化產線盡情兌現您的規劃才智！各種升級自動化挑戰層出不窮，不過您大可以順著步子悠著來——反正沒有敵人出來搗亂。

en.name: Unheard - Voices of Crime
en.short_description: What if you could hear every word spoken at the scene of a crime? “Acoustic Detectives” wanted for testing our new device! Return aurally to crime scenes and use the voices you hear to identify potential suspects and solve the mysteries. What is it that’s connecting these seemingly unrelated cases?

tc.name: 疑案追聲
tc.short_description: 如果有一種技術，能夠收集來自案發現場的聲音，那就可以輕易找出幕後黑手，解開神秘懸案。但是，用聲音來推理，遠比想象中要困難。為此，我們在為系統尋找合適的使用者——“聲探”！請你回到案發現場，利用聲音跟蹤每個人的行動，告訴我們，在這些看似毫不相關的案件下，是否還隱藏著一個終極秘密。

en.name: Timberborn
en.short_description: Humans are long gone. In a world struck by droughts and toxic waste, will your lumberpunk beavers do any better? A sandbox city-building game featuring ingenious animals, vertical architecture, water physics, and terraforming. Contains high amounts of wood.

tc.name: 河狸浮生記 Timberborn
tc.short_description: 人類早已不復存在。在這個乾旱和有毒廢料肆虐的世界，你的木匠龐克河狸們的命運又會是如何？這款沙盒城市建造遊戲包含機智的動物、巧妙的垂直建築、多樣化的水物理運用與地形改造。當然還有絕對少不了的大量木材！

en.name: Alice: Madness Returns
en.short_description: Alice: Madness Returns is a third-person, single-player, action adventure platformer. Visit the grim reality of Victorian London and travel to the beautiful yet ghastly Wonderland to uncover the root of Alice's madness.

tc.name: Alice: Madness Returns
tc.short_description: Alice: Madness Returns is a third-person, single-player, action adventure platformer. Visit the grim reality of Victorian London and travel to the beautiful yet ghastly Wonderland to uncover the root of Alice's madness.

en.name: Stronghold Crusader 2
en.short_description: Stronghold Crusader 2 is the long awaited sequel to the original castle sim. After 12 years Stronghold returns to the desert with a new 3D engine and powerful Havok Physics. Crusader 2 recaptures the original game’s addictive, fast-paced gameplay and authentic castle simulation.

tc.name: Stronghold Crusader 2
tc.short_description: Stronghold Crusader 2 is the long awaited sequel to the original castle sim. After 12 years Stronghold returns to the desert with a new 3D engine and powerful Havok Physics. Crusader 2 recaptures the original game’s addictive, fast-paced gameplay and authentic castle simulation.

en.name: Farthest Frontier
en.short_description: Protect and guide your people as you forge a town from untamed wilderness at the edge of the known world. Harvest raw materials, hunt, fish and farm to survive. Produce crafted items to trade, consume, equip and fight with as you battle for your survival against the elements and outside threats.

tc.name: Farthest Frontier
tc.short_description: 保護並引導你的人民，在世界邊緣的荒野之中打造一座小鎮。採集原物料、狩獵、釣魚並耕田來生存。生產製造道具以供村民們交易、使用、裝備、戰鬥，並抵禦嚴酷的環境與外來的威脅。

en.name: Call of Duty®: Advanced Warfare - Gold Edition
en.short_description: Call of Duty®: Advanced Warfare envisions a powerful future, where both technology and tactics have evolved to usher in a new era of combat for the franchise.Power Changes Everything.

tc.name: Call of Duty®: Advanced Warfare - Gold Edition
tc.short_description: Call of Duty®: Advanced Warfare envisions a powerful future, where both technology and tactics have evolved to usher in a new era of combat for the franchise.Power Changes Everything.

en.name: RoboCop: Rogue City
en.short_description: Become the legendary part man, part machine, all cop hero and deliver justice in Old Detroit.

tc.name: 机械战警：暴戾都市
tc.short_description: 成為傳奇的半人、半機器完全警察英雄，並在舊底特律伸張正義。

en.name: Riders Republic
en.short_description: Jump into a massive multiplayer playground! Bike, ski, snowboard, or wingsuit across an open world sports paradise where the rules are yours to make or break.

tc.name: Riders Republic
tc.short_description: 躍入遼闊的多人遊樂場！用單車、雙板滑雪板、單板滑雪板或飛鼠裝來橫越開放世界的體育天堂，你可以自己制定或打破一切規則。

en.name: F.E.A.R. 3
en.short_description: F.E.A.R. 3 delivers all the hallmarks that define the F.E.A.R. brand: terrifying paranormal experience, frenetic combat and a dramatic storyline.

tc.name: F.E.A.R. 3
tc.short_description: 《F.E.A.R. 3》囊括所有《F.E.A.R.》系列的重點特色：駭人的異常體驗、瘋狂的戰鬥與高潮迭起的劇情。

en.name: Travellers Rest
en.short_description: Craft, farm, build and cook! In Travellers Rest you will have to use all the available tools to become the best tavern keeper in the realm. Create unique dishes and drinks to please your customers as you discover the world and its colorful characters.

tc.name: 旅者之憩 Travellers Rest
tc.short_description: 制作，种田，建造和烹饪！在《旅者之憩》中，你可以使用各种工具成为这个国度中最棒的酒馆老板。制作独特的菜肴和饮料服务顾客，探索世界，遇见特色鲜明的各个角色。

en.name: Quaver
en.short_description: Quaver is a community-driven and open-source competitive rhythm game with two game modes and online leaderboards. Create your own maps, or challenge the world in online multiplayer matches.

tc.name: Quaver
tc.short_description: Quaver is a community-driven and open-source competitive rhythm game with two game modes and online leaderboards. Create your own maps, or challenge the world in online multiplayer matches.

en.name: Project CARS
en.short_description: THE ULTIMATE DRIVER JOURNEY delivers the soul of motor racing in the world’s most beautiful, authentic, and technically-advanced racing game.

tc.name: Project CARS
tc.short_description: THE ULTIMATE DRIVER JOURNEY delivers the soul of motor racing in the world’s most beautiful, authentic, and technically-advanced racing game.

en.name: Streets of Rogue
en.short_description: Fight, sneak, and hack your way through randomly generated cities. It's like Nuclear Throne meets Deus Ex, mixed with the anarchy of GTA. Rogue-lite meets immersive sim, and goes completely insane.

tc.name: Streets of Rogue
tc.short_description: Fight, sneak, and hack your way through randomly generated cities. It's like Nuclear Throne meets Deus Ex, mixed with the anarchy of GTA. Rogue-lite meets immersive sim, and goes completely insane.

en.name: KinitoPET
en.short_description: KinitoPET is a psychological horror experience that takes place through Kinito, an early 2000s virtual assistant. Kinito is able to walk, talk, browse, adapt, and play games as Kinito is like no other with its adaptive technology!

tc.name: KinitoPET
tc.short_description: KinitoPET is a psychological horror experience that takes place through Kinito, an early 2000s virtual assistant. Kinito is able to walk, talk, browse, adapt, and play games as Kinito is like no other with its adaptive technology!

en.name: IXION
en.short_description: IXION is an unrelenting, city-building odyssey across the stars. As Administrator of the Tiqqun, DOLOS’ prototype space station, you are tasked with balancing preservation and exploration as you manage infrastructure, resources and crew. Can you keep the flame of humanity alight in the cold dark?

tc.name: IXION
tc.short_description: IXION is an unrelenting, city-building odyssey across the stars. As Administrator of the Tiqqun, DOLOS’ prototype space station, you are tasked with balancing preservation and exploration as you manage infrastructure, resources and crew. Can you keep the flame of humanity alight in the cold dark?

en.name: Crucible Beta
en.short_description: Crucible is a free-to-play team-based PvP action shooter. Pick an alien, human, or robot hunter to fight in 4v4 matches.

tc.name: Crucible Beta
tc.short_description: Crucible is a free-to-play team-based PvP action shooter. Pick an alien, human, or robot hunter to fight in 4v4 matches.

en.name: Hyper Light Drifter
en.short_description: Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies.

tc.name: Hyper Light Drifter
tc.short_description: Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies.

en.name: Temtem
en.short_description: Temtem is an online creature-collection adventure. Tame 165 unique creatures across 7 vibrant islands, battle other tamers, tackle mythical Lairs, chase Luma & Umbra variants, and breed your favorite Tems - with friends by your side! Dive into a colorful monster catching adventure, so Temtem up!

en.name: Kingdom Heroes 8
en.short_description: The " Kingdom Heroes" series is a classic horizontal battle single-player game developed by Userjoy, which has been released seven generations since 1998. The latest sequel, " Kingdom Heroes 8", will feature a new look and exciting battles, interpreting the magnificent era of the Three Kingdoms.

tc.name: 三國群英傳8
tc.short_description: 《三國群英傳》系列是宇峻奧汀開發的經典橫向戰鬥視角單機遊戲，由1998年至今，已推出七部單機作品。 2007年推出《三國群英傳VII》後一直沒有單機續作問世，最新續作《三國群英傳 8》將以全新面貌，激昂的戰鬥，詮釋恢弘的三國群英爭霸時代。

en.name: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight - Jedi Academy™
en.short_description: Forge your weapon and follow the path of the Jedi Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy is the latest installment of the highly acclaimed Jedi Knight series. Take on the role of a new student eager to learn the ways of the Force from Jedi Master Luke Skywalker.

tc.name: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight - Jedi Academy™

tc.name: The Plan

en.name: Mini Metro
en.short_description: Mini Metro is a strategy simulation game about designing a subway map for a growing city. Draw lines between stations and start your trains running. As new stations open, redraw your lines to keep them efficient. Decide where to use your limited resources. How long can you keep the city moving?

tc.name: Mini Metro
tc.short_description: Mini Metro 是關於在城市規劃中設計地鐵線路的策略模擬遊戲。通過在地鐵站之間連線讓列車通過，還要隨著新地鐵站的建設和開放，不斷調整線路。你需要利用有限的資源做出最好的設計。你的城市地鐵能運營多長時間？

en.name: Sonic Generations Collection

en.name: Game Dev Tycoon
en.short_description: In Game Dev Tycoon you replay the history of the gaming industry by starting your own video game development company in the 80s. Create best selling games. Research new technologies and invent new game types. Become the leader of the market and gain worldwide fans.

en.name: Homeworld Remastered Collection
en.short_description: Experience the epic space strategy games that redefined the RTS genre. Control your fleet and build an armada across more than 30 single-player missions. Choose unit types, fleet formations and flight tactics for each strategic situation.

tc.name: Homeworld Remastered Collection

en.short_description: BPM is a rhythm-action FPS rogue-like where you must shoot, jump and dodge to the beat of an epic rock soundtrack. Delve into a randomly generated dungeon where one missed note can lead to your death. Gain game-changing abilities and loot powerful weaponry to defeat your ancient enemy: Nidhogg.

en.name: Train Simulator Classic
en.short_description: The ultimate railway hobby for more than 15 years! From historic steam locomotives to modern high-speed and heavy freight trains, and routes around the world, Train Simulator Classic is the simulation made by railfans for railfans.

en.short_description: Fear Surrounds is a horror-tinged take on the werewolf-style social subterfuge genre, where two evil spirits hide within a group of players and attempt to sabotage and murder them.

tc.short_description: Fear Surrounds is a horror-tinged take on the werewolf-style social subterfuge genre, where two evil spirits hide within a group of players and attempt to sabotage and murder them.

en.short_description: EMBARK ON A JOURNEY TO OWN IT ALL! Build your empire on a colorful and 3D lively city animated by funny sidekicks! MONOPOLY® PLUS brings the classic franchise to a new level on PC with amazing animations, customizable house rules!

tc.name: MONOPOLY® PLUS
tc.short_description: 展開縱橫天下之旅！ 與親朋好友在生動豐富的 3D 城市中建立自己的帝國。MONOPOLY® PLUS 擁有精細的動畫與可自訂的建築系統，將經典桌上遊戲在 PC 平台提升至全新的境界。

en.name: Notes of Soul
en.short_description: The gleaning club is an immersive game experience hall, where you can participate in the script arranged according to the story by role playing. Or learn folk knowledge and taste strange culture, or realize the sad but warm past of the protagonist of the story.

tc.name: 探灵笔記/拾遗记
tc.short_description: 拾遺社是一家沉浸式遊戲體驗館，在這裡你可以通過角色扮演的方式，親身參與依照故事編排好的劇本當中。 或是學習民俗知識品味志怪文化，或是體悟故事主角悲情卻不失溫暖的過往。 在感受中國沉積千年傳統文化魅力的同時，感悟現實生活的不易！

en.name: Far Cry® 2
en.short_description: You are a gun for hire, trapped in a war-torn African state, stricken with malaria and forced to make deals with corrupt warlords on both sides of the conflict in order to make this country your home. You must identify and exploit your enemies' weaknesses, neutralizing their superior numbers and firepower with surprise, subversion,...

en.name: Quantum Break
en.short_description: From Remedy Entertainment, the masters of cinematic action games, comes Quantum Break, a time-amplified suspenseful blockbuster. The Quantum Break experience is part game, part live action show—where decisions in one dramatically affect the other.

tc.name: Quantum Break
tc.short_description: 繼電影般的動作遊戲之後，Remedy Entertainment推出全新力作「Quantum Break」。這款精彩的遊戲大作，透過融合電玩與真人影集，讓操弄時間的動作場面和懸疑的故事劇情在玩家眼前上演。

en.name: Tick Tock: A Tale for Two
en.short_description: You and your friend are trapped in a mystical world. As time ebbs away you must solve increasingly complex puzzles to escape. Cooperation is key as neither of you have the full picture! Play on two devices, local or remotely, all you need is a voice connection.

tc.name: Tick Tock: A Tale for Two
tc.short_description: 你和你的朋友被困在一個神秘世界之中。隨著時間的推移，你們必須解決越來越複雜的謎題才能逃脫。獨自一個人是無法得到完整信息的，唯有合作才是出路！可在兩台本地或遠程設備上遊玩，你們需要的只是語言交流。

en.name: Dinkum
en.short_description: Dinkum is a survival life simulation game set on an island inspired by the rugged Australian outback. Farm, hunt, mine, fish, and forage to gather resources, expand your town, and discover what makes Dinkum so special—either solo or with friends.

tc.name: Dinkum(金墾小鎮)
tc.short_description: Dinkum 以原始的澳洲內陸為靈感，是一款島嶼生活與生存的模擬遊戲。 玩家需透過務農、狩獵、採礦、捕魚和囤糧以收集資源、擴大城鎮，並發現 Dinkum 如此特別的原因——可與朋友一起，或獨自進行。

en.name: The Day Before
en.short_description: The Day Before offers players a uniquely reimagined journey into post-apocalyptic open-world MMO survival set in the present day on the US East Coast following a deadly pandemic.

tc.name: The Day Before
tc.short_description: 《The Day Before》為玩家提供了一個經過重新構想的獨特末世後開放世界 MMO 遊戲生存之旅，背景設定為一場致命疫情後的美國東海岸。

en.name: GROUND BRANCH
en.short_description: From one of the developers behind the original Rainbow Six® and Ghost Recon® games, comes a thinking-man's first-person shooter featuring in-depth character and weapon customization. Take your time. Think ahead. Get the job done.

tc.short_description: From one of the developers behind the original Rainbow Six® and Ghost Recon® games, comes a thinking-man's first-person shooter featuring in-depth character and weapon customization. Take your time. Think ahead. Get the job done.

en.short_description: Blast your way through an interdimensional adventure with Ratchet and Clank – now on PC! Help them take on an evil emperor from another reality as you jump between action-packed worlds and beyond at hyper-speed!

tc.short_description: 與拉捷特和克拉克一起踏上跨次元冒險，闖出自己的路，本作現已登陸PC！幫助他們對抗來自另一個世界的邪惡暴君，在充滿刺激戰鬥的世界間迅疾穿梭！

en.short_description: Aurora, a young girl from 1895 Austria, awakens on the lost fairytale continent of Lemuria. To return home she must fight against the dark creatures of the Queen of the Night, who have stolen the sun, the moon and the stars. At stake is not only Lemuria, but Aurora’s true destiny.

en.short_description: A new adventure awaits you in this second installment of the turn-based RPG series set in the world of Monster Hunter! Become a Rider and form bonds with friendly monsters known as Monsties to fight alongside them as you take part in an epic story.

tc.name: Monster Hunter Stories 2: 破滅之翼
tc.short_description: 《MONSTER HUNTER STORIES》是一款RPG遊戲，玩家將會成為與魔物建立羈絆、加以培育並與之共存的「騎士」，在「Monster Hunter」的世界中冒險。本作為系列第二彈，有關羈絆的全新故事將會揭開帷幕。

en.short_description: Load up your Boltgun and unleash the awesome Space Marine arsenal to blast your way through an explosion of sprites, pixels and blood in a perfect blend of Warhammer 40,000, frenetic gameplay and the stylish visuals of 90’s retro shooters.

tc.name: Warhammer 40,000: Boltgun
tc.short_description: 裝填你的爆彈槍，釋出星際戰士超強的武力，穿梭在爆量的精靈圖、點陣圖和血跡之間，體驗Warhammer 40,000的狂亂遊戲玩法與90年代懷舊射擊遊戲特有視覺風格的完美融合。

en.name: Destroy All Humans!
en.short_description: The cult-classic returns! Terrorize the people of 1950's Earth in the role of the evil alien Crypto-137. Harvest their DNA and bring down the US government in the faithful remake of the legendary alien invasion action adventure. Annihilate puny humans using an assortment of alien weaponry and psychic abilities.

en.name: The Talos Principle 2
en.short_description: The Talos Principle 2 is a thought-provoking first-person puzzle experience that greatly expands on the first game's philosophical themes and stunning environments with increasingly mind-bending challenges.

tc.name: 塔羅斯的法則2
tc.short_description: 《塔羅斯的法則2》是激發思考的第一人稱解謎遊戲，大幅拓展了第一代遊戲的哲學主題及令人嘆為觀止的環境，加入解謎難度越來越高的挑戰。

en.name: FINAL FANTASY IX
en.short_description: Selling over five million copies since its release in 2000, FINAL FANTASY IX proudly returns on Steam! Now you can relive the adventures of Zidane and his crew on PC !

tc.name: FINAL FANTASY IX
tc.short_description: Selling over five million copies since its release in 2000, FINAL FANTASY IX proudly returns on Steam! Now you can relive the adventures of Zidane and his crew on PC !

en.name: The Forgotten City
en.short_description: The Forgotten City is a narrative-driven time loop adventure in ancient Rome. Discover the ruins of an ancient underground city, travel 2000 years into the past, and unravel the mystery of who destroyed it by cleverly exploiting the power to wind back time. The fate of the city is in your hands.

tc.name: The Forgotten City
tc.short_description: 穿越到 2,000 年前，重溫受詛咒的羅馬城最後的歲月，在這裡只要有一人犯罪，所有人都得陪葬。玩家必須利用致命的時間輪迴、向當地人詢問情報、探索並解開謎題，揭開這座城市核心的謎團。羅馬城的命運就掌握在您手中。

en.name: One Piece Pirate Warriors 3
en.short_description: Enjoy the original story of ONE PIECE from Fuschia Village to the mysterious kingdom of Dressrosa. Will your resolution be strong enough to defeat the most dangerous pirates, including Doflamingo and many more?

tc.name: One Piece Pirate Warriors 3
tc.short_description: 從佛夏村到神秘的德雷斯羅薩，如實呈現《航海王》的原版劇情。你有堅定的決心，可以打敗多佛朗明哥和其他史上最危險的海賊嗎？

en.name: Senren＊Banka
en.short_description: Senren＊Banka is a Japanese-style visual novel produced by Yuzusoft, a Japanese developer of romance VNs. This game commemorated Yuzusoft's 10th anniversary. It won numerous awards on the year of its release in Japan for its art, music, and characters.

tc.name: 千戀＊萬花
tc.short_description: 《千戀＊萬花》是日本美少女遊戲品牌Yuzusoft（柚子社）2016年製作的一款和風戀愛題材作品。本作發售後展現出了勢如破竹的高人氣，並獲得萌系遊戲大賞的年度准大獎以及Getchu美少女遊戲大賞中獲得綜合類排名第一的殊榮，在劇本、系統、圖像、音樂、影片、角色等多個獎項中也均有斬獲。

en.name: Duck Game
en.short_description: Enter the futuristic year of 1984, an age where ducks run wild in a frantic battle for glory. Blast your friends with Shotguns, Net Guns, Mind Control Rays, Saxophones, Magnet Guns, and much, much more. This is DUCK GAME. Don't blink.

tc.name: Duck Game
tc.short_description: Enter the futuristic year of 1984, an age where ducks run wild in a frantic battle for glory. Blast your friends with Shotguns, Net Guns, Mind Control Rays, Saxophones, Magnet Guns, and much, much more. This is DUCK GAME. Don't blink.

en.name: Vampyr
en.short_description: London, 1918. You are newly-turned Vampyr Dr. Jonathan Reid. As a doctor, you must find a cure to save the city’s flu-ravaged citizens. As a Vampyr, you are cursed to feed on those you vowed to heal.

tc.name: Vampyr
tc.short_description: 倫敦，1918年——你是剛成為霧都吸血鬼的喬納森．里德醫生。身為醫生，你必須找到方法，拯救在這個城市中被流感肆虐的市民；你卻同時受到吸血鬼身份的詛咒，面對發誓要治癒的人，你卻需要以他們為餌食……

en.name: Homefront
en.short_description: The Rock Map Pack is Now Available! Join the Resistance, stand united and fight for freedom against an overwhelming military force.

tc.name: Homefront

en.name: Wargame: Red Dragon
en.short_description: The new reference in RTS at its best! The Wargame series returns to duty, larger, richer and more spectacular than ever before. In Wargame Red Dragon, you are engaged in a large-scale conflict where Western forces clash against the Communist bloc.

tc.short_description: The new reference in RTS at its best! The Wargame series returns to duty, larger, richer and more spectacular than ever before. In Wargame Red Dragon, you are engaged in a large-scale conflict where Western forces clash against the Communist bloc.

An incredibly diverse collection of cars and tracks cohesively simulated, featuring incredible graphics and audio quality, dynamic weather and track conditions and the best VR support for a racing experience like no other.

en.short_description: Tokyo's population has vanished, and deadly supernatural forces prowl the streets. Use an arsenal of elemental abilities to unravel the truth behind the disappearance and save Tokyo.

tc.name: Ghostwire: Tokyo
tc.short_description: 東京的人口早已徹底消失，致命的超自然力量在大街小巷裡徘徊。運用各種元素能力揭開失蹤背後的真相，拯救東京。

en.name: Project Wingman
en.short_description: Project Wingman is a flight action game that lets you take the seat of advanced fighter jets and become a true ace. Fight in various missions and gamemodes ranging from intense aerial dogfights to large scale ground assault in an alternate scorched earth setting.

tc.short_description: 在《Enlisted》，你的部下不是只有一名士兵，而是要指揮整支小隊！這款小隊制大型多人線上射擊遊戲將 20 世紀最血腥戰爭的關鍵戰役重現眼前，每場戰鬥都有數百名士兵、坦克與戰機參與。

en.name: Escape Simulator
en.short_description: First-person puzzler you can play solo or in an online co-op. Explore a set of highly interactive escape rooms. Move furniture, pick up and examine everything, smash pots and break locks! Play thousands of community-made rooms through the level editor.

tc.name: 密室逃脫模擬器
tc.short_description: 密室逃脫模擬器是一款第一人稱解謎遊戲。你可以單人遊玩，或是線上多人合作（最好是2～3人，但是多一些人也無妨）。探索一個接著一個的互動式密室。你可以移動家具、打碎各種瓶子、解開各種鎖、把你所能看到的東西全部撿起來仔細查看！也支援社區利用關卡編輯器製作的各種密室。

en.name: Yet Another Zombie Survivors
en.short_description: The Horde is coming but you're ready to fight it! Assemble your team and decide upon their enhancements to find the most efficient synergies against thousands of the undead. Survive. Then evolve. Then break all the limits in this deceivingly simple but addictive bullet heaven game.

tc.name: Yet Another Zombie Survivors
tc.short_description: 大群敌人即将到来，但你已经做好了战斗准备！召集你的队伍并决定他们的各种增强，以找到对付成千上万不死生物最有效的组合。努力生存，然后进化。然后在这个看似简单但令人上瘾的反转弹雨游戏中打破所有限制。

en.name: Hitman: Blood Money
en.short_description: Money Talks. Silence Pays. Prepare to Make a Killing. When assassins from Agent 47's contract agency, The ICA, are eliminated in a series of hits, it seems a larger, more powerful agency has entered the fray. Sensing he may be a target, 47 travels to America, and prepares to make a killing.

tc.name: Hitman: Blood Money
tc.short_description: Money Talks. Silence Pays. Prepare to Make a Killing. When assassins from Agent 47's contract agency, The ICA, are eliminated in a series of hits, it seems a larger, more powerful agency has entered the fray. Sensing he may be a target, 47 travels to America, and prepares to make a killing.

en.name: Guild Wars 2®
en.short_description: Guild Wars 2 is an award-winning online roleplaying game with fast-paced action combat, deep character customization, and no subscription fee required. Choose from an arsenal of professions and weapons, explore a vast open world, compete in PVP modes and more. Join over 16 million players now!

tc.name: Guild Wars 2®
tc.short_description: Guild Wars 2 is an award-winning online roleplaying game with fast-paced action combat, deep character customization, and no subscription fee required. Choose from an arsenal of professions and weapons, explore a vast open world, compete in PVP modes and more. Join over 16 million players now!

en.name: DiRT Rally 2.0
en.short_description: DiRT Rally 2.0 dares you to carve your way through a selection of iconic rally locations from across the globe, in the most powerful off-road vehicles ever made, knowing that the smallest mistake could end your stage.

tc.name: DiRT Rally 2.0
tc.short_description: 《DiRT Rally 2.0》讓你能夠挑戰駕駛史上最強大的越野車，在世界各地的一系列經典拉力賽地點中闖出自己的一片天，而稍有不慎就會在這舞台謝幕退場。

en.name: Creativerse
en.short_description: A sandbox adventure game as big as your imagination.

tc.name: Creativerse
tc.short_description: 與你的想像力同樣宏大的冒險旅程。

en.name: Wolfenstein: The Old Blood
en.short_description: Wolfenstein®: The Old Blood™ is a standalone prequel to the critically acclaimed first-person action-adventure shooter, Wolfenstein®: The New Order. This adventure spans eight chapters and features the hallmarks of MachineGames – thrilling action, immersive story, and intense FPS combat.

tc.name: Wolfenstein: The Old Blood
tc.short_description: Wolfenstein®: The Old Blood™ is a standalone prequel to the critically acclaimed first-person action-adventure shooter, Wolfenstein®: The New Order. This adventure spans eight chapters and features the hallmarks of MachineGames – thrilling action, immersive story, and intense FPS combat.

en.name: The Surge
en.short_description: Welcome to CREO, the megacorporation saving the world! A catastrophic event has knocked you out during the first day on the job… you wake up equipped with a heavy-grade exoskeleton, in a destroyed section of the complex.

tc.name: The Surge
tc.short_description: Welcome to CREO, the megacorporation saving the world! A catastrophic event has knocked you out during the first day on the job… you wake up equipped with a heavy-grade exoskeleton, in a destroyed section of the complex.

en.name: Tails of Iron
en.short_description: Tails of Iron is an epic RPG Adventure with punishingly brutal combat. As Redgi, heir to the throne, you must embark on a perilous quest to reclaim your Kingdom. Explore a deceivingly charming world. Assemble a band of brave companions. Banish the merciless Frog clan!

tc.name: 鐵尾傳奇
tc.short_description: 《鐵尾傳奇》是款史詩級 RPG 冒險遊戲，有著殘酷的格鬥元素。身為瑞基，鼠王國的繼位者，你必須踏上危險的旅途重新收復你的王國。在蠱惑迷人的世界中探險，集結願意冒險犯難的勇士，將殘酷無情的蛙族永久驅逐！

en.name: Dead Island Definitive Edition
en.short_description: Welcome to the zombie apocalypse experience of a lifetime – and now more beautiful than ever. Caught in the midst of an epic zombie outbreak on the tropical island of Banoi, your only thought is: Survive!

tc.name: Dead Island Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: Welcome to the zombie apocalypse experience of a lifetime – and now more beautiful than ever. Caught in the midst of an epic zombie outbreak on the tropical island of Banoi, your only thought is: Survive!

en.name: XCOM®: Chimera Squad
en.short_description: XCOM: Chimera Squad delivers an all-new story and turn-based tactical combat experience in the XCOM universe.

tc.name: XCOM®: Chimera Squad
tc.short_description: XCOM: Chimera Squad delivers an all-new story and turn-based tactical combat experience in the XCOM universe.

en.name: Wayfinder
en.short_description: Become a Wayfinder, and unlock their powers as you choose your path and playstyle while pushing back a hostile force that has overtaken your world. A Co-Op ARPG where you directly shape and customize the endless adventures you go on with friends, because Wayfinders are stronger together.

tc.name: Wayfinder
tc.short_description: 快成為尋路者，選擇專屬的遊戲之道與玩法，解鎖各個角色的能力，並抵抗佔據世界的敵對勢力。這是一款合作模式的 ARPG 遊戲，你可以直接打造與好友一同展開的無盡冒險，畢竟團結的尋路者比單打獨鬥更強大。

en.name: BONELAB
en.short_description: BONELAB is an experimental physics action game. Explore a mysterious lab filled with weapons, enemies, challenges and secrets. Escape your reality, or wreak havoc. No wrong answers.

tc.name: BONELAB
tc.short_description: BONELAB is an experimental physics action game. Explore a mysterious lab filled with weapons, enemies, challenges and secrets. Escape your reality, or wreak havoc. No wrong answers.

en.name: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War - Anniversary Edition (Classic)
en.short_description: All of Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War in one glorious package. Play the genre-defining classic real time strategy game in all its blood-soaked glory, including four complete campaigns and nine full-fledged factions.

tc.name: 《Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War》週年紀念版
tc.short_description: 《Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II》所有內容集結成一套輝煌的組合包。遊玩這款經典即時戰略遊戲龍頭浴血華麗的完整形態，包含四場完整戰役和九個充分發展的陣營。

en.name: Bus Simulator 18
en.short_description: Experience the job of a bus driver in a vast and freely drivable urban area. Drive original licensed city buses from the great brands: Mercedes-Benz, Setra, MAN, and IVECO BUS. Transport your passengers safely and punctually, either solo in single player mode, or in multiplayer mode.

tc.name: Bus Simulator 18
tc.short_description: Experience the job of a bus driver in a vast and freely drivable urban area. Drive original licensed city buses from the great brands: Mercedes-Benz, Setra, MAN, and IVECO BUS. Transport your passengers safely and punctually, either solo in single player mode, or in multiplayer mode.

en.name: Infestation: The New Z
en.short_description: The New Z is a FREE TO PLAY multi-game mode experience. SURVIVE with friends and gather loot, stash and trade. Go into wars against other groups in a massive OPEN WORLD or face them 5 v 5 in COMPETITIVE.

tc.name: Infestation: The New Z
tc.short_description: The New Z是一個免費體驗多種遊戲模式的經驗。與朋友一起生存，收集戰利品，存儲和交易。在一個大開放的世界與其他團體進行戰爭。三種不同的獨立遊戲模式全在一個遊戲裡。

en.name: Assetto Corsa EVO
en.short_description: Assetto Corsa EVO redefines the realism and features of one of the most popular multiplatform driving simulations ever developed. Featuring cars and tracks from different classes spanning across years of motoring history.

tc.name: 《神力科莎出賽準備：進化》Assetto Corsa EVO
tc.short_description: 《神力科莎出賽準備：進化》重新定義了這款業界高人氣多平台駕駛模擬遊戲的真實性和特色。本作擁有跨越多年汽車歷史的不同級別名車和賽道。

en.name: The Messenger
en.short_description: As a demon army besieges his village, a young ninja ventures through a cursed world, to deliver a scroll paramount to his clan’s survival. What begins as a classic action platformer soon unravels into an expansive time-traveling adventure full of thrills, surprises, and humor.

tc.name: The Messenger
tc.short_description: 惡魔大軍圍攻村落，一位年輕的忍者挺身而出，橫越整片被詛咒的大陸，為了部族的生死存亡而傳遞一個卷軸。"打过了三个大关酣畅淋漓之际，我毅然放下手柄开始码字。我会给他满分，因为我真的很喜欢。" - 魏赖皮@奶牛关游戏社区

en.name: Hyperdimension Neptunia Re;Birth1
en.short_description: Packed with fast-paced, turn-based RPG action, fourth-wall-breaking, trope-demolishing dialogue, and more item, weapon, and costume customization than you can shake a Lvl. 1 Stick at, Gamindustri is a world set on turning the concept of the JRPG on its head!

tc.name: 超次次元遊戲戰機少女重生1
tc.short_description: 關於「戰機少女」系列—— 模擬現實中「遊戲業界」的「游汐葉界」，以女主角「妮普禔努」為代表，『架空』的遊戲主機均以美少女的形態登場，以「擬人化×萌元素×變身」為主題的ＲＰＧ遊戲。 『超次次元遊戲 戰機少女 重生1』是將此系列的第一部作品進行人性化調整之後而完成的重製版作品。

en.name: GWENT: The Witcher Card Game
en.short_description: Command mighty Witcher-world heroes in epic online PvP card battles!

tc.name: GWENT: The Witcher Card Game
tc.short_description: 号令《巫师》世界的英雄儿女，征战史诗级 PVP 卡牌战役！

en.name: Turmoil
en.short_description: Drill for oil like it's 1899! Turmoil offers players a visually charming, tongue-in-cheek take on the simulation genre inspired by the 19th century oil rush in North America.

tc.name: Turmoil
tc.short_description: Drill for oil like it's 1899! Turmoil offers players a visually charming, tongue-in-cheek take on the simulation genre inspired by the 19th century oil rush in North America.

en.name: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons
en.short_description: Guide two brothers on an epic fairy tale journey from visionary Swedish film director, Josef Fares and top-tier developer Starbreeze Studios. Control both brothers at once as you experience co-op play in single player mode, like never before.

tc.name: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons
tc.short_description: Guide two brothers on an epic fairy tale journey from visionary Swedish film director, Josef Fares and top-tier developer Starbreeze Studios. Control both brothers at once as you experience co-op play in single player mode, like never before.

en.name: Just Shapes & Beats
en.short_description: "Just Shapes & Beats" is a chaotic co-op musical bullet-hell based on three simple things: avoid Shapes, move to the kick-ass Beats, and die, repeatedly.

tc.name: Just Shapes & Beats
tc.short_description: Just Shapes & Beats 是一款亂中有序的多人音樂闖關遊戲。遊戲只有三個重點：避開幾何圖形、隨著最屌的樂曲移動然後不斷的死亡重生。

en.name: Sprocket
en.short_description: Carefully balance mobility, firepower and armour in a dedicated tank designer. Then uncarefully put them to the test in a series of combat scenarios progressing through the ages of the tank. Here, your limit is what you can fit inside your hull and turret while still being able to move forwards.

tc.name: Sprocket
tc.short_description: Carefully balance mobility, firepower and armour in a dedicated tank designer. Then uncarefully put them to the test in a series of combat scenarios progressing through the ages of the tank. Here, your limit is what you can fit inside your hull and turret while still being able to move forwards.

en.name: The Riftbreaker
en.short_description: The Riftbreaker is a solo or Co-op base-building, survival game with Action-RPG elements for up to 4 players. Hack & slash countless hordes of enemies. Build up your base, craft powerful weapons and research new inventions to survive.

tc.name: The Riftbreaker
tc.short_description: 《銀河破裂者》是一款支持最多4人合作的基地建造生存遊戲，融合刺激的動作RPG元素。並肩作戰，揮砍劈殺無盡的敵潮，建立固若金湯的基地，鍛造強力武器，研究尖端科技，只為在這片危機四伏的異星上求得生機與勝利。

en.name: Door Kickers: Action Squad
en.short_description: Rescue hostages, disarm bombs and save the day in this old school, side-scroller action game with retro graphics and retro sensibilities. Online and Couch Coop Included.

tc.name: Door Kickers: Action Squad
tc.short_description: 拯救人质、解除炸弹，并拯救这所旧学校。这是一款有着复古的画面和感觉的横版卷轴动作游戏。包含在线游戏和本地合作模式。

en.name: Spelunky
en.short_description: Spelunky is a unique platformer with randomized levels that offer a challenging new experience each time you play. Journey deep underground and explore fantastic places filled with all manner of monsters, traps, and treasure.

tc.name: Spelunky
tc.short_description: Spelunky is a unique platformer with randomized levels that offer a challenging new experience each time you play. Journey deep underground and explore fantastic places filled with all manner of monsters, traps, and treasure.

en.name: Rivals of Aether
en.short_description: RIVALS OF AETHER is an indie fighting game where warring civilizations summon the power of Fire, Water, Air, and Earth. Play with up to four players either locally or online.

tc.name: Rivals of Aether
tc.short_description: RIVALS OF AETHER is an indie fighting game where warring civilizations summon the power of Fire, Water, Air, and Earth. Play with up to four players either locally or online.

en.name: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2
en.short_description: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2 is the new real-time strategy game adapted from Games Workshop’s famous tabletop game that portrays the epic space battles of the Warhammer 40,000 universe.

tc.name: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2
tc.short_description: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2 is the new real-time strategy game adapted from Games Workshop’s famous tabletop game that portrays the epic space battles of the Warhammer 40,000 universe.

en.name: RAGE
en.short_description: Powered by id’s revolutionary id Tech® 5 technology, RAGE is an intense first-person shooter with breakneck vehicle combat, an expansive world to explore, and jaw-dropping graphics!

tc.name: RAGE
tc.short_description: Powered by id’s revolutionary id Tech® 5 technology, RAGE is an intense first-person shooter with breakneck vehicle combat, an expansive world to explore, and jaw-dropping graphics!

en.name: Rocksmith® 2014 Edition REMASTERED LEARN & PLAY
en.short_description: Play guitar or bass and start your musical journey with Rocksmith 2014 Remastered Learn & Play! Perfect for beginners and pros, learn at your own rythmm with 60 tracks and customizable tools. Get ready to rock!

tc.name: Rocksmith® 2014 Edition REMASTERED LEARN & PLAY
tc.short_description: 彈奏吉他或低音吉他，並開始你的音樂之旅，使用 Rocksmith 2014 Remastered Learn & Play！適合初學者和專業人士，使用 60 首歌曲和可自訂工具，按自己的節奏學習。準備好搖滾吧！

en.name: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE
en.short_description: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE revisits famous battles from the series through your custom Avatar and other classic characters. New features include the mysterious Toki Toki City, new gameplay mechanics, new animations and many other amazing features!

tc.name: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE
tc.short_description: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE revisits famous battles from the series through your custom Avatar and other classic characters. New features include the mysterious Toki Toki City, new gameplay mechanics, new animations and many other amazing features!

en.name: POSTAL 4: No Regerts
en.short_description: POSTAL 4: No Regerts is a satirical and outrageous comedic open world first person shooter and the long-awaited true sequel to what’s been fondly dubbed as "The Worst Game Ever™", POSTAL 2!

tc.name: POSTAL 4: No Regerts
tc.short_description: POSTAL 4: No Regerts is a satirical and outrageous comedic open world first person shooter and the long-awaited true sequel to what’s been fondly dubbed as "The Worst Game Ever™", POSTAL 2!

en.name: Starship Troopers: Extermination
en.short_description: Starship Troopers: Extermination is a 16-player co-op FPS that puts you on the far-off frontlines of an all-out battle against the Bugs! Squad up, grab your rifle, and do your part as an elite Deep Space Vanguard Trooper to take back planets from the Arachnid threat!

tc.name: Starship Troopers: Extermination
tc.short_description: 《星河艦隊：滅絕》是一款16人合作的第一人稱射擊遊戲，在與蟲子全面作戰的遙遠前線上，集合，拿起你的步槍，盡你的一份力量！ 加入精英彙集的深空探索部隊，準備奪回被阿拉奇蟲族威脅的行星！

en.name: Yog-Sothoth’s Yard
en.short_description: Manage a hotel and hire employees including Death, a dragon, a Spirit Hunter, and a bioroid maid. Build your wealth through various means and refine your strategies based on the predictions of Oracles. All employees can be romanced depending on your choices.

tc.name: 猶格索托斯的庭院
tc.short_description: 在這款模擬經營+AVG遊戲中，你繼承一座荒廢已久的別墅並欠下黑暗債務。你將招募死神、龍族、斬靈師、人造人等員工開展旅社經營。奇怪的客人將帶著神秘事件到訪。你會通過挖礦，冒險，煉金，經營餐廳等不同策略積攢資產，不斷調整策略，帶領旅社走向不同結局，另，員工可攻略。

en.name: PlateUp!
en.short_description: Cook and serve your dishes, design and decorate your restaurants, and expand your culinary kingdom with new unlocks, abilities and dishes in procedurally-generated locations. Classic cooking action with permanent roguelite progression. Hire your friends - or do it all yourself!

tc.name: 速速上菜！
tc.short_description: 精心規劃你的餐廳，你將一手包辦上菜、設計和裝潢，並隨著遊戲進度逐漸解鎖新的技能和菜色，一步步擴大你的廚藝王國！這是一款融合rougelite元素的經典餐廳模擬遊戲。你可以選擇雇用朋友一同經營——又或者「是自己的餐廳自己來」！

en.name: Age of History II
en.short_description: Age of History II is a grand strategy wargame that is simple to learn yet hard to master.Your objective is to use military tactics and cunning diplomacy to either unify the world, or conquer it.Will the world bleed out or bow before you? The choice is yours..

tc.name: Age of History II
tc.short_description: Age of History 是一款容易上手卻難以精通的宏偉戰略遊戲。 你的目標是藉助軍事策略與狡猾的外交手段以聯合或征服全世界。世界會因你而生靈塗炭，或是因你而得以聯合？一切都取決於你...

en.name: A Total War Saga: THRONES OF BRITANNIA
en.short_description: From the multi-award-winning strategy series, A Total War Saga: Thrones of Britannia combines huge real-time battles with engrossing turn-based campaign, set at a critical flashpoint in history. Anglo-Saxons, Gaelic clans and Viking settlers clash for control. What Kingdom will you build?

tc.name: 全軍破敵傳奇：不列顛王座
tc.short_description: 榮獲多項大獎的戰略遊戲系列《Total War》推出全新作品《A Total War Saga: Thrones of Britannia》結合規模浩大的即時戰鬥與引人入勝的回合制戰役，並以歷史上一大關鍵緊張時刻為背景。盎格魯薩克遜人、蓋爾氏族與維京開拓者互不相讓，角逐統治地位。您會打造出什麼樣的王國呢？

en.name: Kena: Bridge of Spirits
en.short_description: A story-driven, action adventure combining exploration with fast-paced combat. Untangle the past as Kena, a young Spirit Guide in search of the sacred Mountain Shrine. Help free the spirits trapped in a forgotten village with the help of the Rot, her adorable (yet powerful) spirit companions.

tc.name: Kena: Bridge of Spirits
tc.short_description: 是一款故事導向的動作冒險遊戲，結合探險元素與節奏明快的戰鬥過程。玩家扮演年輕的靈魂嚮導凱那，尋找神聖的山神社，並解開她過去的糾葛。凱那身邊有可愛又強大的靈魂同伴「腐靈」，她在「腐靈」的幫助下，解救被困在失落村莊的遊魂。

en.name: Risk of Rain (2013)
en.short_description: Risk of Rain is an action platformer with roguelike elements. With permanent death as a primary feature, players will have to play their best to get as far as possible. Fight on a mysterious planet with randomly spawning enemies and bosses, either alone or with 3 friends in online co-op.

tc.name: Risk of Rain (2013)
tc.short_description: Risk of Rain is an action platformer with roguelike elements. With permanent death as a primary feature, players will have to play their best to get as far as possible. Fight on a mysterious planet with randomly spawning enemies and bosses, either alone or with 3 friends in online co-op.

en.name: Retrowave
en.short_description: Neon lights, palm trees, synthwave, '80s supercars speeding down an endless highway... Welcome to the world of Retrowave!

tc.name: Retrowave
tc.short_description: 霓虹燈，棕櫚樹，合成波，80年代的超級跑車在漫長的高速公路上行駛……歡迎來到Retrowave的世界！

en.name: Clustertruck
en.short_description: Clustertruck is a chaotic physics based truckformer. Jump your way through insane levels in a game of "the floor is lava" on top of speeding trucks driven by terrible drivers.

tc.name: Clustertruck
tc.short_description: Clustertruck is a chaotic physics based truckformer. Jump your way through insane levels in a game of "the floor is lava" on top of speeding trucks driven by terrible drivers.

en.name: Phantasy Star Online 2 New Genesis
en.short_description: Phantasy Star Online 2 New Genesis is a free-to-play action MMO. Join players around the world to explore the planet Halpha and fight in epic battles as ARKS Defenders! Unleash your imagination with our ultimate character creation experience and creative spaces to create your own phantasy.

Unleash your imagination with our ultimate character creation experience and creative spaces to create your own phantasy.

en.name: Arma 2: Operation Arrowhead
en.short_description: Three years after the conflict in Chernarus, portrayed in the original Arma 2, a new flashpoint explodes in the Green Sea Region. Coalition forces led by the US Army are deployed to Takistan to quickly restore peace and prevent further civilian casualties.

en.name: MapleStory
en.short_description: Join over 260 million players worldwide in MapleStory, the world’s biggest 2D MMORPG adventure! Play now for free.

tc.name: MapleStory
tc.short_description: Join over 260 million players worldwide in MapleStory, the world’s biggest 2D MMORPG adventure! Play now for free.

en.name: Age of Empires: Definitive Edition
en.short_description: Age of Empires, the pivotal real-time strategy game that launched a 20-year legacy returns with modernized gameplay, all-new 4K visuals, 8-person multiplayer battles and a host of other new features. Welcome back to history.

tc.name: Age of Empires: Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: 出自二十年前的經典即時戰略遊戲 Age of Empires 回歸，將為您帶來現代化遊戲內容、全新 4K 視覺效果、能和八位玩家進行多人遊戲對戰以及其他許多全新功能。歡迎重返歷史榮光。

en.name: Age of Wonders III
en.short_description: Age of Wonders III is the long anticipated sequel to the award-winning strategy series. Delivering a unique mix of Empire Building, Role Playing and Warfare, Age of Wonders III offers the ultimate in turn-based fantasy strategy for veterans of the series and new players alike!

tc.name: Age of Wonders III
tc.short_description: Age of Wonders III is the long anticipated sequel to the award-winning strategy series. Delivering a unique mix of Empire Building, Role Playing and Warfare, Age of Wonders III offers the ultimate in turn-based fantasy strategy for veterans of the series and new players alike!

en.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Call of Pripyat
en.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Call of Pripyat is the direct sequel of the S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl. As a Major Alexander Degtyarev you should investigate the crash of the governmental helicopters around the Zone and find out, what happened there.

tc.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Call of Pripyat
tc.short_description: 《潜行者：普里皮亚季的召唤》是《潜行者：切尔诺贝利的阴影》的直接续作。你将扮演亚历山大捷格加廖夫少校，奉命调查政府直升机在封锁区周围坠毁一案，并探索隐藏的真相。

en.name: Poly Bridge
en.short_description: Unleash your engineering creativity with an engaging and fresh bridge-building simulator with all the bells and whistles. Enjoy hours of physics-based puzzle solving in the Campaign and then jump in the Sandbox to create your own bridge designs and puzzles!

tc.name: Poly Bridge
tc.short_description: Unleash your engineering creativity with an engaging and fresh bridge-building simulator with all the bells and whistles. Enjoy hours of physics-based puzzle solving in the Campaign and then jump in the Sandbox to create your own bridge designs and puzzles!

en.name: LIZARDS MUST DIE
en.short_description: The great exploits of the Ancient Rus in the war with the lizards. Immerse yourself in the world of Hyperborea and defeat hordes of Lizards and other unholy who encroached on holy places Ancestors. Choose a blessed hero and go save the world from the green plague.

tc.name: LIZARDS MUST DIE
tc.short_description: The great exploits of the Ancient Rus in the war with the lizards. Immerse yourself in the world of Hyperborea and defeat hordes of Lizards and other unholy who encroached on holy places Ancestors. Choose a blessed hero and go save the world from the green plague.

en.name: Assetto Corsa Competizione
en.short_description: Assetto Corsa Competizione, the official GT World Challenge videogame. Thanks to the extraordinary quality of simulation, you will experience the atmosphere of the GT3 championship. Compete against official drivers, teams, cars and official circuits reproduced to the highest quality ever seen.

tc.name: 神力科莎出賽準備: 競爭 Assetto Corsa Competizione
tc.short_description: 《神力科莎出賽準備: 競爭 Assetto Corsa Competizione》是全新的 GT 世界挑戰系列賽官方遊戲。 本遊戲出色的模擬品質將讓你得以透過官方車手、車隊、賽車和賽道共同組成的賽車模擬，在以最高的準確度還原賽事中體驗 GT3 錦標賽的真實氛圍

en.name: SONIC X SHADOW GENERATIONS
en.short_description: Shadow the Hedgehog is back with Classic and Modern Sonic in SONIC X SHADOW GENERATIONS, an all-new collection featuring two unique experiences!

tc.name: 索尼克×夏特 世代重啟
tc.short_description: 因為神祕怪物「時間侵蝕者」造成的時空歪曲，索尼克和夏特的故事分別揭開序幕。 黑暗英雄「夏特」肆意奔馳的完全新作《夏特 世代》 追加新要素並能在各種關卡享受競速樂趣的《索尼克 世代》 盡情遊玩包含2部高速動作冒險作品的《索尼克 × 夏特 世代重啟》吧！

en.name: The Awesome Adventures of Captain Spirit
en.short_description: Have you ever dreamt of being a superhero? Meet Chris, a creative and imaginative 9 year old boy who escapes reality with fantastical adventures as his alter ego, the Awesome Captain Spirit! Captain Spirit is a free demo set in the Life is Strange universe. Contains links to Life is Strange 2

tc.short_description: Have you ever dreamt of being a superhero? Meet Chris, a creative and imaginative 9 year old boy who escapes reality with fantastical adventures as his alter ego, the Awesome Captain Spirit!
