en.name: Sunkenland
en.short_description: Get ready for a Waterworld-themed survival game with modular base building, sunken city scavenging, crafting, base defense, and invasions of NPC clans for resources and territory. Ready for the water apocalypse?

tc.name: Sunkenland
tc.short_description: Get ready for a Waterworld-themed survival game with modular base building, sunken city scavenging, crafting, base defense, and invasions of NPC clans for resources and territory. Ready for the water apocalypse?

en.name: The Test
en.short_description: You will answer a series of questions that will reveal truths from deep within. These questions may make you uncomfortable, but with great knowledge comes great sacrifice. Can you make it all the way through The Test, and if you do, are you sure you want the answers you seek?

tc.name: The Test
tc.short_description: You will answer a series of questions that will reveal truths from deep within. These questions may make you uncomfortable, but with great knowledge comes great sacrifice. Can you make it all the way through The Test, and if you do, are you sure you want the answers you seek?

en.name: Darksiders II Deathinitive Edition
en.short_description: The ultimate DARKSIDERS II experience! 1080p native resolution. Reworked and tuned game balancing and loot distribution. Improved Graphic Render Engine for even higher visual quality, lighting and shadows. Improved and reworked level, character and environment graphics.

tc.name: Darksiders II Deathinitive Edition
tc.short_description: The ultimate DARKSIDERS II experience! 1080p native resolution. Reworked and tuned game balancing and loot distribution. Improved Graphic Render Engine for even higher visual quality, lighting and shadows. Improved and reworked level, character and environment graphics.

en.name: Spirit City: Lofi Sessions
en.short_description: Spirit City: Lofi Sessions is a gamified focus tool, set to a soothing lofi soundtrack. Discover and collect Spirits, customize your cozy virtual space, and facilitate your real-life tasks with a collection of handy features designed to improve concentration and ease stress.

tc.name: Spirit City: Lofi Sessions
tc.short_description: Spirit City: Lofi Sessions is a gamified focus tool, set to a soothing lofi soundtrack. Discover and collect Spirits, customize your cozy virtual space, and facilitate your real-life tasks with a collection of handy features designed to improve concentration and ease stress.

en.name: Hero's Adventure: Road to Passion
en.short_description: Hero's Adventure:Road to Passion is a wuxia open-world RPG. You will commence your journey as an underdog in the tumultuous Martial World and will be met with a wide array of choices as you navigate your own heroic saga.
developers: 半瓶醋工作室（Half Amateur Studio）

tc.name: 大俠立志傳：碧血丹心
tc.short_description: 《大俠立志傳：碧血丹心》是一款開放世界武俠RPG遊戲，更是一款像素版江湖生存模擬器，站在一個初出茅廬的市井小人物視角，還原在江湖底層摸爬滾打最終脫穎而出的逆襲經歷。
developers: 半瓶醋工作室（Half Amateur Studio）

en.name: F1® Manager 2022
en.short_description: Make your mark on Formula 1® in the officially licensed F1® Manager 2022. Be the boss of your chosen constructor and pick from a roster of 2022 drivers and staff.

tc.name: F1® Manager 2022
tc.short_description: 在官方授權的《F1® 車隊經理 2022》遊戲中，於 F1® 賽場上開拓自己的一席之地。成為您所選製造商的頂頭上司，並從 2022 賽季的車手與工作人員陣容中挑選自己中意的成員。

en.name: Heroes® of Might & Magic® III - HD Edition
en.short_description: The most popular Heroes® title of all time is back in HD! Fifteen years later, rediscover the epic tale of Queen Catherine Ironfist, as she re-embarks on her critically acclaimed quest to unite her ravaged homeland and re-conquer the kingdom of Erathia.

tc.name: Heroes® of Might & Magic® III - HD Edition
tc.short_description: The most popular Heroes® title of all time is back in HD! Fifteen years later, rediscover the epic tale of Queen Catherine Ironfist, as she re-embarks on her critically acclaimed quest to unite her ravaged homeland and re-conquer the kingdom of Erathia.

en.name: Car For Sale Simulator 2023
en.short_description: Car For Sale Simulator 2023 - Developed for car enthusiasts, grow your own car sales business by buying and selling different car models. Drive the purchased cars as you wish, repair them, modify them, and sell them to customers at affordable prices.

tc.name: 汽車經銷商模擬器2023
tc.short_description: 《Car For Sale Simulator 2023》是专为汽车爱好者开发的游戏，您可以通过购买和销售不同的汽车模型来发展自己的汽车销售业务。您可以按照自己的意愿驾驶、修理、改装并以合适的价格卖给顾客购买的汽车。

en.name: Before Your Eyes
en.short_description: Embark on an emotional first-person narrative adventure where you control the story—and affect its outcomes—with your real-life blinks. With this innovative technique you will fully immerse yourself in a world of memories, both joyous and heartbreaking, as your whole life flashes before your eyes.

tc.name: Before Your Eyes
tc.short_description: 展開一段扣人心弦的第一人稱敘事冒險遊戲，你將透過實際的眨眼，操控劇情走向，並影響結局。這種創新的操作方式，將讓你完全沉浸在悲喜交加的回憶世界中，同時在你眼前閃過一生。

en.name: Call of Duty®: Black Ops
en.short_description: The biggest first-person action series of all time and the follow-up to critically acclaimed Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare 2 returns with Call of Duty®: Black Ops.

tc.name: Call of Duty®: Black Ops
tc.short_description: The biggest first-person action series of all time and the follow-up to critically acclaimed Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare 2 returns with Call of Duty®: Black Ops.

en.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 3
en.short_description: Patisserie "La Soleil", run by Kashou Minaduki, is flourishing thanks to the help of two catgirls: Maple, full of pride and a little on the haughty side, and Cinnamon, an impulsive daydreamer.

tc.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 3
tc.short_description: 水無月嘉祥所經營的蛋糕店『Soleil』裡的貓娘情人持續增加，今天也好評營業中。 自尊心很強、高傲又時髦的貓娘次女楓， 與總是陷入妄想獨自一人暴走的三女桂。 兩隻貓在姊妹之中的關係如同至交好友一般，因為一些契機而對夢想感到煩惱的楓， 想成為摯友的助力卻不知該怎麼做才好的桂，描繪一起朝著夢想成長的姊妹倆以及家人間的羈絆， 稍微有點Ｈ又溫暖人心的貓娘戀愛喜劇今天也開張囉！

en.name: Spiral Knights
en.short_description: Join the ranks of the Spiral Knights. Stranded on an alien world, you must explore the ever-changing Clockworks beneath its surface.

tc.name: Spiral Knights
tc.short_description: 加入《螺旋騎士團》的行列！擱淺於一個陌生的星球，您必須探索藏在其下、且隨時都在改變的 Clockworks！

en.name: Outpost: Infinity Siege
en.short_description: Command Mobile Outpost and take XEN Firearm to venture deep into the Signet surveillance off-limit area. Collect unique Weapon Units. Amp up the firepower of the Outpost that fights with you. This is an FTD game - FPS, Tower Defense, Base Building and much more all at the same time.

tc.name: 重裝前哨
tc.short_description: 指揮自己的移動哨站，手握“溶質槍”深入危機四伏的“天印”監控無人區，收集那些令人驚奇的武器部件，提升火力，與它並肩作戰。塔防、FPS、RTS多種玩法融為一體，靈活應對，將襲來的敵軍消滅殆盡。 在多人模式下，召集夥伴抵禦敵人、攻克前方的危機與挑戰，從“天印”手中奪回大地！

en.name: Townscaper
en.short_description: Instant town building toy. Place housing blocks and watch them transform, piece by piece, into idyllic ocean-side towns, pastoral gardens, or sweeping cities on the sea.

tc.name: Townscaper
tc.short_description: 城鎮建造沙盒世界。放置房屋方塊，靜靜欣賞它們一塊塊蛻變，化為海邊小鎮、田園花園，或是壯麗的海上城市。

en.name: Shadowverse CCG
en.short_description: Four million battles every day. One Shadowverse. Japan's #1 strategic card game. Made by card gamers for card gamers.

tc.name: Shadowverse CCG
tc.short_description: "──世界充滿黑暗之時，通向虛無的大門就此敞開 新時代卡牌對戰遊戲大作《Shadowverse》繁中版即刻開戰 ▼千張以上超華麗卡牌 匯集知名繪師群共同打造的華麗大作 壓倒性日系精美畫風，隨時來一場華麗激鬥！ 繁中版全卡包開放進度與全球零時差，補充戰力不落人後！"

en.name: Digimon Story Cyber Sleuth: Complete Edition
en.short_description: With engaging storylines, classic turn-based battles, and tons of Digimon to collect, Digimon Story Cyber Sleuth: Complete Edition delivers everything fans loved about Digimon Story: Cyber Sleuth and Digimon Story: Cyber Sleuth – Hacker’s Memory.

tc.name: Digimon Story Cyber Sleuth: Complete Edition
tc.short_description: With engaging storylines, classic turn-based battles, and tons of Digimon to collect, Digimon Story Cyber Sleuth: Complete Edition delivers everything fans loved about Digimon Story: Cyber Sleuth and Digimon Story: Cyber Sleuth – Hacker’s Memory.

en.name: Last Oasis
en.short_description: Nomadic Survival MMO. Build wooden walking machines to travel to new lands. Create clans and fight for territory. Resources deplete fast, so take your sword and scavenge, pirate, and trade to stay alive.

tc.name: Last Oasis
tc.short_description: 世界正在毀滅，不要停下腳步！在這個遊牧風格的大型線上多人生存遊戲中，您可以透過建造移動基地來遷移到新的大地。加入部落，為領土而戰。資源一轉眼就會消耗殆盡，拿起您的劍，準備為生存而掠奪、搶劫、或者交易。

en.name: BIOMUTANT
en.short_description: BIOMUTANT® is an open-world, post-apocalyptic Kung-Fu fable RPG, with a unique martial arts styled combat system allowing you to mix melee, shooting and mutant ability action.

tc.name: BIOMUTANT
tc.short_description: BIOMUTANT® is an open-world, post-apocalyptic Kung-Fu fable RPG, with a unique martial arts styled combat system allowing you to mix melee, shooting and mutant ability action.

en.name: Mechabellum
en.short_description: Command massive armies in this epic mech auto-battler. Draft your troops, customize your units, master your formations, and crush enemies in spectacular 3D battles. All strategy, no clickfest. Outsmart opponents in 1v1, 2v2, free-for-all, or Survival Mode.

tc.name: Mechabellum
tc.short_description: 在這款機甲自走棋遊戲中，你將指揮鋼鐵洪流主宰未來戰場！整編部隊，研發科技，排兵佈陣，掌控全局，率領您專屬的鋼鐵雄師在戰場上粉碎強敵！！全程策略，拒絕無腦點擊。1v1 巔峯對決；2v2 攜手破敵；4人混戰廝殺；生存模式挑戰極限；時空裂隙征服未知！以智取勝，總有一個戰場適合你！

en.name: Luck be a Landlord
en.short_description: Luck be a Landlord is a roguelike deckbuilder about using a slot machine to earn rent money and defeat capitalism. This game does not contain any real-world currency gambling or microtransactions.

tc.name: 租戶賭財運
tc.short_description: 《租戶賭財運》是款Rogue風格的牌組構築遊戲。玩家將用老虎機賺取房租，一舉擊潰資本主義。本遊戲未有真實貨幣的賭博或微交易。

en.name: Drug Dealer Simulator
en.short_description: Have you ever considered creating your own crime empire, without the legal and moral consequences? SIMULATE IT! Crawl into the dark alleys of the street business in this OG drug-dealing game, and make a fortune! A co-op sequel – DDS2 – is out NOW

tc.name: Drug Dealer Simulator
tc.short_description: 您有沒有想過創造自己的犯罪帝國，而不需承擔法律和道德上的後果呢？模擬它！ 在這款 OG 毒品交易遊戲中，爬進街頭生意的黑暗小巷，賺大錢！合作模式續作 - DDS2 - 即將推出。

en.name: PixARK
en.short_description: Enter a world of mystery, danger, ancient dinosaurs, mythical beasts, and cubes! Work by yourself or with a tribe of others to gather materials, craft useful items, tame wild creatures, and build huge bases to survive in PixARK!

tc.name: PixARK
tc.short_description: 進入一個神秘、危險，充滿古代恐龍與神話般怪獸和立體方塊世界！ 你可以獨立探險或與朋友組成部落，收集材料、製作工具與物件、馴服野生生物，並建立龐大的基地，在《方塊方舟》中生存下去！

en.name: Need for Speed™ Most Wanted
en.short_description: The open-world action in Need for Speed Most Wanted gives you the freedom to drive your way. Hit jumps and shortcuts, switch cars, lie low or head for terrain that plays to your vehicle’s unique strengths. Fight your way past cops and rivals using skill, high-end car tech and tons of nitrous.

tc.name: Need for Speed™ Most Wanted
tc.short_description: 繫上安全帶，大腳踩油門，盡情惹麻煩。

en.name: Spooky's Jump Scare Mansion
en.short_description: Can you survive 1000 rooms of cute terror? Or will you break once the cuteness starts to fade off and you're running for your life from the unspeakable hideous beings that shake and writhe in bowels of this house? They wait for you, they wait and hunger for meeting you.

tc.name: Spooky's Jump Scare Mansion
tc.short_description: Can you survive 1000 rooms of cute terror? Or will you break once the cuteness starts to fade off and you're running for your life from the unspeakable hideous beings that shake and writhe in bowels of this house? They wait for you, they wait and hunger for meeting you.

en.name: Crypt of the NecroDancer
en.short_description: Crypt of the NecroDancer is an award winning hardcore roguelike rhythm game. Move to the music and deliver beatdowns to the beat! Groove to the epic Danny Baranowsky soundtrack, or select songs from your own MP3 collection!

tc.name: Crypt of the NecroDancer
tc.short_description: 「《節奏地牢》是一款獲獎的硬派節奏類Rogue遊戲。隨著音樂移動，並跟著節拍進行猛攻。玩家必須按節奏移動，穿越隨機生成的地牢，同時與跳舞的骷髏、僵屍、龍等進行戰鬥，與此同時隨著屢獲殊榮的丹尼·巴拉諾夫斯基（Danny Baranowsky）的原聲帶搖擺起來！你甚至可以在本地合作模式中與朋友組隊！

en.name: Death's Door
en.short_description: Reaping souls of the dead and punching a clock might get monotonous but it's honest work for a Crow. The job gets lively when your assigned soul is stolen and you must track down a desperate thief to a realm untouched by death - where creatures grow far past their expiry.

tc.name: Death's Door
tc.short_description: 打卡上下班收取亡者靈魂的日子雖然過得單調，但對烏鴉來說是務實的工作。當你分配到的靈魂被偷走了，這工作就變得鮮活起來，你必須追捕鋌而走險的 小偷進入未受死亡眷顧的領域– 那裡的生物都活得比壽命長很多，充滿了貪婪與力量。

en.name: LEGO® Star Wars™: The Skywalker Saga
en.short_description: Play through all nine Skywalker saga films in a game unlike any other. With over 300 playable characters, over 100 vehicles, and 23 planets to explore, a galaxy far, far away has never been more fun! *Includes classic Obi-Wan Kenobi playable character

tc.name: LEGO® Star Wars™ : 天行者傳奇
tc.short_description: 在這款與衆不同的遊戲中，體驗全九部天行者傳奇電影。300 多個可玩人物、100 多部載具和 23 個星球可供探索，遙遠的銀河從未如此有趣！ *包含經典歐比王·肯諾比可玩人物

en.name: Neverwinter
en.short_description: Neverwinter is a free, action MMORPG based on the acclaimed Dungeons & Dragons fantasy roleplaying game. Epic stories, action combat and classic roleplaying await those heroes courageous enough to enter the fantastic world of Neverwinter!

tc.name: Neverwinter
tc.short_description: Neverwinter is a free, action MMORPG based on the acclaimed Dungeons & Dragons fantasy roleplaying game. Epic stories, action combat and classic roleplaying await those heroes courageous enough to enter the fantastic world of Neverwinter!

en.name: HoloCure - Save the Fans!
en.short_description: Play as your favorite Vtubers from Hololive! Fight, explore, and clear your way through armies of fans and save them from their mind-control in this unofficial free fan-game.

tc.name: HoloCure - Save the Fans!
tc.short_description: Play as your favorite Vtubers from Hololive! Fight, explore, and clear your way through armies of fans and save them from their mind-control in this unofficial free fan-game.

en.name: Orwell: Keeping an Eye On You
en.short_description: Big Brother has arrived - and it’s you. Investigate the lives of citizens to find those responsible for a series of terror attacks. Information from the internet, personal communications and private files are all accessible to you. But, be warned, the information you supply will have consequences.

tc.name: Orwell: Keeping an Eye On You
tc.short_description: 老大哥来了——那个人就是你。调查市民的生活，找出恐怖袭击的凶手。来自网络，社交，私人文件的信息全部都可为你敞开。但是请注意，你提供的这些信息也许会有后果……

en.name: GoreBox
en.short_description: GoreBox is a chaotic physics-driven sandbox where creativity meets destruction. Use the Reality Crusher to spawn, manipulate, and obliterate anything. Customize, battle with friends, roleplay, or face devious creatures. In this world, your imagination rules—and chaos is your playground!

tc.name: GoreBox
tc.short_description: GoreBox is a chaotic physics-driven sandbox where creativity meets destruction. Use the Reality Crusher to spawn, manipulate, and obliterate anything. Customize, battle with friends, roleplay, or face devious creatures. In this world, your imagination rules—and chaos is your playground!

en.name: The Room Two
en.short_description: Unique events transport you to the halls of a long-forgotten crypt. The only means of escape lies locked within a stone pedestal, along with a note from your mysterious ally. His words promise assistance, but only serve to entice you into a compelling world of mystery and exploration.

tc.name: The Room Two
tc.short_description: Unique events transport you to the halls of a long-forgotten crypt. The only means of escape lies locked within a stone pedestal, along with a note from your mysterious ally. His words promise assistance, but only serve to entice you into a compelling world of mystery and exploration.

Two years after the Infinite War the once great warring nations now lie in ruins, and humanity’s hope for a brighter future is nothing but a bitter memory. A new, seemingly unstoppable enemy, supported by the zealots of The Order, now seeks to eradicate mankind: UEF, Aeon Loyalist, and Cybran alike.

tc.short_description: 由熱銷漫畫和動畫《BLEACH 死神》為基礎3D動作類RPG在Steam登場！用喜歡的角色來組成最強的隊伍吧！

en.name: The Quarry
en.short_description: When the sun goes down on the last night of summer camp, nine teenage counselors are plunged into an unpredictable night of horror. The only thing worse than the blood-drenched locals and creatures hunting them are the unimaginable choices you must make to help them survive.

tc.name: 獵逃驚魂
tc.short_description: 在夏令營的最後一晚，隨著夜幕逐漸低垂，九名年輕的輔導員發現自己陷入了充滿未知變數的恐怖夜晚。除了雙手滿是鮮血的當地人和恐怖怪物的追殺，你還必須做出各種意想不到的艱難選擇，才能讓這群年輕人逃出生天。

en.name: Super Animal Royale
en.short_description: Welcome to the coziest way to kill your friends. Super Animal Royale is a 64-player, top-down 2D battle royale where adorably murderous animals fight tooth, claw, and machine gun. Then, relax in Super Animal World with fishing, hamsterball races, and story quests before the next fight to the death.

tc.name: Super Animal Royale
tc.short_description: 歡迎體驗最輕鬆地幹掉朋友的遊戲！《超級動物大逃殺》是一款 64 人在線的上帝視角 2D 大逃殺遊戲，遊戲中可愛又兇猛的動物們將激烈的張牙舞爪，用機槍掃射四周。戰鬥結束後，你還可以前往超級動物世界放鬆身心，體驗釣魚、倉鼠球競賽，完成劇情委託，等待下一場生死決斗的到來。

en.name: Leaf Blower Revolution - Idle Game
en.short_description: Blow leaves, upgrade your gear, and automate your progress as you explore the Leaf Universe. A satisfying incremental idle game where every leaf blown brings you closer to the next big upgrade. Simple, relaxing, and endlessly rewarding. Let the leaves fall, and your progress rise!

tc.name: Leaf Blower Revolution - Idle Game
tc.short_description: Blow leaves, upgrade your gear, and automate your progress as you explore the Leaf Universe. A satisfying incremental idle game where every leaf blown brings you closer to the next big upgrade. Simple, relaxing, and endlessly rewarding. Let the leaves fall, and your progress rise!

en.name: Yakuza Kiwami 2 (Legacy)
en.short_description: Kazuma Kiryu, the Dragon of Dojima, must face the ambitious Ryuji Goda, the Dragon of Kansai, in an all-out war between two rival yakuza clans. An extreme recreation of one of Yakuza’s most beloved entries, now in stunning 4K and unlocked framerates. There can be only one dragon.

tc.name: 人中之龍 極２ [Legacy]
tc.short_description: 藉由人龍引擎重新復甦的系列第二部作品《人中之龍２》的完全重製作品《人中之龍 極２》登場！過去人稱「堂島之龍」的傳說中的男人──桐生一馬，與人稱「關西之龍」的最強黑道──鄉田龍司。決定誰才是真正的龍的死戰，現正開始。

en.name: Dead Island: Riptide Definitive Edition
en.short_description: Welcome to the zombie apocalypse experience of a lifetime – more beautiful than ever. Caught in an epic zombie outbreak on the tropical island of Banoi, your only thought is: Survive!

tc.name: Dead Island: Riptide Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: Welcome to the zombie apocalypse experience of a lifetime – more beautiful than ever. Caught in an epic zombie outbreak on the tropical island of Banoi, your only thought is: Survive!

en.name: RWBY: Grimm Eclipse
en.short_description: RWBY: GRIMM ECLIPSE is a 4 player, online co-op, hack and slash game based upon Rooster Teeth’s international hit series RWBY.

tc.name: RWBY: Grimm Eclipse
tc.short_description: RWBY: GRIMM ECLIPSE is a 4 player, online co-op, hack and slash game based upon Rooster Teeth’s international hit series RWBY.

en.short_description: Take over the world in RISK: Global Domination, the iconic strategy board game with 100+ original and classic maps and millions of players

tc.short_description: Take over the world in RISK: Global Domination, the iconic strategy board game with 100+ original and classic maps and millions of players

en.name: RAGE 2
en.short_description: RAGE 2 brings together two studio powerhouses – Avalanche Studios, masters of open world insanity, and id Software, creators of the first-person shooter – to deliver a carnival of carnage where you can go anywhere, shoot anything, and explode everything.

tc.name: RAGE 2
tc.short_description: 《RAGE 2》由超狂開放世界霸主Avalanche Studios、第一人稱射擊遊戲創作團隊id Software兩大傳奇工作室聯手打造，給你嘉年華式的血腥狂殺，路隨你走，槍隨你用，東西隨你炸。

en.name: Soccer Online: Ball 3D
en.short_description: Multiplayer soccer simulator. Control one player. Play online or with bots.

tc.name: 足球在線：球3D
tc.short_description: 多人足球模擬器。操控一名球員。線上遊玩或與機器人對戰。

en.name: Half-Life 2: Episode Two
en.short_description: Half-Life® 2: Episode Two is the second in a trilogy of new games created by Valve that extends the award-winning and best-selling Half-Life® adventure. As Dr. Gordon Freeman, you were last seen exiting City 17 with Alyx Vance as the Citadel erupted amidst a storm of unknown proportions.

tc.name: Half-Life 2: Episode Two
tc.short_description: Half-Life® 2: Episode Two 是 Valve 所推出的新三部曲遊戲中的第二部，延續獲獎又暢銷的 Half-Life® 冒險遊戲。 身為 高登費里曼博士，當城塔出現不明風暴時，你最後被目擊到與艾莉克絲凡斯離開第 17 號城。在 Episode Two 之中，您必須與合成人戰鬥並比賽穿越白森林，將從城塔中偷出的重要資訊包裹送到反抗勢力的科學家手上。 Episode Two 延續了獲獎的 Half-Life 中有獨特武器、車輛及新生物種的遊戲風格。

en.name: Learn to Fly 3
en.short_description: Build your spaceship from scratch, earn funds and invest them into building a bigger, better spaceship as you try and fly your way up to space!

tc.name: Learn to Fly 3
tc.short_description: Build your spaceship from scratch, earn funds and invest them into building a bigger, better spaceship as you try and fly your way up to space!

en.name: SMITE 2
en.short_description: Become a god and wage war in SMITE 2, the free-to-play Unreal Engine 5-powered sequel to the legendary third-person action MOBA. If you love challenging competition, intense action, ability-driven combat, rewarding teamwork, or godly mythology, you’ll see why 40+ million players love SMITE.

tc.name: SMITE 2
tc.short_description: Become a god and wage war in SMITE 2, the free-to-play Unreal Engine 5-powered sequel to the legendary third-person action MOBA. If you love challenging competition, intense action, ability-driven combat, rewarding teamwork, or godly mythology, you’ll see why 40+ million players love SMITE.

en.name: Call of Duty® 2
en.short_description: Call of Duty® 2 redefines the cinematic intensity and chaos of battle as seen through the eyes of ordinary soldiers fighting together in epic WWII conflicts. The sequel to 2003's Call of Duty, winner of over 80 Game of the Year awards, Call of Duty 2 offers more immense, more intense, more realistic battles than ever before, thanks to...

tc.name: Call of Duty® 2
tc.short_description: Call of Duty® 2 重新定義了一般士兵於二次世界大戰所見到的戰場，不但更有戲劇張力，戰場也更混亂。 繼 2003 年推出的 Call of Duty 勇奪逾 80 項年度最佳遊戲獎，現在 Call of Duty 2 採用 COD™2 引擎，帶來比以往都更寬廣的戰場，更有張力，更逼真的戰鬥。 二次世界大戰最佳開發團隊再次帶來全新驚人體驗：獲獎作品 Call of Duty 的開發團隊 Inifinity Ward 所開發。 前所未見的全新增強效果，從驚人的逼真繪圖到完美無縫的遊戲內容，革新的 COD2 引擎帶來突破性的 AI 與多選擇導向遊戲創新。 精緻繪製的飄雪、雨水、濃霧和硝煙，配合動態光影，讓這款遊戲成為至今最具張力的二次世界大戰射擊遊戲。

en.name: Move or Die
en.short_description: Move or Die is an absurdly fast-paced 4-player local and online party game where the mechanics change every 20 seconds! It's THE friendship-ruining game.

tc.name: Move or Die
tc.short_description: Move or Die是一款快節奏的4人單機和多人在線網絡遊戲，遊戲玩法每20秒變換一次。這絕對是一款讓友誼的小船說翻就翻的遊戲。

en.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky
en.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky – standalone prequel for the acclaimed S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl, which tells you story about the Clear Sky group, that want to research the Zone and understand it better.

tc.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky
tc.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky – standalone prequel for the acclaimed S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl, which tells you story about the Clear Sky group, that want to research the Zone and understand it better.

en.name: Total War: NAPOLEON – Definitive Edition
en.short_description: Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: NAPOLEON, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release

tc.name: Total War: NAPOLEON – Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: NAPOLEON, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release

en.name: Tricolour Lovestory
en.short_description: Time flies and never comes back. But with an incredible 1-million-word script and 100+ original CGs, this game will take you back to when you were young, simple and pure. Go and get the love of your life back, start something new, or end everything in flame, that's for you to decide!

tc.name: Tricolour Lovestory
tc.short_description: 時光一逝永不回，往事只能回味。 100萬字劇本+全程語音+100張CG的這部高中題材戀愛遊戲彷彿帶你回到學生時代，再經歷一次高中戀愛生活。那一天，你失去了她；那一天，她和她同時向你伸出了雙手，你不再孤身一人。此後，你的每一個選擇決定了是在歡聲笑語中打出GG，還是在這裡完成了人生的遺憾！

en.name: Sunset Overdrive
en.short_description: Sunset Overdrive transforms an open-world apocalypse into your tactical playground. Zip, grind and wall-run across Sunset City with an unconventional arsenal. Hyper-agility, unique weapons, and customizable abilities deliver an explosive and irreverent adventure in the end times.

tc.name: Sunset Overdrive
tc.short_description: Sunset Overdrive transforms an open-world apocalypse into your tactical playground. Zip, grind and wall-run across Sunset City with an unconventional arsenal. Hyper-agility, unique weapons, and customizable abilities deliver an explosive and irreverent adventure in the end times.

en.name: Across the Obelisk
en.short_description: Set forth in a co-op roguelite deckbuilder where every choice matters! Craft decks of breathtaking power. Journey alone or with up to three friends. Plot your party’s path to glory and face powerful enemies in deep tactical combat on your quest to save the kingdom of Senenthia in Across the Obelisk!

tc.name: Across the Obelisk
tc.short_description: 在多人合作的 Roguelite 牌組構築遊戲中啟程，每個選擇在此都很重要！打造出力量驚人的牌組。可獨自一人或與最多三名朋友踏上旅程。在《勇闖巨岩塔》中規劃隊伍走向榮耀之路，展開深奧的策略戰鬥，對抗強大的敵人，接受使命，拯救瑟那錫亞王國！

en.name: Walking Zombie 2
en.short_description: Zombie singleplayer shooter in modern polygon graphics with rich RPG elements.

tc.name: Walking Zombie 2
tc.short_description: 多邊形圖形殭屍單人離線射擊遊戲，具有RPG元素。

en.name: God of War Ragnarök
en.short_description: Kratos and Atreus embark on a mythic journey for answers before Ragnarök arrives – now on PC.

tc.name: God of War Ragnarök
tc.short_description: 諸神黃昏在即，克雷多斯和阿特柔斯必須踏上神話之旅尋找解答—現已登陸PC。

en.name: Spelunky 2
en.short_description: Spelunky 2 builds upon the unique, randomized challenges that made the original a roguelike classic, offering a huge adventure designed to satisfy players old and new. Meet the next generation of explorers as they find themselves on the Moon, searching for treasure and missing family.

tc.name: Spelunky 2
tc.short_description: Spelunky 2 builds upon the unique, randomized challenges that made the original a roguelike classic, offering a huge adventure designed to satisfy players old and new. Meet the next generation of explorers as they find themselves on the Moon, searching for treasure and missing family.

en.name: Choo-Choo Charles
en.short_description: Navigate an open-world island in an old train, upgrade it over time, and use it to fight an evil spider train named Charles.

tc.name: Choo-Choo Charles
tc.short_description: 駕駛一輛老火車遍遊一座開放世界島嶼，在過程中升級這輛火車，並用它來對抗名叫查爾斯的邪惡蜘蛛火車。

en.name: 20 Minutes Till Dawn
en.short_description: 20 Minutes Till Dawn is a survival roguelite where endless hordes of creatures lurk from the dark. Craft an array of overpowering builds and eradicate waves of Lovecraftian nightmares. Will you be able to survive the night?

tc.name: 黎明前20分鐘
tc.short_description: 快圍剿巢穴裡不斷增生的克魯甦魔物！升級武器，選擇你的專屬職業，策略組合，一把20分鐘的Roguelike體驗，直接射爆刷爆爽爆！ ！你還可以選擇10分鐘模式！

en.name: Assassin’s Creed® Brotherhood
en.short_description: It’s time to join the Brotherhood.

tc.name: Assassin’s Creed® Brotherhood
tc.short_description: It’s time to join the Brotherhood.

en.name: Trine 4: The Nightmare Prince
en.short_description: The best-selling Trine series returns to the magic of 2.5D! Join three iconic heroes as they set off on a quest through fantastical fairytale landscapes to save the world from the Nightmare Prince’s shadows.

tc.name: Trine 4: The Nightmare Prince
tc.short_description: The best-selling Trine series returns to the magic of 2.5D! Join three iconic heroes as they set off on a quest through fantastical fairytale landscapes to save the world from the Nightmare Prince’s shadows.

en.short_description: The best-selling, award-winning franchise is back – on your home PC in gorgeous HD for the first time.

tc.name: Scribblenauts Unlimited
tc.short_description: 這款暢銷且屢獲殊榮的系列遊戲強勢回歸 – 並首次以精美的 HD 畫質在您的家用電腦上呈現。

en.name: Sakura Clicker
en.short_description: The latest entry in the Sakura series is more action-packed than ever before! Sakura Clickers is a fast-paced, exciting adventure, full of content, in which you defeat your foes with the power of your mouse!

en.name: Warhammer 40,000: Chaos Gate - Daemonhunters
en.short_description: Lead humanity’s greatest weapon, the Grey Knights, in this fast-paced turn-based tactical RPG. Root out and purge a galaxy-spanning plague in a cinematic, story-driven campaign, using the tactics and talents of your own personalised squad of Daemonhunters.

tc.name: 《Warhammer 40,000：混沌之門 - 惡魔獵人》
tc.short_description: 在這款步調緊湊的回合制戰略角色扮演遊戲中，率領人類最強大的兵器「灰騎士」。運用你專屬惡魔獵人小隊的戰略和天賦，在電影般的劇情導向戰役中根除遍及諸多星球的銀河級瘟疫。

en.name: Men of War: Assault Squad 2
en.short_description: Men of War: Assault Squad 2 expands the real-time tactics series with new skirmish missions, massive multiplayer battles, enhanced visuals, improved AI, and full Direct Control. Command five factions across 65 maps, 250 vehicles, and 200 soldiers in one of the most detailed WWII RTS experiences.

tc.name: Men of War: Assault Squad 2
tc.short_description: Men of War: Assault Squad 2 expands the real-time tactics series with new skirmish missions, massive multiplayer battles, enhanced visuals, improved AI, and full Direct Control. Command five factions across 65 maps, 250 vehicles, and 200 soldiers in one of the most detailed WWII RTS experiences.

en.name: Bad Rats: the Rats' Revenge
en.short_description: Bad Rats is a physics puzzle game where rats finally get their bloody revenge on their new prisoners: The cats. Come up with creative solutions for each puzzle using physics, functional objects, and your specially trained Rats. Try different ways of solving each puzzle to finish faster or earn higher scores.

tc.name: Bad Rats: the Rats' Revenge
tc.short_description: Bad Rats is a physics puzzle game where rats finally get their bloody revenge on their new prisoners: The cats. Come up with creative solutions for each puzzle using physics, functional objects, and your specially trained Rats. Try different ways of solving each puzzle to finish faster or earn higher scores.

en.name: My Time at Sandrock
en.short_description: Travel to the desert community of Sandrock and take on the role of a fledgling Builder. Use your trusty toolset to gather resources, construct machines, and turn your run-down workshop into a well-oiled production facility to save the town from the jaws of economic ruin!

tc.name: My Time at Sandrock
tc.short_description: 荒漠小城沙石鎮誠摯而迫切地邀請您約上好友，一起建設美好家園，通過經營工坊讓沙石鎮重返往日繁華，同時收穫到親情友情甚至是愛情。

en.name: BONEWORKS
en.short_description: BONEWORKS is an Experimental Physics VR Adventure. Use found physics weapons, tools, and objects to fight across dangerous playscapes and mysterious architecture.

tc.name: BONEWORKS
tc.short_description: BONEWORKS is an Experimental Physics VR Adventure. Use found physics weapons, tools, and objects to fight across dangerous playscapes and mysterious architecture.

en.name: Shakes and Fidget
en.short_description: Shakes & Fidget is a hilarious fantasy role-playing satire and at the same time, an award-winning RPG! Sounds crazy? With over 50 million enthusiastic players, it ranks among the most celebrated online role-playing games worldwide!

tc.name: Shakes and Fidget
tc.short_description: Shakes & Fidget is a hilarious fantasy role-playing satire and at the same time, an award-winning RPG! Sounds crazy? With over 50 million enthusiastic players, it ranks among the most celebrated online role-playing games worldwide!

en.name: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic
en.short_description: Discover a new breed of Action-RPG game powered by an enhanced version of the Source™ Engine by Valve. Set in the Might & Magic® universe, players will experience ferocious combat in a dark and immersive fantasy environment. Swords, Stealth, Sorcery. Choose your way to kill.

tc.name: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic
tc.short_description: 體驗全新種類的動作角色扮演遊戲，採用 Valve 的增強版 Source™ 引擎。 遊戲設於魔法門 (Might & Magic®) 的世界，玩家進入詭秘的奇幻世界，體驗激烈戰鬥，氣氛引人入勝。 刀劍、匿蹤、法術。 挑選您自己的必殺技。 尖端技術：體驗 Valve 增強版的 Source™ 引擎。 以奇幻設定為背景，發掘全新的視點，全面性的體感、逼真的動態，還有物理繪圖和完整的第一人稱對戰戰鬥系統。 步步緊湊的激戰：挑戰 12 個大型關卡的邪惡勢力，習得逾 30 種武器和各種高殺傷力的法術。 角色進化：拓展遊戲性而不受限於單一職業。 用「黑暗彌賽亞」(Dark Messiah) 的獨特技能演進系統，隨遊戲進行而習得強力的新法術和攻擊技能。

en.name: Day of Infamy
en.short_description: Experience close-quarters battles in iconic WWII settings. Defend the line, storm the beach, torch the enemy, or use a radio to call in fire support. Day of Infamy is a teamwork-oriented shooter that will keep you on your toes and coming back for more with its diverse game modes and authentic arsenal.

tc.name: Day of Infamy
tc.short_description: 通過 PVP 模式和合作戰鬥模式，體驗激烈的二戰第一人稱射擊戰鬥。扮演美國陸軍、英聯邦陸軍或德意志國防軍的歷史部隊，召喚火力支援，掩護目標，將戰線向前方推進。

en.name: Session: Skate Sim
en.short_description: Made by and for skaters, the dual stick controls faithfully reproduce your feet on the skateboard for an ultra-realistic experience. Try out real-life iconic skate spots, customise your skater and equipment with items from the top brands

tc.name: Session: Skate Sim
tc.short_description: 由滑板手為滑板手製作的遊戲，dual stick controls 忠實重現了你放在滑板上的雙腳，並提供你極致逼真的滑板運動體驗。快來試試現實世界中具代表性的滑板運動地點、客製化你的滑板手及搭配頂尖品牌物品的裝備

en.name: Mass Effect (2007)

tc.name: Mass Effect (2007)

en.name: SoulWorker - Anime Action MMO
en.short_description: SoulWorker, free-2-play anime action MMO, combines pacy combos with a real anime feel. You’ll need excellent reactions and precise timing to take it to the merciless creatures in this post-apocalyptic world.

tc.name: SoulWorker - Anime Action MMO
tc.short_description: SoulWorker, free-2-play anime action MMO, combines pacy combos with a real anime feel. You’ll need excellent reactions and precise timing to take it to the merciless creatures in this post-apocalyptic world.

en.name: Street Fighter V
en.short_description: Experience the intensity of head-to-head battles with Street Fighter® V! Choose from 16 iconic characters, then battle against friends online or offline with a robust variety of match options.

tc.name: Street Fighter V
tc.short_description: 在 Street Fighter® V 之中，您能體驗一對一單挑的快感！您可選擇 16 位擁有獨特故事與挑戰的戰士，利用各種可自訂之遊戲模式跟朋友在線上或面對面對戰。

en.name: War of Rights
en.short_description: War of Rights is a first person multiplayer game featuring massive 400 player battles with a focus on historical authenticity, teamplay and immersion. It is set during the perilous days of the American Civil War, in the Maryland Campaign of September, 1862.

tc.name: War of Rights
tc.short_description: War of Rights is a first person multiplayer game featuring massive 400 player battles with a focus on historical authenticity, teamplay and immersion. It is set during the perilous days of the American Civil War, in the Maryland Campaign of September, 1862.

en.name: Age of Wonders 4
en.short_description: Rule a fantasy realm of your own design! Explore new magical realms in Age of Wonders’ signature blend of 4X strategy and turn-based tactical combat. Control a faction that grows and changes as you expand your empire with each turn!

tc.name: Age of Wonders 4
tc.short_description: 統治自己設計的奇幻國度！在《Age of Wonders》融合 4 倍策略與回合制的標誌性戰鬥中，探索全新的奇幻國度。控制能夠持續發展與變化的陣營，一輪接著一輪拓展帝國。

en.name: 911 Operator
en.short_description: Game about the difficult work of people that manage emergency lines and services. Answer incoming calls and react properly - give first aid instructions, advise, dispatch correct number of firemen / police / ambulances, or sometimes - just ignore the call. Play on ANY CITY in the world!

tc.name: 911 Operator
tc.short_description: Game about the difficult work of people that manage emergency lines and services. Answer incoming calls and react properly - give first aid instructions, advise, dispatch correct number of firemen / police / ambulances, or sometimes - just ignore the call. Play on ANY CITY in the world!

en.name: Mouthwashing
en.short_description: The five crew members of the Tulpar are stranded in the empty reaches of space, shrouded in perpetual sunset. God is not watching.

tc.name: Mouthwashing
tc.short_description: 拓帕號的五名船員受困於茫茫宇宙中。永恆日落壟罩，老天卻別過目光。

en.name: SEGA Mega Drive and Genesis Classics
en.short_description: SEGA’s collection of Mega Drive & Genesis Classics comes to a new generation, now updated with even more features: online multiplayer, achievements, mirror mode, rewind, save states, VR and more! Over 50 classic games in one great package. Get into the classics!

tc.name: SEGA Mega Drive and Genesis Classics
tc.short_description: SEGA’s collection of Mega Drive & Genesis Classics comes to a new generation, now updated with even more features: online multiplayer, achievements, mirror mode, rewind, save states, VR and more! Over 50 classic games in one great package. Get into the classics!

en.name: DOOM 3
en.short_description: A demonic invasion has overwhelmed the Union Aerospace Corporation's Mars research facility. As one of only a few survivors, you must fight your way to hell and back against a horde of demons in this award-winning horror/action FPS and reimagining of the original DOOM.

tc.name: DOOM 3
tc.short_description: 地獄大軍大舉入侵，聯合航太公司的火星研究中心慘遭蹂躪。你是少數倖存者之一，必須殺入地獄屠盡惡魔大軍，然後活著回來。快來體驗這款備受讚譽的恐怖動作第一人稱射擊遊戲，看看初代《DOOM》獲得怎樣的重新詮釋。

en.name: Sonic Frontiers
en.short_description: Sonic Frontiers is a groundbreaking open-zone action-adventure game set on the ancient Starfall Islands. Join Sonic as he battles hordes of powerful enemies with an all-new combat system, explores the mysteries of the islands, and saves his friends!

tc.name: 索尼克 未知邊境
tc.short_description: 在『索尼克 未知邊境』中，玩家能夠以索尼克特有的超音速動作在廣闊的島嶼中隨心所欲奔馳，這是一款自由自在的嶄新動作冒險遊戲。

en.name: Counter-Strike: Condition Zero
en.short_description: With its extensive Tour of Duty campaign, a near-limitless number of skirmish modes, updates and new content for Counter-Strike's award-winning multiplayer game play, plus over 12 bonus single player missions, Counter-Strike: Condition Zero is a tremendous offering of single and multiplayer content.

tc.name: Counter-Strike: Condition Zero
tc.short_description: 《絕對武力：一觸即發》不但有精心製作的 Tour of Duty (使命召喚) 戰役、幾近無限變化的對抗模式、絕對武力多人連線遊戲的更新和新增內容，更有超過 12 個額外單機任務。不管是單人還是多人遊戲，都絕對不容錯過。

en.name: Life is Feudal: Your Own
en.short_description: Hardcore and realistic; LiF is a Medieval multiplayer sandbox RPG, with free terraforming, a rich crafting system and preset and modular building construction. With engaging survival aspects, no target physics-based combat and a unique formation system - along with numerous other features - LiF is not for the faint of heart!

tc.name: Life is Feudal: Your Own
tc.short_description: Hardcore and realistic; LiF is a Medieval multiplayer sandbox RPG, with free terraforming, a rich crafting system and preset and modular building construction. With engaging survival aspects, no target physics-based combat and a unique formation system - along with numerous other features - LiF is not for the faint of heart!

en.name: Dark and Light
en.short_description: Dark and Light is a vast sandbox survival RPG set in a world dominated by powerful elemental forces. Find your way in a meticulously crafted world, featuring breathtaking landscapes, a wide variety of mythical creatures, and limitless possibility to craft, build, and unlock dozens of powerful weapons, spells, and skills.

tc.name: Dark and Light
tc.short_description: 12年情懷力作，借助全新的虛幻4引擎打造的一款沙箱類生存競技魔幻網遊。在這片奇幻的開放世界中，你將獲得無與倫比的感官體驗。神秘詭異的天體氣候系統，廣袤多樣的大世界環境，種類豐富的奇幻生物帶你體驗最驚豔的生存之旅。高自由度建造系統，自訂魔法研習科技，馴養、採集、製作等全方位經營體系，大規模陣營對抗和超自由魔法作戰將為你帶來最獨特的遊戲體驗。生存、探索、協作、征服，究竟是成為異域的開拓者，還是家園的守護者，這片世界的黑暗與光明，將由你來決定。

en.name: Against the Storm
en.short_description: A dark fantasy city builder where you must rebuild civilization in the face of apocalyptic rains. As the Queen’s Viceroy, lead humans, beavers, lizards, foxes, and harpies to reclaim the wilderness and secure a future for civilization's last survivors.

tc.name: 風暴之城 Against the Storm
tc.short_description: 這是一款暗黑奇幻風格的城市建造遊戲。玩家在遊戲中面對災變的同時，還須擔起重建文明的使命。身為女王的總督，你將帶領人類、海狸、狐狸、蜥蜴與鳥身女妖們開疆拓土，為文明的遺民們建構嶄新的未來。

en.name: Microsoft Flight Simulator X: Steam Edition
en.short_description: Take to the skies in the World’s favourite flight simulator! The multi award winning Microsoft Flight Simulator X lands on Steam for the first time. Take off from anywhere in the world, flying some of the world’s most iconic aircraft to any one of 24,000 destinations.

tc.name: Microsoft Flight Simulator X: Steam Edition
tc.short_description: Take to the skies in the World’s favourite flight simulator! The multi award winning Microsoft Flight Simulator X lands on Steam for the first time. Take off from anywhere in the world, flying some of the world’s most iconic aircraft to any one of 24,000 destinations.

en.name: Darkwood
en.short_description: Darkwood - a new perspective on survival horror. Scavenge and explore a rich, ever-changing free-roam world by day, then hunker down in your hideout and pray for the morning light.

tc.name: 陰暗森林 Darkwood
tc.short_description: Darkwood - a new perspective on survival horror. Scavenge and explore a rich, ever-changing free-roam world by day, then hunker down in your hideout and pray for the morning light.

en.name: Donut County
en.short_description: Donut County is a story-based physics puzzle game where you play as an ever-growing hole in the ground. Meet cute characters, steal their trash, and throw them in a hole.

tc.name: Donut County
tc.short_description: Donut County is a story-based physics puzzle game where you play as an ever-growing hole in the ground. Meet cute characters, steal their trash, and throw them in a hole.

en.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 2
en.short_description: Business is booming for La Soleil, the patisserie run by Kashou Minaduki with his two catgirls, Chocola and Vanilla, his sister Shigure, and the Minaduki family's four catgirl sisters.

tc.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 2
tc.short_description: 由水無月嘉祥經營的蛋糕店「Soleil」，今天也在水無月家貓娘四姊妹＋妹妹時雨的幫忙下努力營業著。 嘴巴壞又不坦率，但實際上十項全能又愛護妹妹的長女紅豆， 以及正直又努力，可是卻笨手笨腳又愛逞強的四女椰子， 過去在姊妹中感情最好的這兩隻貓娘，不知何時開始變成了一對成天吵不膩的歡喜冤家。

en.name: Furi
en.short_description: The jailer is the key, kill him and you’ll be free. Fight your way free in this ultra-responsive, fast-paced sword-fighting and dual-stick shooting game.

tc.name: Furi
tc.short_description: The jailer is the key, kill him and you’ll be free. Fight your way free in this ultra-responsive, fast-paced sword-fighting and dual-stick shooting game.

en.name: OMSI 2: Steam Edition
en.short_description: Off to the next round! Experience a new omnibus simulator with OMSI 2 and start discovering Spandau while driving the omnibus. OMSI 2 is the successor of the well-known and awarded omnibus simulator "OMSI - The Bus Simulator".

tc.name: OMSI 2: Steam Edition
tc.short_description: Off to the next round! Experience a new omnibus simulator with OMSI 2 and start discovering Spandau while driving the omnibus. OMSI 2 is the successor of the well-known and awarded omnibus simulator "OMSI - The Bus Simulator".

en.name: AI LIMIT
en.short_description: In the distant future when civilization is on the verge of extinction, people follow the legend of the Elysium in the last city, Havenswell. In this post-apocalyptic wasteland sci-fi ARPG, you will play as Arrisa, a Blader with immortality, and explore the city ruin to find the hope of a new life.

tc.name: AI LIMIT 無限機兵
tc.short_description: 在文明瀕臨滅亡的遙遠未來，人們追尋著【淨地】的傳說，聚集到最後的城市——海汶斯威爾。在這款後啟示錄廢土科幻ARPG中，你將扮演擁有再生之軀的機兵【阿麗莎】，在怪物橫行的城市遺跡中探尋末日的真相，尋找世界新生的希望。

en.name: Naval Action
en.short_description: Or were you deaf or were you blind when you left your two fine legs behind, Or was it sailing on the sea when you got the cannonball to your knee, I too was young and I was slim and I had a leg for every limb, But now I’ve got no legs at all, they were both shot away by a cannonball.

tc.name: Naval Action
tc.short_description: Or were you deaf or were you blind when you left your two fine legs behind, Or was it sailing on the sea when you got the cannonball to your knee, I too was young and I was slim and I had a leg for every limb, But now I’ve got no legs at all, they were both shot away by a cannonball.

en.name: Toribash
en.short_description: Toribash is an innovative free-to-play online turn-based fighting game where you’re able to design your own moves. Complete control over character's body, hundreds of game mods and bloody mess with full body dismemberment - you've never been able to annihilate your enemies like that before!

tc.name: Toribash
tc.short_description: Toribash is an innovative free-to-play online turn-based fighting game where you’re able to design your own moves. Complete control over character's body, hundreds of game mods and bloody mess with full body dismemberment - you've never been able to annihilate your enemies like that before!

en.name: Worms Armageddon
en.short_description: Those intrepid invertebrates return with a vengeance in the much-loved Worms™ Armageddon. It’s a whole new can of worms! It’s hilarious fun that you can enjoy on your own or with all your friends.

tc.name: Worms Armageddon
tc.short_description: 在這款備受喜愛的《Worms™ Armageddon》遊戲中，那些強悍的無脊椎動物要回來復仇了。一次全新的蟲蟲危機！您可以獨自或和親朋好友一起享受這個充滿笑料的有趣遊戲。

en.name: Caves of Qud
en.short_description: Inhabit a deeply-simulated science fantasy world and chisel through layers of thousand-year-old civilizations. Build a character from over a hundred mutations and cybernetics. The award-winning sandbox roguelike & RPG full of robots, deep lore, and sentient plants.

tc.name: Caves of Qud
tc.short_description: 《卡德洞窟》是一部深受復古未來主義影響，具有深度模擬，遍布智能植物的科學幻想風格Roguelike史詩。踏入這片異域，鑿穿被重重掩埋的千年文明。

en.name: South Park™: The Fractured But Whole™
en.short_description: From the creators of South Park, Trey Parker and Matt Stone, comes South Park: The Fractured But Whole, a sequel to 2014's award-winning South Park: The Stick of Truth.

tc.name: South Park™: The Fractured But Whole™
tc.short_description: 繼 2014 年得過遊戲獎的「South Park: The Stick of Truth」後，「南方四賤客」作者 Trey Parker 與 Matt Stone 將推出全新力作「South Park: The Fractured but Whole」。

en.name: Plants vs. Zombies™ Garden Warfare 2: Deluxe Edition
en.short_description: Ready the Peashooters and prepare for the craziest, funniest shooter in the universe: Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2.

tc.name: 《植物大戰殭屍™：花園戰爭 2》 豪華版
tc.short_description: 豌豆射手就位，準備迎接宇宙中最瘋狂、最有趣的射擊遊戲，一切盡在《植物大戰殭屍：花園戰爭 2》。

en.name: Ryse: Son of Rome
en.short_description: “Ryse: Son of Rome” tells the story of Marius Titus, a young Roman soldier who witnesses the murder of his family at the hands of barbarian bandits, then travels with the Roman army to Britannia to seek revenge.

tc.name: Ryse: Son of Rome
tc.short_description: “Ryse: Son of Rome” tells the story of Marius Titus, a young Roman soldier who witnesses the murder of his family at the hands of barbarian bandits, then travels with the Roman army to Britannia to seek revenge.

en.name: Secret Neighbor: Hello Neighbor Multiplayer
en.short_description: Hello Neighbor Multiplayer. Secret Neighbor is a Multiplayer Social Horror Game where a group of intruders try to rescue their friend from the Neighbor's creepy basement. Only problem is one of the intruders is the Neighbor in disguise.

tc.name: Secret Neighbor: Hello Neighbor Multiplayer
tc.short_description: Hello Neighbor Multiplayer. Secret Neighbor is a Multiplayer Social Horror Game where a group of intruders try to rescue their friend from the Neighbor's creepy basement. Only problem is one of the intruders is the Neighbor in disguise.

en.name: NIGHT-RUNNERS™ PROLOGUE
en.short_description: Descend into the underworld of Japanese street racing. Set between 1990-2009, join the local street racing crews in their battle for territory control. Explore the real location open world(s), compete in wager races, battle other crews and upgrade your vehicles with detailed car customization.

tc.name: NIGHT-RUNNERS™ PROLOGUE
tc.short_description: Descend into the underworld of Japanese street racing. Set between 1990-2009, join the local street racing crews in their battle for territory control. Explore the real location open world(s), compete in wager races, battle other crews and upgrade your vehicles with detailed car customization.

en.name: ROUNDS
en.short_description: Rounds is a 1v1 rogue-lite shooter where each round gets more intense. The losing player of each round unlocks clever upgrades to create a better build to counter their opponent.

tc.name: ROUNDS
tc.short_description: Rounds is a 1v1 rogue-lite shooter where each round gets more intense. The losing player of each round unlocks clever upgrades to create a better build to counter their opponent.

en.name: DiRT Rally
en.short_description: DiRT Rally is the most authentic and thrilling rally game ever made, road-tested over 80 million miles by the DiRT community. It perfectly captures that white knuckle feeling of racing on the edge as you hurtle along dangerous roads, knowing that one crash could irreparably harm your stage time.

tc.name: DiRT Rally
tc.short_description: 《塵埃拉力賽（DiRT Rally）》是目前最具權威的一款拉力競速遊戲，塵埃社群實地測試已超過八千萬英里。其核心旨在賽道拉力過程中，傳達最真實和最激情的競速思想。此作完美地體現了拉力競速時，極度驚險的真實性。沿着险峻的道路疯狂飞驰，明知只要撞击一下就可能丧命，你是否还能保持镇定？

en.name: A Short Hike
en.short_description: Hike, climb, and soar through the peaceful mountainside landscapes of Hawk Peak Provincial Park as you make your way to the summit.

tc.name: A Short Hike
tc.short_description: Hike, climb, and soar through the peaceful mountainside landscapes of Hawk Peak Provincial Park as you make your way to the summit.

en.name: Real Pool 3D - Poolians
en.short_description: Real Pool 3D (Poolians) is one of the best online pool games. Play against the computer or real players all over the world! It supports 8 different types of pool games and team play mode.

tc.name: 真實檯球3D - Pool
tc.short_description: Real Pool 3D（Poolians）是最好的在線台球遊戲之一。 與計算機或世界各地的真實玩家對戰！ 它支持8種不同類型的撞球遊戲和團隊合作模式。

en.name: War Robots
en.short_description: War Robots is an online third-person 6v6 PvP shooter—we’re talking dozens of combat robots, hundreds of weapons combinations, and heated clan battles.

tc.name: War Robots
tc.short_description: 《War Robots》是線上第三人稱 6v6 PvP 射擊遊戲。有好幾十臺戰鬥機器人，數百種武器組合，以及激烈 的派系戰鬥。

en.name: Next Day: Survival
en.short_description: Next Day is a multi-player SURVIVAL game with elements of RPG, in an imaginary country in Eastern Europe. Carry out an array of tasks, learn skills, and develop your character. Have shootouts with opponents and earn a reputation.

tc.name: Next Day: Survival
tc.short_description: Next Day is a multi-player SURVIVAL game with elements of RPG, in an imaginary country in Eastern Europe. Carry out an array of tasks, learn skills, and develop your character. Have shootouts with opponents and earn a reputation.

en.name: Road Redemption
en.short_description: Road Redemption lets you lead a biker gang on an epic journey across the country in this driving combat road rage adventure. Huge campaign, dozens of weapons, full 4-player co-op splitscreen.

tc.name: Road Redemption
tc.short_description: Road Redemption是一個競速遊戲，您可以帶領您的摩托車隊來場史詩般的旅程，在全國各地進行史詩般的冒險戰鬥。場面浩大、數十種武器、 4 名玩家合作分割螢幕以及在線多人遊戲。

en.name: TCG Card Shop Simulator
en.short_description: Open your own local game store. Stock shelves with the latest booster packs, or crack them and collect the cards for yourself. Set your own prices, hire staff, host events, and expand your card shop.

tc.name: TCG卡牌店模擬器
tc.short_description: 開設您自己的卡牌商店。擺放最新的補充包，也可以拆開收集卡牌。自行定價、僱用員工、舉辦活動，並拓展您的卡牌商店。

en.name: Absolver
en.short_description: Absolver is an online multiplayer combat game where players are placed behind the mask of a Prospect under control of the Guides, the new rulers of the fallen Adal Empire, who will determine your worth in joining their elite corps of Absolvers.

tc.name: Absolver
tc.short_description: 你從失落的Adal帝國廢墟里醒來，臉上戴著神秘詭異的面具，腦海中依稀殘存著神秘儀式的零碎片段。

en.name: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
en.short_description: Take on the role of one of the notorious Slaughter family, or their victims, in The Texas Chain Saw Massacre, a third-person asymmetrical horror experience based on the groundbreaking and iconic 1974 horror film. Experience the mad and macabre for yourself in The Texas Chain Saw Massacre.

tc.name: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
tc.short_description: Take on the role of one of the notorious Slaughter family, or their victims, in The Texas Chain Saw Massacre, a third-person asymmetrical horror experience based on the groundbreaking and iconic 1974 horror film. Experience the mad and macabre for yourself in The Texas Chain Saw Massacre.

en.name: High On Life
en.short_description: HIGH ON KNIFE DLC OUT NOW!! - Humanity is being threatened by an alien cartel who wants to use them as drugs. It’s up to you to rescue and partner with charismatic, talking guns, take down Garmantuous and his gang, and save the world!

tc.name: High On Life
tc.short_description: 人類遭外星人販毒集團威脅，這個集團想把人類當成毒品。你必須救援會說話且充滿個性的槍械，並與它們成為搭檔，打倒加曼圖斯一伙人，並且拯救世界！

en.name: Who's Your Daddy?!
en.short_description: Who's Your Daddy is a casual multiplayer game featuring a clueless father attempting to prevent his infant son from certain death. Play with up to 7 of your friends, and test your parenting skills in a competitive setup with wacky physics and over 67 potentially ominous household items.

tc.name: Who's Your Daddy?!
tc.short_description: Who's Your Daddy是一款休閒多人遊戲，遊戲中一個毫無頭緒的父親試圖阻止他的嬰兒兒子死亡。與多達7個朋友一起玩，以競爭性設定測試你的育兒技巧，遊戲中有瘋狂的物理效果和超過69個可能具有不祥預兆的家庭用品。

en.name: Castle Story
en.short_description: Castle Story is a creative voxel-based strategy game in which you can build castles one brick at a time using an army of little creatures called Bricktrons. Design and build your own castles, expand your territory in a vast landscape and defend your Bricktrons against onslaughts of hostile creatures.

tc.name: Castle Story
tc.short_description: Castle Story is a creative voxel-based strategy game in which you can build castles one brick at a time using an army of little creatures called Bricktrons. Design and build your own castles, expand your territory in a vast landscape and defend your Bricktrons against onslaughts of hostile creatures.

en.name: The Walking Dead: The Final Season
en.short_description: A secluded school might finally be Clementine’s chance for a home, but protecting it will mean sacrifice.

tc.name: The Walking Dead: The Final Season
tc.short_description: 克萊門汀可能終於有機會在一座隱密的學校建立家園，但必須有所犧牲才能捍衛這個家。

en.name: Century: Age of Ashes
en.short_description: Century: Age of Ashes is a free-to-play multiplayer dragon shooter. Master a growing roster of classes and dragons, compete in intense arena battles and rule the skies in fast-paced aerial combats.

tc.name: Century: Age of Ashes
tc.short_description: Century: Age of Ashes is a free-to-play multiplayer dragon shooter. Master a growing roster of classes and dragons, compete in intense arena battles and rule the skies in fast-paced aerial combats.

en.name: BATTALION: Legacy
en.short_description: BATTALION: Legacy recaptures the core of classic shooters in the final iteration of Battalion 1944. Return to the simple days of playing first person shooters with your friends. Grab your bolt action rifle in 'rifles only' mode or compete in 5v5 Search and Destroy.

tc.name: BATTALION: Legacy
tc.short_description: BATTALION: Legacy recaptures the core of classic shooters in the final iteration of Battalion 1944. Return to the simple days of playing first person shooters with your friends. Grab your bolt action rifle in 'rifles only' mode or compete in 5v5 Search and Destroy.
